Name: Manaseer Group
Description:
Since our establishment in 1999, we believed in the potential of Jordan’s human capital and natural resources. From humble beginnings of just 15 employees, we have evolved into a workforce of over 10,000 professionals, powering Jordan’s most strategic sectors — Building Materials, Energy, Mining, Industrial Minerals, Mobility & Transport Solutions, and Agritech. 

Through innovation, sustainability, and strategic expansion into green energy and strategic minerals, we create long-term value, empower communities, and contribute to national priorities in economic growth, employment, energy, food, and health security, all in alignment with Jordan’s Economic Modernisation Vision’s growth drivers. 

As we look to the future, our commitment remains unwavering: to deliver excellence, drive sustainable progress, and shape a prosperous and resilient future for Jordan and the region.

Name: CSCEC Egypt
Description:
Founded in 1982, China State Construction Engineering Corporation (hereinafter "China State Construction" and "CSCEC") is now a global investment and construction group featuring professional development and market-oriented operation.

China State Construction carries out business management through its public company - China State Construction Engineering Corporation Ltd. (stock code 601668.SH), and has eight listed companies and more than 100 subsidiaries.

Name: Permasteelisa Group
Description:
We are Permasteelisa Group – the leading international façade specialist that has been shaping city skylines worldwide for generations.

Our purpose is to advance building performance through exceptional façades. 

Our remarkable designers, engineers, production teams and installation experts constantly push the boundaries of the possible, delivering bespoke, advanced technical solutions.

We’re proud of our past, but prouder still of the work we’re doing today – building visions for the future. 

Our mission is to offer end-to-end delivery of façade solutions that embody innovation, sustainability and safety, shape urban skylines, and set new standards for excellence.

We operate in 23 locations on four continents, bringing visions of architects to life worldwide and have played our part in the delivery of iconic buildings including Sydney Opera House, One Vanderbilt, Elbphilharmonie Concert Hall, The Shard and UniCredit Tower.

Name: BirlaNu
Description:
BirlaNu, part of the multibillion dollar CKA Birla Group, is a home and building product and services company.
 
We serve homeowners, builders and designers with sustainable, innovative solutions across pipes, construction chemicals, putty, roofs, walls and floors, featuring brands like BirlaNuLeakproof Pipes, BirlaNu Construction Chemicals, BirlaNuTruColour Putty, Charminar, BirlaNu Aerocon and Parador.
 
With 32 manufacturing facilities in India, Germany and Austria, innovation centers in India & Germany and a market presence in over 80 countries, we adhere to the highest global quality standards, holding certifications such as GreenPro, IGBC, PEFC, Blue Angel and EPD. Our products are integral to commercial, healthcare, hospitality, residential and infrastructure projects worldwide.
 
Powered by over 5000 employees and a strong partner ecosystem, BirlaNu is recognized as one of India’s best companies to work For (Great Place to Work) and has won Iconic Brand, Asia’s Most Trusted Brand and Super Brand awards.

Name: Tata BlueScope Steel
Description:
Tata BlueScope Steel is a leading manufacturer and supplier of colour-coated steel, building solutions, and premium roofing products in India and the SAARC region. Our journey began as a strategic joint venture between two global steel giants—Tata Steel and BlueScope Steel, Australia—both with legacies exceeding a century.
Rooted in a vision to transform India’s construction landscape, our commitment to quality, innovation, and engineering excellence continues to shape iconic structures across residential, commercial, industrial, and infrastructure sectors.
With years of research and technical expertise behind our offerings, we provide a diverse portfolio that includes coated steel products, advanced building solutions, and structural systems designed to withstand time and elements. Our flagship brands—COLORBOND steel, ZINCALUME steel, LYSAGHT, EZYBUILD, and DURASHINE—stand as symbols of durability, sustainability, and aesthetic excellence.

Name: Tata BlueScope Steel
Description:
Tata BlueScope Steel is a leading manufacturer and supplier of colour-coated steel, building solutions, and premium roofing products in India and the SAARC region. Our journey began as a strategic joint venture between two global steel giants—Tata Steel and BlueScope Steel, Australia with legacies exceeding a century. Rooted in a vision to transform India’s construction landscape, our commitment to quality, innovation, and engineering excellence continues to shape iconic structures across residential, commercial, industrial, and infrastructure sectors.

With years of research and technical expertise behind our offerings, we provide a diverse portfolio that includes coated steel products, advanced building solutions, and structural systems designed to withstand time and elements. Our flagship brands—COLORBOND steel, ZINCALUME steel, LYSAGHT, and DURASHINE—stand as symbols of durability, sustainability, and aesthetic excellence.

We deliver excellence through sustainable coated steel solutions. We exceed customer expectations through agility, innovation, trust, and collaboration. We deliver best-in-class products leveraging technological excellence. We attract, engage, and retain top talent across all levels. We create long-term value for all stakeholders while scaling with speed and integrity.

Our Core Values
Unity – We invest in people and partnerships, fostering learning and trust-based relationships.
Courage – We embrace change with resilience to remain relevant and future-ready.
Excellence – We strive for the highest standards in all that we do.

At Tata BlueScope Steel, we’re not just building structures but legacies.
Creating your new world in steel.

Name: Taslleeh Engineering Solutions
Description:
Taslleeh is a leading engineering services company specializing in design, government approvals, infrastructure works, fit-out and building contracting projects. With a team of highly skilled professionals, we deliver comprehensive solutions to clients across public, residential, commercial, industrial, and healthcare sectors in the UAE.

Trusted by major developers and esteemed entities such as Emaar, Nakheel, Deyaar, DAMAC, Careem, and the Ministry of Education, Taslleeh has built a strong reputation in the industry. We are a recognized leader in engineering designs, government approval, infrastructure and underground utilities and fitout works in Dubai, officially approved by key regulatory authorities, including the Dubai Development Authority (DDA), Dubai Municipality (DM), Dubai Civil Defense (DCD), Trakhees, Dubai South, Dubai Electricity and Water Authority (DEWA), and the Roads and Transport Authority (RTA).

Our expertise spans a wide range of critical infrastructure projects, ensuring compliance with the highest industry standards. As an ISO-certified company (ISO 9001, 14001, and 45001), we are committed to quality management, environmental sustainability, and occupational health and safety, contributing to the development of a sustainable and resilient Dubai.

Name: Dubai Incorporação e Construção
Description:
A Dubai Incorporação e Construção é uma empresa que atua no desenvolvimento urbano, imobiliário e residencial. 

Fundada em 2009, temos como missão transformar o jeito de viver, nossa visão é impactar a sociedade respeitando os pilares sociais, ambientais e econômicos, construindo um legado transformador, através do compromisso com nossos clientes e a valorização dos nossos colaboradores.

Com mais de 14 anos de atuação no mercado, em toda nossa trajetória, transformamos a vida de mais de 2.000 pessoas com mais de 200 mil m² construídos, e nos orgulhamos de carregar a marca de 100% de nossas obras entregues antes do prazo.

Atuamos com excelência para desenvolver os melhores produtos com inovação, e temos como padrão a qualidade, o compromisso e o relacionamento com nossos clientes, fornecedores e colaboradores.

Somos apaixonados pelo que fazemos, e surpreender é o que nos motiva.

Name: ZURU Tech
Description: ZURU Tech is developing a project to completely change the way buildings are designed and built. We are creating the world's first building information modelling application that is fully connected to a Industry 4.0 capable factory to manufacture any building. We are disrupting the building industry with an international team of highly motivated and skilled people collaborating to create a fully integrated construction experience. In addition, our engineering teams are providing solutions and ensuring innovation across the wider ZURU Group (Toys/Edge/Tech).

Name: M I R A CONSTRUCTION L.L.C
Description:
MIRA Construction: Building Dubai’s Future with Confidence and Style

In the heart of a rapidly growing metropolis, where architecture speaks the language of luxury and innovation, MIRA Construction holds a special place. Founded on strong principles of quality, responsibility, and bold vision, MIRA has become a symbol of modern construction in Dubai.

 Who We Are
MIRA Construction is not just a construction company — it is a team of passionate professionals dedicated to creating spaces that inspire. We specialise in residential projects, bringing to life ideas of any scale — from elegant villas to  skyscrapers.

What Sets Us Apart

Uncompromising Quality: Every detail in MIRA’s projects reflects precision, thoughtful design, and high standards of execution.

Advanced Technology: We use cutting-edge BIM systems, sustainable materials, and smart construction solutions.

Client-Centric Approach: Every project begins with the client’s vision — and is complete only when the result exceeds expectations.

Eco-Conscious and Sustainable: Our developments blend seamlessly into the urban landscape while meeting environmental standards and thinking of tomorrow.

Our Mission
To create architecture that remains relevant and remarkable for decades to come. MIRA doesn't just build structures — we shape the identity of the new Dubai, where innovation, elegance, and comfort unite.

MIRA Construction — a name trusted by many, a foundation on which the future is being built.

Name: ALEC
Description: ALEC, the construction arm of ALEC Holdings, is recognized for construction excellence, with a reputation built on innovation, quality, and reliability. From groundbreaking infrastructure to iconic landmarks, our team delivers each project with expertise and dedication. With a strong commitment to sustainability and a proven track record, ALEC remains a trusted partner for complex builds, providing solutions that consistently exceed client expectations.

Name: McNab
Description:
McNab is one of the largest Construction, Development and Property groups in Australia, with turnover now exceeding $1bn each year. Despite our growth and size, we've never lost our small company DNA - which centres around genuine care for our staff, customers and all our stakeholders. Success for us isn't about awards or growth, it's when we deliver so well that our customers are proud to wear a McNab T-Shirt on weekends!

We genuinely care. We make it easy. We deliver certainty. This is our promise - to our clients, and everyone we deal with. Delivering on these three things really, really well is what drives us at McNab. Everything we do, from recruiting and training to performance and promotion, centres around this promise. 
 
We leverage the entire McNab Group to deliver certainty for our clients at a time of unprecedented uncertainty in the industry. And our approach works. From delivering our own property developments, to manufacturing our own building products, and a plethora of aligned business, your career at McNab goes well beyond traditional construction roles.

Name: RIMOND
Description:
We are an Engineering, Construction, and Technology company that builds challenging landmark projects globally, through distinctive and forward-thinking processes.

Bringing together international professionals with a forward-looking vision, the company provides extensive interdisciplinary expertise, enabling excellence across multiple sectors and markets. Through an integrated approach, RIMOND ensures exceptional and sustainable results at every stage of a project: from design and engineering to construction and operational management, with particular expertise in highly complex designs.

Name: wienerberger
Description:
wienerberger is one of the leading providers of innovative, ecological solutions for the entire building envelope, in the fields of new build and renovation, as well as infrastructure in water and energy management. With more than 20,000 employees worldwide, wienerberger's solutions enable energy-efficient, healthy, climate-friendly and affordable living. 

Since 1819, we have been improving people's lives. With over 200 production sites in 28 countries, wienerberger is the world’s largest producer of bricks and the market leader in clay roof tiles in Europe as well as concrete pavers in Eastern Europe. In pipe systems, the company is one of the leading suppliers in Europe and a leading supplier of facade products in North America. At the beginning of 2024, wienerberger successfully completed the acquisition of Terreal, becoming the leading European provider of innovative all-in roofing and solar solutions, as well as solutions for the entire building envelope in Europe and North America. 

Innovation, Operational Excellence, as well as M&A and Portfolio Optimization are the most important pillars of wienerberger’s sustainable growth.

In our core markets, Europe and North America, we are continuously expanding our main segments: new construction, renovation, and infrastructure.

Total revenues in 2024 € 4.5 billion
Operating EBITDA € 760 million

More on Career at wienerberger: https://www.wienerberger.com/en/career.html 
Privacy Policy of Wienerberger AG: https://www.wienerberger.com/en/info/privacy-policy.html
Imprint of Wienerberger AG: https://www.wienerberger.com/en/info/Imprint.html

Name: ABU ALNAGA CONTRACTING
Description:
Abu Alnaga Contracting is a trusted name in construction and contracting, recognized for delivering projects with uncompromising quality and professionalism. We specialize in building construction, infrastructure development, and engineering works, offering fully integrated solutions tailored to client needs.

Supported by technical expertise, strong project management, and a commitment to safety and excellence, we consistently deliver projects on time and within scope. Our mission is to build durable structures, lasting relationships, and a solid reputation that supports the UAE’s growing landscape.

Name: Renewal by Andersen
Description:
Renewal by Andersen is the full-service window and door replacement division of Andersen Corporation, a trusted name in quality and innovation for over 120 years. Since opening our first store in Minnesota in 1995, we’ve expanded to over 100 markets across the U.S., becoming one of the largest replacement window companies in the country.

What sets us apart? Our people. We’re a network of #DifferenceMakers dedicated to improving the lives of our homeowners, team members, families and communities. At Renewal by Andersen, we’re driven by a commitment to exceptional service and creating meaningful opportunities.

Ready to make an impact with us? Discover your future at Renewal by Andersen: www.renewalbyandersen.com/careers

Name: ASSA ABLOY Brasil
Description:
O Grupo ASSA ABLOY é líder mundial na fabricação e fornecimento de soluções completas para controle de acesso e segurança, e dedica-se à satisfação das necessidades dos usuários em segurança, bem-estar, conveniência e estilo.

Com um portfólio completo e diversificado a ASSA ABLOY Brasil disponibiliza através das suas sete marcas La Fonte, Yale, Papaiz, Portas Especiais, Silvana, Udinese, Controle de Acesso, Papaiz Segurança Eletrônica e Control ID produtos que atendem às necessidades de diferentes canais de negócio. 

São soluções completas para sistemas de segurança de portas em projetos residenciais, comerciais, industriais e institucionais, tais como, fechaduras mecânicas, elétricas, biométricas e digitais, cofres digitais, maçanetas, barras antipânico, dobradiças, molas, cilindros, acessórios e cadeados. 

Venha para o mundo ASSA ABLOY e surpreenda-se com um portfólio de soluções completas de segurança.

Name: BuildingandInteriors
Description: BuildingandInteriors, started in 2015, is an online-only magazine that aims to help its readers with latest information on Indian building products market and enables them to take informed purchase decisions. It also helps users fulfill their product requirements by connecting them directly with manufacturers, thus helping them get the best product range, prices and services across product categories. Besides, it benefits users by presenting business opportunities available in the Indian market. Architects, interior designers, consultants, builders, developers, institutional buyers and channel partners will find the information published on https://www.buildingandinteriors.com useful for their day-to-day business needs. Together with it's sister-publication https://www.mepjournal.com, https://www.buildingandinteriors.com completes the building products and solutions ecosystem for the users.

Name: Interarch Building Solutions Limited
Description:
Interarch Building Solutions Limited commenced its operations in 1983 and pioneered the high-end metal interior products market in India. Today, 40 years later, Interarch is a leading turnkey Pre- Engineered Metal Construction Solution provider in India with integrated facilities for design & engineering, manufacturing, supply and project execution capabilities for pre-engineered metal buildings.

Interarch has been the first mover in India, right from metal ceilings, to blinds, metal roofing to pre-engineered buildings. Interarch has a manufacturing capacity of more than 1,61,000 MT per annum of steel building structures and over 40,000 MT per annum for its Tracdek Roof & Wall systems. Interarch has 5 manufacturing facilities located at Pantnagar and Kichha in Uttarakhand, Sriperumbudur in Tamil Nadu and Athivaram in Andhra Pradesh.

Interarch has a pan India network of regional offices in all major cities with its central marketing operations handled from Noida. Interarch holds a significant part of market share in the Indian metal construction segment. We have worked with companies like HUL, IndoSpace, JSW, Grasim, TATA, Godrej & Boyce, Asian Paints, LOGOS, ESR, MG Motors, Kia Motors, ITC, CEAT, PepsiCo, Parle, Carlsberg, etc. 
Interarch pre-engineered buildings are designed keeping in mind various applications required for Industrial, Infrastructure, Commercial & residential facilities.

Name: Opus Construtech
Description:
Somos a maior indústria de construções modulares do Brasil. Com inovação, automação e robótica, potencializamos a jornada de fabricação de módulos isotérmicos habitáveis, seguindo as melhores práticas da Indústria 4.0.

Entregamos múltiplas possibilidades de ambientes inteligentes, seguros e sustentáveis para organizações de todo o Brasil.
 
Somos mais de 800 colaboradores em 6 unidades: Núcleo Industrial em Betim/MG, Escritório Central em Nova Lima/MG, Unidade Operacional em Canaã dos Carajás/PA e Centros de Montagem em Parauapebas/PA, Serra/ES e São Luís/MA.
 
Nossa missão é revolucionar a construção com a industrialização para um futuro sustentável. Nossa visão é ser a referência global em edificações modulares fabricadas em uma Indústria 4.0 best in class, unindo inovação e sustentabilidade, para moldar o futuro do espaço habitável. E nossos valores são Paixão pelo Cliente, Inovação que inspira, Agilidade e Autenticidade e Empatia.
 
Opus é a inovação sustentável da indústria de construções modulares.

Name: Focchi Group
Description:
"Opportunity, evolution and innovation”, this is the formula of the Focchi family, in the service of architecture since 1914.

Specialised in project management, from design to manufacturing and on-site installation, we design bespoke façade solutions that are unique for every building. Our artisanal soul combines craft and attention to detail, despite the industrial character of our company.

Name: City Gate Group of Companies
Description:
Founded in 2007, City Gate Group of Companies has built a strong legacy with over 18 years of excellence in the construction and engineering industry. Based in the United Arab Emirates, we are a trusted leader delivering advanced capabilities across:

Large Commercial & Industrial Building Construction

Steel Structures & Fabrication

Pre-Engineered Building (PEB) Systems

MEP Services

Trading & Supply Solutions

For nearly two decades, we have powered residential, commercial, and industrial growth by providing world-class solutions to clients across the UAE, GCC, and international markets.

With a strong focus on performance, quality, and precision, we bring innovation, reliability, and engineering expertise to every project we deliver — shaping the future of modern infrastructure.
Location: Umm Al Quwain, United Arab Emirates

Description:
We are part of Permasteelisa Group – the leading international façade specialist that has been shaping city skylines worldwide for generations.

Our mission is to offer end-to-end delivery of façade solutions that embody innovation, sustainability and safety, shape urban skylines, and set new standards for excellence.

Name: ABN Group
Description:
At ABN Group, we deliver the dream of home ownership. Established in Perth in 1978, the ABN Group is Australia’s leading construction, property and finance company.

As a national group, we operate over 20 businesses including new home design and construction, commercial construction, land development, mortgage broking, conveyancing, plumbing, concreting, roofing, ceiling and wall fixing, and cabinet making.

A lot has changed over the decades, but our passion for building, our relentless commitment to quality, our uncompromising drive to lead through excellence, our sense of fun and our desire to give back to the community have remained the same.

It’s these qualities that have driven us to become leaders in the Australian residential building market.

What makes us an employer of choice?
- We work with 1,900+ employees and 3,000+ subcontractors throughout Western Australia & Victoria. 
- We invest in the future by training more construction apprentices than any other Australian builder.
- We deliver on promise and have built over 90,000 homes since 1978, including first homes, apartments, units and luxury homes.
- We make home finance accessible and have helped over 40,000 people access affordable finance solutions through Resolve Finance.

Visit www.abngroup.com.au to learn more about us.

Name: Radial | راديال
Description: Radial Company has aimed to provide quality construction services for the governmental and private sector projects. Excellence in investment on the manpower, application of the most advanced systems along with being partners with international firms give us a credit of hunting the qualified staff for the projects management and execution.

Name: Alkholi Group (AKG)
Description:
For over five decades, Alkholi Group has been more than a business—it’s been a driver of transformation. 

Founded in 1971 by Dr. Hamza Alkholi, the Group has grown from a construction powerhouse into a multi-industry leader investing in sectors that shape economies and accelerate Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030.

With a legacy of engineering excellence and a future powered by innovation, Alkholi Group operates across:
 Construction & MEP.
 Real Estate & Facility Management.
 Elevators, Smart Parking & Low Voltage.
 Smart Intralogistics, Warehouse Solutions & Trading.

But our impact extends beyond borders. Through global investments in Real Estate, Telecom, Petrochemicals, Healthcare, Insurance, Aviation, and Manufacturing—we bridge industries, fuel innovation, and unlock sustainable growth.

Our entities reflect our DNA of precision, innovation, and reliability:

 SBTMC – Leading EPC & facility management expert.
 United Projects – Specialists in advanced MEP solutions.
 AKTEK – Pioneering MEP modular prefabrication factory in Saudi Arabia.
 BTECO – Innovating vertical mobility & smart parking systems.
 HAKTCO – Leaders in low voltage, intralogistics & warehousing.
 AMOS – Trusted name in facilities maintenance across the Kingdom.

At Alkholi Group, progress is a commitment. Through strategic expansion and alignment with Vision 2030, we continue to invest in industries that elevate standards and shape the Kingdom’s future.

Let’s build what’s next—together.

⇒ For business inquiries and collaborations, please feel free to connect us at: 

info@alkholi.com 
sales@alkholi.com

Name: Schueco India
Description: Schueco in India brings over 70 years of international experience in aluminium windows, doors and façades. Schueco India has partnered with chosen local fabricators across India. The company has offices and exclusive showrooms in Delhi, Mumbai, Hyderabad, and Bangalore.

Name: MF GROUP
Description:
MF Group was established with the aim of specializing in the global hospitality and luxury interior residential design sector committed to delivering high-quality project and innovative design solutions that provide functional and inspiring fit out built spaces.

We’ve become an interdisciplinary firm by expanding our team beyond architects and interior designers to include contracting and fabrication. Our tradition of dedication, professionalism, and outstanding customer service is a testament to that mission as we strive each day for excellence in bringing our valued client’s ideas to life.

We are a group based in Dubai, UAE and today, we are glad to introduce ourselves as one of the leading design and build in corporation of MF Architects, MF Interior, MF Contract and MF Fabrica.

Name: Technical Xperts Group (TXG)
Description:
A company can seize extraordinary opportunities only if it is magnificent from the ordinary operations. 

– Marcel Telles

Work is more than a job at Technical Xperts Group; it's a calling: to construct. To create. To program. To consult. To think like a client and to inspire them. To establish marketplaces. To create something new. To work together Not only to get better at anything but to try something you never believed were possible. To help address some of the world's most difficult challenges by leading in this new era of engineering, design, communication, and management. We strive to provide technically excellent and innovative solutions that add value to all project stakeholders, as well as to operate globally as a professional engineering team and to become a globally recognized engineering outsource organization by utilizing high-caliber engineering professionals and providing state-of-the-art technology to the construction and software industries. continents.

Name: Metaguise

Leading & establishing benchmark in the industry with a keen eye and deeper perspectives for fabrication and installation of premium quality metal facades & blue-ribbon services. Metaguise captures every nuance of the dream design, thereby giving character to the building.

Name: Pacific Energy Contracting Limited
Description:
Pacific Energy Contracting is Papua New Guinea’s leading trade services provider. Established in 2013, Pacific Energy Contracting began its journey providing energy auditing and energy efficiency services for commercial buildings. 

Clients across Papua New Guinea rely on us for every aspect of residential, commercial, and light industrial contracting—from essential repairs and
upgrades to new service installations and complete turnkey projects with ongoing maintenance. 

With a dedicated team and established in-country operations, Pacific Energy Contracting has proven capability and an exemplary track record of working 
closely with clients to identify and deliver trade services solutions that support their operational objectives and project mandates. 

We take pride in our work and are committed to meeting our client’s expectations. We believe this is key to building long-standing relationships which allows us to be a driving force in the advancement of Papua New Guinea and the broader Pacific region.

Our Capabilities - Pacific Energy Contracting can be called upon to deliver trade services for new and existing residential, commercial and industrial buildings and facilities. Services include Energy & electrical, Construction Services, Equipment Hire & Operation, Air-Conditioning, Fire Protection, and Plumbing.

Name: Manifest Services
Description:
Manifest is the leading company in building services, covering the full range of needs for Construction, Facilities Management and Energy Services. Being a leader in the field, the company has been active since 2003 with an exclusive orientation towards the management of large-scale, high-performance facilities.

Our Goal is Excellence 
We believe that we are the best in our industry, and we are constantly proving it. From 2015 until today, we have been honored with 32 awards for the quality of our services, for the management of our human resources, for the innovative services to the tourism industry, and for the service of our customers. 

Our Vision and Values
With non-negotiable values, a client-centric approach, our employees’ ongoing development, support, and enhancement, and the use of the best internationally accepted practices, we aim both to make further progress in our business activity and to maintain our leadership position in our field.

Name: Paynter Dixon
Description:
Paynter Dixon | Designing and Delivering with Certainty Since 1914

Family owned and operated for over a century, Paynter Dixon is a trusted name in design and construction - proudly delivering tailored property solutions across the education, health, aged care, commercial, hospitality, industrial, insurance and remedial sectors.

We offer a complete end-to-end service - from concept and design through to construction and post-delivery support, all underpinned by collaborative partnerships, deep industry knowledge, and a commitment to building spaces that serve communities, businesses and futures.

Specialising in live environments and complex, multi-staged projects, we’re known for delivering with precision, care and certainty, time and again.

Name: CFL Inc.
Description:
Acreditamos que o mercado imobiliário é uma força transformadora que modela as cidades. A busca constante em contribuir ativamente para agregar valor aos bairros em que estamos presente é o que nos move. Olhar em direção às necessidades das regiões em que atuamos, ter uma visão para o entorno e gerar gentilizas urbanas são fundamentais para a perpetuação de valor de nossos empreendimentos.
Compreender todas essas mudanças proporcionadas pelo mercado imobiliário faz com que nossa equipe projete cada empreendimento de forma única, seja pela arquitetura autoral, presente no DNA da companhia, ou por parcerias bem sucedidas com renomados escritórios de arquitetura, e pautados pela inovação, tecnologia e sustentabilidade.

MISSÃO
Proporcionar empreendimentos de excelência e de alto valor agregado aos nossos clientes, melhorando o conceito de viver e contribuindo positivamente com a transformação das cidades.

VISÃO
Ser referência no mercado imobiliário de alto padrão na Região Sul do país, construindo soluções exclusivas para o segmento.

PRINCÍPIOS
Transparência: Acreditamos que a ética seja a base do nosso negócio. Por isso, somos comprometidos e priorizamos as relações de longo prazo.
Excelência: Somos ousados na proposta de valor e desenvolvimento dos nossos produtos. Somos atentos aos detalhes, respeitando a tradição e sua história, mas com um olhar direcionado ao futuro e a inovação.
Arquitetura e Design: Nos preocupamos com a estética, com o uso e a funcionalidade. Desenvolvemos empreendimentos que geram valor a todos os stakeholders, acionistas, clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores. Valorizamos as gentilezas urbanas, a sustentabilidade de nossos projetos, o entorno e a região onde atuamos.
Foco em resultados: Somos movidos pela realização. Buscamos transformar desafios em oportunidades, somos direcionados a resultados e possuímos um DNA voltado a visão de dono. Possuímos em nossa proposta de valor o conservadorismo financeiro.

Name: March Construction
Description:
March Associates Construction is a family‑owned commercial general contractor and construction management firm. We build ground‑up commercial real estate projects of $20M+ in New York City, New York, and New Jersey and are listed among ENR’s Top 400 Contractors Nationwide. Our focus is multifamily, mixed‑use, industrial, office, and other income‑producing CRE buildings, not small renovations or basic interior fit‑outs. We are built for large developments, additions, and expansions.

Developers and owners hire us when they need a turnkey GC/CM partner who understands the pro‑forma and treats each project like an investment. We manage complex urban projects from pre‑construction through TCO, working with developers, architects, engineers, and lenders under CM‑at‑risk, GMP, and design‑build structures to keep jobs on time, on budget, and financeable.

We have delivered more than $8.5 billion in commercial projects. Clients stay with us because our communication is clear and proactive. President Lou March and Vice President Todd Laubach are always reachable, and our 80+ person team coordinates with design teams and local officials so there are no surprises. Safety and quality matter on every site; we run a strong safety program so work is done correctly and in line with all rules.

We are known for value engineering and constructability. When we join early in pre‑construction, we help set smart budgets, lock in competitive material pricing, and plan the schedule. Our goal: cut hard costs and reduce schedule risk without hurting lease‑up, rent, or exit value, helping protect IRR and carry cost.

Core services: ground‑up commercial construction for large CRE projects; construction management and general contracting for developers and institutional owners; design‑build; additions and expansions to existing commercial buildings; and pre‑construction, budgeting, scheduling, and value engineering focused on developer economics.

Name: MEP 2040 Commitment
Description:
MEP 2040 is a movement to radically reduce total carbon emissions associated with building systems through collective action.

The original MEP 2040 Challenge from the Carbon Leadership Forum: “All systems engineers shall advocate for and achieve net zero carbon in their projects: operational carbon by 2030 and embodied carbon by 2040.”

The Carbon Leadership Forum issued the Challenge in the fall of 2021. A group of leaders from MEP firms responded to the Challenge and collectively established a Commitment for you to join. Moving forward, this group of leaders will be responsible for convening signatories around a common goal.

The MEP 2040 Commitment:
* Establish a company plan
* Request low-GWP refrigerants
* Request EPDs
* Participate in Forums

Name: Architectural Membrane Association - AMA
Description:
The Architectural Membrane Association (AMA), founded on 15th of March 2016 in Dessau, is a neutral platform of the membrane construction industry following the common aim to broaden the market of Architectural Membrane Constructions by spreading information, strengthening and securing quality and thus increasing the confidence in the construction method. AMA safeguards and promotes the technical, economic and social interests of its international members in the field of building with membranes in the architectural context.

The common interest of the members of AMA lies in the promotion of construction with membranes, as well as the representation of interests of the members vis-à-vis authorities, associations and other organizations. The common interests specifically include the quality improvement and assurance, in order to create trust vis-à-vis third parties and the structuring and implementation of public relations work, provision of supporting advertising media and other appropriate measures for this (image, information, doctrines, training). 

The association promotes fair competition and combats any type of unfair competition, as well as other deficiencies and detrimental aberrations in business practice. It neither has the character of a commercial enterprise nor can it control the business activity of its members. The association does not pursue any political or religious goals.

BIMWize is a GTA based BIM Consultancy offering services for AECOO around the globe. BIMWize was founded in 2019 with an aim to bridge the gap between availability of technology and the adoption process . We provide training and Consulting on various BIM services like BIM Management, Content Creation, Software Training and Project BIM Support . We help companies leverage the BIM process by creating Custom BIM workflows and Project-specific BIM services.

**VISION**
Making Technology adoption in AEC simple  and achievable for everyone, irrespective of its size or projects.


**MISSION**
To create and promote Research Based BIM Solutions that work for our clients. We want to simplify the process of BIM adoption and implementation.

Name: CircleWood
Description:
CIRCLEWOOD bestaat uit een ecosysteem van innovatieve engineers, architecten, makers, denkers en kennispartners.

Samen hebben zij de HoutKern Bouwmethode ontwikkeld die voor het eerst is toegepast in The Natural Pavilion op de Floriade Expo 2022 en wordt nu toegepast op meerdere gebouwtypen.De innovatieve methode heeft meerdere nominaties en prijzen gewonnen. 

Binnen het ecosysteem werken verschillende gelijkgestemde bedrijven intensief samen. Het consortium is zorgvuldig samengesteld uit partners vanuit de gehele bouwketen. Al het werk van onze engineers en adviseurs is direct gekoppeld aan de maakprocessen in de fabriek. Opgedane ervaring wordt actief met elkaar gedeeld. Binnen dit ecosysteem hebben we elkaar nodig, zoals een boom afhankelijk is van licht, water en de bodem.

Daarbij streeft CIRCLEWOOD naar een maximale impact voor de samenleving om ons heen: wanneer het de boom goed gaat, profiteert het hele bos. Met elkaar zorgen we voor een leefomgeving die toekomstbestendig is en rekening houdt met flora, fauna en de mens.

Onderdeel van het CIRCLEWOOD ecosysteem zijn:

Oosterhoff
Heko Spanten
Lomans
DWA
Hedgehog Company
TNO is betrokken als onafhankelijke kennis- en ontwikkelpartner. David Gianotten van OMA is de creative director van Schools by CircleWood.

Name: INTEC Suomi
Description:
Rakentamisen asiantuntijapalvelut - ideasta toteutukseen.

Olemme monialainen asiantuntijayhteisö, joka toimii rakentamisen ja kiinteistöjen parissa käytännönläheisesti, suoraan ja asiakkaan puolella. Tiimistämme löytyy asentajataustaisia insinöörejä, kokeneita suunnittelijoita ja projektinjohtajia, jotka tietävät mitä kentällä tapahtuu - ja osaavat tehdä siitä toteutuskelpoisen suunnitelman.

INTEC Suomi on osa pohjoismaista Instalco-konsernia, mutta toimii paikallisesti ja suomalaisin arvoin. Yhdistämme suuren verkoston osaamisen ja pienen tiimin ketteryyden. Meille tärkeintä on, että asiakkaalla on helppo olla ja hommat hoituvat.

Name: Acme Block & Brick, Inc.
Description:
Founded in the late 1890s by the Solomon Family, ACME Block & Brick, Inc. began as ACME Block and Tile Company. The Solomon’s ran the business up until 1942, when an entrepreneur, A.J. Rivers, Sr., bought the company.

The company was originally designed to service the Roane County area but as of today, it has grown to cover a large area. ACME Block & Brick now serves Southern Kentucky throughout middle and eastern Tennessee and into northern Georgia. ACME is headquartered in Kingston, TN to provide a central location to operate an ever-growing block and brick business.

Today ACME Block and Brick is still owned and managed by the Rivers family. The product line that was once dedicated to the production of only top-quality concrete blocks has expanded through the years into a full-blown masonry and hardscapes superstore. ACME supplies everyone from the architect designing the project to the weekend do-it-yourselfer.

ACME Block & Brick, Inc. is a company based on the highest standards of quality and committed to delivering the best possible service. As we continue to grow and expand, we will always remain with the tradition that this company was built on.

Name: Artha Construções e Participações
Description:
Sobre nós

Executamos nossas construções visando a constante melhoria da qualidade, objetivando atender aos requisitos, expectativas e satisfação de nossos clientes e parceiros.

Nossa equipe qualificada e especializada atua com constante aprimoramento e controle nos processos de Gestão da Qualidade e trabalhamos comprometidos com a sustentabilidade nos canteiros de obra, bem como pela saúde e segurança de nossos colaboradores.

Name: M Work Holdings LTD.
Description:
MWork Holdings Ltd. is a Greater Vancouver-based company specializing in designing, building, and supplying high-quality construction solutions. We help property owners and tenants enhance the value and functionality of their spaces through tailored construction, renovation, and development projects.

Our experienced team delivers exceptional craftsmanship and innovative solutions, handling everything from project design to installation. We also provide advanced building equipment, including HVAC systems, lighting, building automation, and energy management, to optimize performance and reduce environmental impact.

At MWork, sustainability and efficiency are at the heart of what we do. We’re committed to creating spaces that balance functionality with aesthetics, meeting the needs of both property owners and tenants. 

Whether it’s upgrading existing systems or starting a new build, MWork is your partner for reliable, innovative solutions. With a focus on precision and client satisfaction, we help you build better, smarter, and more sustainable spaces.

Name: SIMDEV
Description:
SIMDEV specializes in the design and realization of large real estate projects that transform the urban landscape of the province. We envision and create innovative and integrated living environments, offering our residents an exceptional quality of life.

Notably recognized for its expertise in residential development, SIMDEV's initiatives seamlessly blend spaces for living, working, and leisure.

Name: Aluminum Engineering Co. (ALENG)
Description:
Aluminum Engineering Company (ALENG) is a Saudi industrial establishment specialized in manufacturing integrated aluminum solutions. Founded in 2007, it is located in the Second Industrial City in Dammam, covering an area of over 5,000 square meters. The company manages several showrooms in the Eastern Province to provide direct services to customers.

We take pride in a team of more than 100 engineers and technicians, and we rely on the latest precise European machines for cutting, milling, and assembly in our operations.

We specialize in the execution of glass façades, windows, doors, skylights, interior partitions, shutter systems, and all integrated aluminum solutions, adhering to the highest quality standards and using Italian-certified accessories.

We always strive to deliver a comprehensive experience that includes after-sales services to ensure customer satisfaction and continuous performance.
Aluminum Engineering Co's 5000 sq ft area is fully equipped with the latest technology and machines and other sophisticated tooling machinery. We are capable of executing and completing any major project on time with the help of our highly qualified, skilled engineers, managers, and supervisors, who are trained to the highest international standards.

We have executed and completed numerous residential tower buildings, hotels and resorts, shopping malls, commercial buildings, banks, showrooms, luxury villas, warehouses, and more while guaranteeing all works.

We always strive to provide the best business at the best price and hope that the business between us will continue in the long term.
We are partners in success and progress.

Name: PIPAS - Engenharia & Construção
Description:
A Pipas é uma empresa de engenharia e construção com raízes fortes. Herdou o nome do avô do seu fundador, carinhosamente tratado como “Pipas”.

A Pipas apresenta uma abordagem mais moderna e ambiciosa ao mundo da construção, caracterizada pela qualidade de produtos, processos e serviços, bem como pela confiança e valor que agrega à relação com os seus clientes e parceiros.

Focados num crescimento sustentável e firme, temos como missão conceber e construir com qualidade, rigor e proximidade. Criamos obras que respeitam o projeto, os prazos e quem as vai rentabilizar e usufruir.

Name: Optimise Design Works Ltd
Description:
Optimise Design Works Ltd is 100% nationally owned firm that provides comprehensive design and construction services for residential, commercial and the industrial projects.
The company has a team of architects, designers, engineers, and construction professionals who work collaboratively to deliver high- quality projects that meet the client’s needs and exceed their expectations.
The company takes customer- centric approach and works closely with the client to understand their vision, budget, and timeline. The company’s services include conceptual design, 3D modelling, construction documentation, project management, and construction.
The company is committed to sustainability and incorporates eco- friendly practices and materials into its design whenever possible. Overall the company is dedicated to delivering exceptional design and construction services that result in beautiful and functional spaces that enhance the client’s quality of life or business operations.

Name: INAB-Infrastruktur i Umeå AB
Description:
Infrastruktur i Umeå AB, INAB, är ett kommunägt bolag med uppgiften att främja, förvalta och utveckla infrastruktur i Umeå kommun. Vi genomför kommunens större och komplexa infrastrukturprojekt och skapar effektiva och långsiktigt hållbara logistik- och transportlösningar.

Vi ansvarar för kommunens järnvägsanläggningar och samarbetar med övriga bolag i koncernen samt verksamheter inom kommunen.

Vi erbjuder tjänster inom projektledning, strategisk analys, hållbarhet, förvaltning av fastigheter och järnvägsanläggningar samt kommunikation. Våra projekt spänner ofta över flera år och slutprodukternas levnadslängd sträcker sig långt in i framtiden. Därför är vi kunniga inom hållbar och långsiktig strategisk planering och samordning.

Idag är vi 15 engagerade medarbetare som sitter i nya kontor på Umestans företagspark. Vi har expertis och lång erfarenhet inom flera logistikområden – inte minst inom järnväg och sjöfart. Något som bland annat medfört att vi företräder kommunen i just järnvägs- och sjöfartsfrågor och ansvarar för att marknadsföra och positionera Umeå som det naturliga logistiska navet i regionen. 

Vår vision
Vi vill vara en internationell förebild när det gäller socialt, ekonomiskt och ekologiskt hållbar och samhällsekonomiskt lönsam infrastruktur- och logistikutveckling. Detta samtidigt som vi bygger infrastruktur som är till gagn för både invånare och besökare i Umeå Kommun och i hela Region Västerbotten.

Vår mission
Tillsammans med kunder och partners möjliggör vi regionens hållbara tillväxt genom att utveckla konkurrenskraftiga infrastrukturlösningar och logistikflöden.

Information om hur vi behandlar dina personuppgifter finns på inab.umea.se/personuppgifter

Vi strävar efter en trevlig, öppen och inspirerande dialog i de sociala plattformar vi verkar på. Vi tolererar därför inga typer av kränkningar, hot, trakasserier eller ämnen som avviker från sammanhanget. Denna typ av inlägg kommer plockas bort.

Name: Torreilles Construction Bois
Description:
Chez Torreilles Construction Bois, nous transformons vos projets de structures en bois en réalité depuis plus de 10 ans. Notre aventure familiale, dirigée par quatre frères passionnés, s’appuie sur une expertise solide dans le secteur du bois, offrant des solutions de construction industrielle durables et innovantes.

𝗜𝗺𝗽𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘁é𝘀 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝘀 𝗹𝗲 𝗚𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗘𝘀𝘁, 𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝗳𝘀 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝘀 𝘁𝗼𝘂𝘁𝗲 𝗹𝗮 𝗙𝗿𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲

Que vous soyez une entreprise avec un projet d’extension de locaux industriels, un architecte à la recherche de partenaires fiables, ou un promoteur immobilier ambitieux, nous avons les compétences et les ressources pour réaliser vos projets. Nos équipements de pointe et notre équipe de projeteurs qualifiés nous permettent de gérer votre construction de A à Z, garantissant un suivi personnalisé à chaque étape.

𝗡𝗼𝘀 𝘃𝗮𝗹𝗲𝘂𝗿𝘀, 𝘃𝗼𝘁𝗿𝗲 𝗴𝗮𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗲 𝗱𝗲 𝗾𝘂𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘁é :

 𝗗𝘂𝗿𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁é : En utilisant le bois, un matériau renouvelable, nous nous engageons pour des constructions respectueuses de l'environnement, conformes aux exigences de la RT2020.

 𝗙𝗶𝗮𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁é : La confiance est la pierre angulaire de nos relations avec nos clients B2B. Nous construisons des partenariats solides basés sur l'efficacité et la transparence.

 𝗙𝗹𝗲𝘅𝗶𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁é : Chaque projet est unique. Nous nous adaptons à vos besoins spécifiques, qu'il s'agisse de projets industriels ou commerciaux.

 𝗘𝘅𝗰𝗲𝗹𝗹𝗲𝗻𝗰𝗲 : Notre engagement envers la qualité se reflète dans chaque détail de nos constructions. Nous assurons un suivi rigoureux pour garantir votre satisfaction.

 𝗠𝗼𝗯𝗶𝗹𝗶𝘁é : Nous intervenons partout en France, pour être au plus près de vos projets.

 𝗩𝗼𝘂𝘀 ê𝘁𝗲𝘀 𝘂𝗻 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗳𝗲𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗹, 𝘂𝗻 𝗮𝗿𝗰𝗵𝗶𝘁𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲, 𝘂𝗻 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗺𝗼𝘁𝗲𝘂𝗿 ?

Contactez notre équipe pour passer à la structure bois pour votre futur projet.

Name: WISE Building Technologies

WISE Building Technologies – Securing the Future, One Building at a Time

 Let’s discuss your project today!  Email: info@wisebt.com

Name: HMP. maître d’œuvre
Description:
Construction, rénovation, extension, surélévation : quel que soit votre projet, nous prenons le temps de le définir ensemble. 

Nous étudions vos demandes, vos souhaits, vos rêves, afin de dessiner et de vous présenter un projet réalisable, à la mesure de votre budget, qui se distinguera par sa singularité. Nous vous proposons des choix techniques pour interpréter vos aspirations, avec un sens du détail, de la nuance, qui donnera toute son originalité au projet final. 

Nous sommes présents pour vous accompagner durant la réalisation de ce projet, du début à la fin, aussi bien administrativement que sur le terrain. Nous sommes votre interlocuteur unique, celui présent pour donner le tempo du chantier, respecter les plannings, coordonner les différents corps de métier, trouver des solutions quand il le faut. Et ce, en vous tenant quotidiennement au courant de l’avancée de votre projet, jusqu’à la remise des clés. 

Nous défendons une approche durable du métier, vis-à-vis de l’impact environnemental des projets mais aussi de son impact sociétal. Respect de l’existant, proposition de conception durable, recherche de matériaux innovants : nous vous proposerons différentes solutions, dans la mesure de votre budget. Nous soutenons également une vision respectueuse de la relation avec nos artisans partenaires, des experts dans leur métier avec lesquels nous collaborons en toute confiance.

La CGTC se veut parmi les entreprises de BTP les plus modernes, innovante et compétitive sur le territoire marocain  pouvant exporter son savoir faire et son expérience.

Name: EMJ Construction inc.
Description:
EMJ Construction inc. œuvre à titre d’entrepreneur général dans le domaine de la construction. Grâce à son équipe passionnée, multidisciplinaire et proactive, l’entreprise réalise des projets de constructions et de rénovation dans les secteurs institutionnels et commerciaux. Guidée par ses dirigeants, EMJ Construction inc. cumule plus de 50 années d’expérience dans le domaine. Dotée de professionnels qualifiés et ayant une structure bien établie, l’équipe de EMJ se démarque grâce à ses nombreux champs d’expertise. Se faisant un devoir d’offrir un service complet à ses clients, l’entreprise possède également un département de services prêt à répondre en tout temps aux urgences.

EMJ Construction inc. a pour mission de réaliser tout type de projet selon les différents modes de réalisation offerts dans l’industrie que ce soit des projets forfaitaires, en conception-construction (design build) et en gérance, dans les secteurs corporatifs, privés et publics. L’équipe de EMJ opère selon les plus hauts standards de l’industrie de la construction tout en portant une attention particulière aux détails et à la finition. EMJ Construction inc. a comme valeur fondamentale de travailler en étroite collaboration avec ses clients et les différents intervenants au projet de manière harmonieuse et rigoureuse dans le plus grand respect de l’environnement. 

EMJ Construction inc. met tout en œuvre afin d’offrir un programme de prévention en matière de santé et sécurité qui surpasse les attentes de ses clients et ceux de la CNESST. L’application des mesures du programme est une priorité pour chacun des membres de l’équipe.

Name: Croes Bouwtechnisch Ingenieursbureau

Name: Vishal Trading Company
Description:
Established in 1990, we are a professionally managed company based in Mumbai. We specialise
in the trading and manufacturing of premium interior solutions. Over the years, we have built a

Name: Apex Construction
Description:
Apex Construction is known for its building and remodeling of Quick Service Restaurants (QSRs) and fast food franchises. Its winning recipe is combining rapid-fire speed with transparency and peppering the business relationship with a healthy dose of trust.

The first Northern Nevada build of Panera, for example, was completed in a jaw-dropping four months – 2 full months quicker than in the entire restaurant’s history! For the ground-up construction of a McDonald’s in Fallon, we completed it in a record-setting 68 days. And, for an Arby’s in Fallon, Nevada, construction was completed in just 91 days.

Every team member brings a unique strength to your project. Although virtually every employee has decades of commercial construction experience, they also bring expertise from engineering, residential, tenant improvement, and business operations.

When you contract with us, you get clear communication and collaboration. We don’t let deadlines slide or dodge phone calls; instead, we keep you in the loop so that you understand the status of your project every step of the way.

Name: MAD Ceilings AB
Description:
MAD Ceilings – Where Design Meets Acoustics

MAD Ceilings was founded by Mikael, Andreas, and Dylan—hence the name MAD. After several years of close collaboration between Kornets Akustik and DTS Akustik, we merged our expertise into a company dedicated to creating bespoke ceiling solutions and helping architects bring their visions to life.

Our breakthrough came with the iconic Taverna Brillo, initiating a successful partnership with renowned interior architect Jonas Bohlin. This fruitful collaboration has expanded into celebrated restaurants such as Luzette, The Hills, Sturehof, Stockholms Matmarknad, Aira, and AG’s. More recently, we’ve proudly installed bespoke ceiling solutions at popular venues including Riche Fenix, Tobak, Freja, and Gondolen.

We’re particularly proud of our contribution to Hotel Scandic Haymarket, where we developed a unique ceiling type that has since become highly sought-after within the industry.

MAD Ceilings is the premium partner of Impact Acoustic in Sweden.
Impact Acoustic, based in Switzerland, creates innovative acoustic solutions crafted from recycled PET bottles, combining sustainability, functionality, and exceptional design.

We also proudly represent Acosorb in Sweden.
Acosorb, based in the Netherlands, specializes in seamless acoustic spray ceilings and wall finishes, known for their outstanding acoustic performance, elegant aesthetics, and versatility—perfect for contemporary architectural and interior design projects.

 At MAD Ceilings, we combine innovative craftsmanship with acoustic excellence—and we’re always excited to take on new challenges.

 Are you an architect, interior designer, or developer with a vision?
Let’s connect—we’d love to create something extraordinary together.

Name: Lammin Ikkuna Oy
Description:
Lammin Ikkuna Oy (brändinimi Lammin Ikkunat ja Ovet) on 1969 vuodesta toiminut suomalainen ikkuna- ja ovivalmistaja. Yhtiön tuotevalikoimaan kuuluvat kaikenlaiset rakennusten ulkovaipan ovet ja ikkunat. Työllistämme tällä hetkellä noin 100 henkilöä Lammin ja Kangasniemen tehtailla sekä Espoon myyntinäyttelyssä. Olemme erikoistuneet saneeraustoimintaan, mutta palvelemme myös uudiskohteita suunnittelevia ja rakentavia.

Toimintaamme ohjaavia arvoja ovat asiakaslähtöisyys, suomalaisuus, suoraselkäisyys, tinkimätön laatu ja vastuullisuus. Palvelemme yhtä lailla rakennusliikkeitä, talotehtaita, suunnittelijoita, kuntia, pientaloasujia sekä taloyhtiöitä ympäri Suomen. Lisäksi viemme tuotteita mm. Venäjälle, Ruotsiin, Keski-Eurooppaan ja Yhdysvaltoihin. Lammin Ikkunan asiakkaana:

- Voit luottaa ikkuna- ja ovituotteiden laatuun sekä pitkäikäisyyteen
- Voit räätälöidä juuri sinun tarpeisiisi sopivat tuotteet (mm. koko, väri, lasivalinnat, lisävarusteet)
- Saat kokonaisvaltaisen palvelun suunnittelusta mittaukseen ja toimituksesta asennukseen
- Voit ostaa ikkuna- tai oviremontin rahoituksella (rahoitusyhteityö OP:n kanssa), verkkokaupan kautta, suoraan tehtaalta tai paikallisen myyntiedustajamme kautta
- Saat joustavaa ja aidosti välittävää jälkimarkkinointipalvelua reklamaatiotilanteissa

Lammin Ikkunan tuotekehitys on tuonut markkinoille mm. maailman ensimmäisen ja tutkituimman signaali-ikkunateknologian (Signal Window), jonka toimivuus on testattu yhteistyössä suomalaisten yliopistojen ja tutkimuslaitosten kanssa. Lammin nelilasinen EkoWatti-energiaikkuna on palkittu InnoSuomi-palkinnolla menneinä vuosina. Tuotteidemme suorituskyky mitataan VTT:n kautta (nykyisin Eurofins).

Ota rohkeasti yhteyttä ja kysy lisää!

www.lammin.fi
010 8411 700
myynti@lammin.fi

Name: Civwil
Description:
Civwil Earthworks is a Brisbane-based, third-generation family-owned civil construction company delivering high-quality outcomes across Southeast Queensland. We specialise in bulk earthworks, subdivisions, and industrial infrastructure, focusing on mid-scale projects for clients who value reliability, precision, and long-term performance.

Our reputation is built on quality-first delivery, with a strong emphasis on doing the job right the first time. From greenfield site prep to complex subdivision infrastructure and industrial shed developments, our team brings deep expertise, hands-on experience, and a commitment to excellence across every stage of construction.

A key strength of Civwil is our ownership of a modern, GPS-equipped fleet of civil machinery. This allows us to maintain full control of project timelines, costs, and quality while ensuring our team can respond quickly and efficiently on-site. We don’t just manage projects — we actively deliver them.

Core Services:

Bulk Earthworks & Site Preparation

Subdivisional Civil Works (stormwater, roads, sewer, water)

Industrial Shed & Infrastructure Projects

Stormwater Drainage & Concrete Culverts

Utility Services (Water & Sewer Connections)

Commercial Plumbing & Hydraulic Services

Final Trim & GPS-Controlled Grading

Eco-Conscious Civil Construction

Led by experienced industry professionals, Civwil values client relationships built on trust, performance, and professionalism. We aim to deliver lasting value on every job and take pride in supporting clients through every stage of the construction process — from estimating through to handover.

If you’re looking for a civil contractor with the experience, machinery, and mindset to deliver on high-impact projects, let’s have a conversation.

 estimating@civwil.com.au
 www.civwil.com.au
 Servicing Southeast Queensland

Name: H+R SOCOTEC UK Building Pathology and Heritage
Description:
Independent building professionals and scientists; H+R specialise in investigating problems in buildings, building materials and building occupancy.  H+R provide independent remedial surveying and consultancy services for building owners and occupiers, property managers, developers, builders, architects, surveyors, engineers, insurers and loss adjusters

H+R are the market leaders in Building Pathology and heritage conservation, especially with problems involving damp and decay, and pioneered the use of Rothounds within the UK.  H+R identify the root cause of problems rather than treat the symptoms.  H+R offer clients sustainable solutions that do not rely on damaging interventions or chemical treatments.  By avoiding unnecessary or ineffective work, H+R ensure time and money is saved.  H+R will work with you to preserve original materials and methods of construction where these have architectural or historical significance

H+R carry out minimally invasive investigation, and provide expert independent and environmentally sound advice on cost-effective long-term solutions.  Our work is supported by in-house and external specialists and laboratory services, and can be covered by guarantees or collateral warranties

Name: NEXXTLVL | modulaire houtbouw
Description:
𝗛𝗼𝘂𝘁𝗯𝗼𝘂𝘄 𝗱𝘂𝘂𝗿𝗱𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝗮𝗻 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗲𝗹𝗲 𝗯𝗼𝘂𝘄? 𝗔𝗯𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘂𝘁 𝗻𝗶𝗲𝘁!
Wij zijn 𝗡𝗘𝗫𝗫𝗧𝗟𝗩𝗟, net als ons slimme houtbouwsysteem. Gamechanger in de bouwsector. Wij creëren doordachte en écht betaalbare modulaire prefab woningen van hout, speciaal voor aannemers en bouwende ontwikkelaars.

Of het nu gaat om vrijstaande woningen, rijwoningen, appartementen, flexwoningen, tiny houses, recreatie- of optopwoningen – met ons innovatieve LVL-houtbouwsysteem (Laminated Veneer Lumber) vertalen wij elk woningtype naar een duurzame én betaalbare variant. Daarbij kunnen wij, indien gewenst, ook de volledige installatietechniek, badkamer, keuken en kozijnen zoveel mogelijk in de 2D- of zelfs 3D-bouwelementen integreren.

Natuurlijk valt er genoeg te kiezen: houten of betonnen vloeren, met of zonder prefab installaties, en een breed scala aan gevelbekleding en installatieconcepten. Wij zetten elk kalkzandsteen- of betonnen PMC-concept om in een betaalbare, duurzame en klant specifieke houten woning, zonder concessies te doen op kwaliteit.

Geïnteresseerd in een revolutionair houtbouwsysteem welke doorgaans kostprijs-technisch 10-20% lager ligt dan traditionele bouw? Neem contact met ons op, en wij vertellen je graag meer over ons NEXXTLVL houtbouw concept!

Name: Messam Construction
Description:
Messam Construction, founded in 2003, is a statewide construction firm with offices in Miami, Miramar, Florida - Broward County, South Bay, Florida - Palm Beach County. The firm brings together the elements of general construction and construction management in every project. This offers our clients a firm of seasoned professionals who are leaders in the construction industry.

Our approach is best characterized by a "Partnering Relationship". We dedicate ourselves to turning our client’s designs and construction documents to life. We are committed to sustainable construction practices; that commitment is evidenced by the LEED Accredited Professional designation held by both Wayne Messam, CGC, LEED AP, BD+C & Angela Messam, LEED AP, BD+C, the principals of Messam Construction.

Our client list includes Federal government agencies, school districts, county and municipal governments and many private clients. Messam Construction has also established strategic alliances with many of the country’s largest builders providing them with construction management staff support. Our alliances have contributed and built many iconic projects throughout South Florida.

Messam Construction is currently building and managing over 1 million square feet of construction that is seeking LEED certifications from Platinum, Gold and Silver. If you are in need of highly trained professionals to work on or partner with on your next construction project, Messam Construction is your firm.

Name: Creations Global
Description:
Creations Global is redefining the future of commercial construction by combining decades of precision craftsmanship with modern modular innovation.  With a legacy rooted in designing and manufacturing high-end retail fixtures and branded environments, we’ve evolved into a full-service modular construction partner, driving scalable, efficient, customized and attractive solutions for today’s high-traffic venues.  

From food halls, concessions and QSRs to retail, hospitality and office applications, we create code-compliant modular buildings that are engineered off-site and delivered turnkey - faster, smarter and with less disruption than traditional construction.  

Our background in retail and food & beverage design, gives us a unique advantage: an obsessive attention to detail and brand integrity that carries through every project.  Whether on a theme park midway, an airport concourse, a college campus, train station or shopping center our structures are built to perform…and built to last.  

At Creations, sustainability and efficiency are integral to our process.  By utilizing steel and in-factory fabrication, we minimize waste, optimize energy use, and delivery consistent quality at speed and scale.  

Modular is more than a trend, it’s the future of construction.  We’re proud to offer solutions to meet the demands of today’s operators while paving the way for tomorrow’s environments

Let’s build something extraordinary…modularly.

 l’exploitation et la gestion de résidences et de lieux de vie

Notre approche est simple :
concevoir l’habitat comme un système complet, depuis le foncier et la conception jusqu’à l’usage et la vie quotidienne des occupants.

Nous développons des projets résidentiels pour les seniors, les familles, les étudiants et les territoires, en apportant des solutions :
 bas carbone et RE2020 compatibles

Plus qu’un constructeur, Les Nouveaux Habitats est un opérateur industriel de l’habitat.

Nous accompagnons collectivités, aménageurs et partenaires privés pour déployer des projets fiables, reproductibles, durables et adaptés aux contraintes d’aujourd’hui.

Notre ambition :
réinventer la manière de produire et d’habiter, en combinant intelligence industrielle, performance environnementale et qualité de vie.

Mais do que levantar paredes, a GJG acredita que construir é pensar no futuro: é criar soluções sob medida, surpreender em cada detalhe e entregar resultados consistentes. De estradas a centros logísticos, de indústrias a grandes empreendimentos — o nome GJG está presente em obras que fazem a diferença.

Com uma sede em constante expansão, tecnologia de ponta e uma equipe altamente especializada, a empresa está preparada para os novos desafios do setor. E se hoje comemoramos 11 anos de história, temos certeza de que ainda estamos só no começo.

Name: Hutton+Rostron (A SOCOTEC Company)
Description:
Independent building professionals and scientists; H+R specialise in investigating problems in buildings, building materials and building occupancy.  H+R provide independent remedial surveying and consultancy services for building owners and occupiers, property managers, developers, builders, architects, surveyors, engineers, insurers and loss adjusters

H+R are the market leaders in Building Pathology and heritage conservation, especially with problems involving damp and decay, and pioneered the use of Rothounds within the UK.  H+R identify the root cause of problems rather than treat the symptoms.  H+R offer clients sustainable solutions that do not rely on damaging interventions or chemical treatments.  By avoiding unnecessary or ineffective work, H+R ensure time and money is saved.  H+R will work with you to preserve original materials and methods of construction where these have architectural or historical significance

H+R carry out minimally invasive investigation, and provide expert independent and environmentally sound advice on cost-effective long-term solutions.  Our work is supported by in-house and external specialists and laboratory services, and can be covered by guarantees or collateral warranties

Description:

Crystal Pools is a long-standing member of the Master Builders Association, the Housing Industry Association and the National Swimming Pool Institute. Our company philosophy is to deliver “quality without compromise”.
  
Crystal Pools confidently backs its pools with the strongest warranties on the market. We offer a Council Compliance Service or a Council Approval Service and maintain an unmatched track record of delivering on-time and on-budget.

Crystal Pools has its offices in Central Avenue Thornleigh and conducts onsite consultations for residential pools throughout greater Sydney. From Palm Beach to Springwood, Sutherland to Paddington, Crystal Pools designs and builds pools for any site, residential and commercial, as well as special plunge pools for small backyards.

The company’s residential pools are mainly built in the greater Sydney metropolitan area, whereas Crystal Pool’s commercial-sized works are carried out around the country.

Crystal Pools has won more than 220 major state, national and international pool awards.

Name: Akovas Groupe
Description:
De l'Idée à la Réalisation, une Histoire de Passion

Nous nous engageons à transformer vos visions en réalités palpables, en vous accompagnant à chaque étape de votre projet avec passion et expertise. Découvrez nos services, chacun conçu pour répondre à des besoins clés.

Concevoir

La conception va bien au-delà d'une simple étape technique : c'est l'art de donner vie à vos idées. Nous transformons vos inspirations en plans détaillés, matérialisant ainsi votre vision. Ce processus permet de valider votre concept et de poser des bases solides pour la réalisation de votre projet, où l'imaginaire devient tangible.

Construire

La construction érige une idée. Chez Akovas, nous concrétisons vos projets en donnant vie aux bâtiments que vous avez imaginés, avec une attention méticuleuse aux détails et une expertise singulière. Le résultat ? Des espaces neufs et impeccablement réalisés, prêts à être exploités ou valorisés sur le marché immobilier. Votre projet voit le jour, révélant la suite de votre histoire.

Réhabiliter

Réhabiliter, c'est notre hommage au passé et notre investissement dans l'avenir. Chez Akovas, nous redonnons vie à des espaces oubliés, intégrant des éléments modernes et fonctionnels. Ce service sublime les bâtiments, conservant et valorisant le patrimoine tout en récupérant des espaces qui semblaient perdus. C'est un acte de préservation et de transformation, redonnant à ces lieux leur rôle central dans la vie contemporaine.

Un Engagement de Qualité

Chaque service que nous offrons chez Akovas est conçu pour transformer vos idées en réalités, avec des solutions créatives et efficaces à chaque étape. De la conception à la construction, en passant par la réhabilitation, notre engagement est de fournir des résultats alliant tradition et innovation. Nous sommes des experts passionnés déterminés à répondre à vos attentes.

Name: RetrofitWorks Co-operative
Description:
RetrofitWorks is a ‘not for private profit’ co-operative, matching communities & homeowners who want to retrofit their homes, with local, quality assured SME assessors and installers. (*)

RetrofitWorks uniquely joins these groups together into two sets of key members – coming together to identify the need for & delivery of high quality retrofit projects:

RetrofitWorks Advocates – organisations that represent a constituency of potential customers, acting as trusted advisers on their behalf. Groups such as community groups, local authorities and other local stakeholders comprise our Advocate members.
RetrofitWorks Practioners – certified companies wishing to carry out retrofit advice, assessment, design, coordination, and installation. All Practitioners are fully trained, including PAS2030 accreditation for SME businesses.
This structure transforms the traditional approach to improving properties.

Our third membership group – RetrofitWorks Associates – operate as ‘friends’ of RetrofitWorks. Associate membership is open to any organisation that wishes to formally support the co-operative. There are no entry requirements to join, other than the desire and promise to continually support RetrofitWorks in the local community.

Our service features and benefits are summarised below:

– Householders are assessed, and three quotes are generated from the energy survey from local SME companies via our software portal
– All installer Practitioner members are quality vetted, and referenced
– We advise on best grant scheme for householder circumstances
– Our systems mean far fewer visits are necessary
– RetrofitWorks’ controls ensure best service and a transparent delivery model

Our approach ensures value for money for the property owner by creating competition amongst members, and our structure reduces costs through economies of scale.

RetrofitWorks offers a ‘one-stop-shop’ guaranteed retrofit installation and quality of service is assured by RetrofitWorks’ staff & policies.

Fundada em 2003 por Pedro Ivo Viana Moura na cidade de Belo Jardim, Pernambuco, Brasil, viu seu sonho ganhar asas e expandir-se para as cidades de Santa Cruz do Capibaribe, Caruaru, Garanhuns, Igarassu e Jaboatão dos Guararapes em Pernambuco além de Itaitinga no Ceará. A Viana & Moura Construções atua principalmente através dos Programas Habitacionais do Governo Federal, sendo considerada uma das maiores empresas do Norte e Nordeste em volume de casas construídas, contando com mais de 13 mil unidades habitacionais entregues até 2021. Atualmente a empresa conta com mais de 1 mil colaboradores diretos que trabalham pela missão de: "Contribuir com a felicidade das pessoas, entregando vilas encantadoras e sustentáveis". Através da aplicação de métodos renomados de gestão a exemplo do WCM (World Class Manufacturing), mostra-se antenada aos melhores conceitos e através deles, busca manter o compromisso com a qualidade, sustentabilidade e inovação, somando-se a política da qualidade: "Ter sempre qualidade e melhor preço para o cliente"

Synergy sets itself apart by leveraging advanced 3D BIM technology, light gauge steel panelization, and innovative offsite construction methods ensuring high-quality, durable, and long-lasting structures.

Committed to quality, efficiency, and sustainability, Synergy Structures offers fully customizable designs tailored to meet each client’s unique needs and budget through an interactive design process. By harnessing cutting-edge technology and modern construction techniques, the company delivers superior results with faster turnaround times and transparent pricing.

The Synergy Structures team is made up of industry experts and visionaries from construction, manufacturing, and technology, all driven by a shared commitment to innovation and client satisfaction. Known for its client-focused approach, Synergy prioritizes personalized service and support throughout every stage of the project. This dedication to exceeding expectations is reflected in Synergy’s diverse portfolio, demonstrating expertise and versatility across a wide range of markets and geographies.

We provide high-quality services to a wide range of clients including multinational corporations, real estate developers, government institutions, and private clients, backed by strong professional project management and engineering expertise. Name: Postel International, Inc
Description: For nearly 40 years, Postel's team has been changing the skylines across the country.  With operating multiple manufacturing plants, Postel is able to service markets from coast-to-coast.  Postel provides structural & miscellaneous steel design, drafting, fabrication & erection services for all sectors, including military structures, refineries, warehouse-distribution facilities, cold storage-freezer facilities, stadiums, airports, data centers and much more.  With a strong safety record, heavy investments in automation in our plants and a large fleet of cranes, Postel is a great choice for your next project. Name: MSB Estimating LLC
Description:
MSB Estimating LLC is a professional construction cost estimation consultancy providing accurate, detailed, and affordable estimates with a 24–48 hour turnaround. With over 15 years of industry experience, our certified estimators deliver material takeoffs, cost breakdowns, and project budgeting for contractors, builders, architects, and developers across the USA and internationally. We specialize in residential, commercial, industrial, and government projects, helping clients save up to 60% on estimating expenses. By combining advanced estimating software with expert knowledge, MSB Estimating ensures precision, efficiency, and profitability for every project.

By using advanced software and the latest technologies, we’re able to provide accurate and detailed material takeoff information. Every estimate is the result of careful analysis and attention to detail. Here’s a brief look at the areas we cover:

Residential Property Estimates
Commercial Buildings, Apartments, and Suites Estimates
Wall Partitioning and Ceiling Systems
Flooring and Installation Estimates
Interior and Exterior Finishes (Painting, Wallpaper, Cladding)
Plumbing and Hydraulics (Pipes, Fixtures, Fittings)
Mechanical Systems/HVAC (Ductwork, Components, Diffusers, Vents, Units)
Electrical Systems (Power, Lighting, Security)
Site Development and Civil Works
Structural Concrete, Reinforced Steel, and Formwork (Footings, Beams, Columns, Slabs)
Masonry and Structural Steel
Timber Framing and Carpentry Breakdown
Openings (Doors, Windows)
Landscaping and Exterior Works

We work hand-in-hand with general contractors, builders, subcontractors, and construction companies, providing cost-efficient, high-quality takeoff services that truly add value. Our goal is to ensure our clients are always satisfied with fast turnaround times, fair pricing, and, most importantly, reliable accuracy.

COMO CONSTRUTORA E INCORPORADORA,
o nosso coração está em Minas Gerais

Isso porque aqui, na hlts, oferecer o que há de melhor, com os melhores preços do mercado, é muito mais do que um objetivo. É uma tarefa diária.

E é também a prova de que, se você sonha, nós podemos (e devemos!) tornar esse sonho realidade.

COMO TUDO QUE É BOM NESSA VIDA,
nós também não nascemos de um dia para o outro.
Nosso segredo, na verdade, foi fazer questão de sempre simplificar o caminho para o futuro (o nosso e o dos nossos clientes também).

Criados pelas mãos da família Silingovschi, nós, da hlts Engenharia e Construções, atuamos neste ramo há mais de 20 anos, atendendo clientes do setor residencial e comercial também.

Isso quer dizer que, além de concretizar o sonho da casa própria, já tivemos a oportunidade de tirar do papel as melhores ideias de empresas como Walmart, Grupo Pão de Açúcar, Leroy Merlin e muito mais.
