Name: UnitiWall Corporation
Description:
Building Better Starts with the Wall.

UnitiWall is redefining building construction with an all-in-one panel solution designed to streamline processes and significantly reduce building ownership costs. Ideal for new construction and deep energy retrofits, including full re and re and overclad, our prefabricated wall systems are both sustainable and resilient, accelerating construction schedules by up to 80%, saving time and money, while providing the highest occupant comfort. Incorporating a wide range of exterior cladding materials and window types, our high-performance panels are tailored to each project and delivered fully clad, ready for on-site installation. 

Based in Mississauga, Ontario, UnitiWall provides a simple, energy-efficient, and future-ready solution that is revolutionizing building envelope construction. We’re dedicated to leaving a positive impact, by providing projects that are safer, more resilient, and environmentally sustainable. UnitiWall builds better and faster for everyone.

Com solidez, qualidade e sustentabilidade, seguimos ajudando a construir uma Brasília melhor para os brasilienses.

Name: DESA GLASS
Description:
DESA Glass is a premier facade contractor shaping the built environment across Western Canada. Specializing in curtain wall, window, door, and custom glazing systems, we deliver complete envelope solutions through both Supply & Install and Supply Only models - serving developers, architects, and builders who demand precision, performance, and partnership.

With active operations in Alberta and British Columbia, DESA supports complex commercial, institutional, and mixed-use projects - bringing deep technical knowledge, fabrication control, and construction foresight to every project.

Our integrated delivery combines design-assist, in-house aluminum manufacturing, and proprietary system access with installation teams and rigorous QA/QC oversight. The result: façades that align with architectural vision, meet demanding performance targets, and install with confidence.

DESA’s proprietary systems, global partnerships, and curated supply chain unlock access to advanced facade technologies - allowing us to deliver tailored solutions that balance aesthetic vision with constructability and cost certainty.

Backed by a culture of accountability and a commitment to excellence, DESA Glass stands at the intersection of architecture, performance, and precision.

Elevating Your Vision - every step of the way.

Name: Anderton Gables
Description:
Built on purpose. We’re a friendly team of built environment specialists, here to support you with your construction projects and developments. You can count on us to turn up on time, get the job done right and deliver results you can rely on. 

We’re experts in the structures that shape our daily lives - schools, offices, hospitals, and homes. We bring both sustainable principles and commercial focus to any development or redevelopments, ensuring every building meets the needs of its users, owners and the environment.

Our commercial advice is straight-talking and no-nonsense. We’ll tell you exactly what needs doing and the outcomes you can expect – no fluff, just clear, actionable insights. 

We’re confident in our expertise and aren’t afraid to take charge of a project. Our goal is to give you the best service possible, often working as a seamless extension of your in-house team. 

We love what we do and are passionate about making a difference. That’s why we’re laser-focused on getting every detail just right. 

But it’s not just about the clients - we’re big on creating a great place for our team to develop their commercial expertise. It’s pretty simple really - we’re building a company where good work and good people go hand in hand.

Name: Groupe COREAL
Description:
Le groupe Coreal, fondé en 2004 par Dominique BRISARD est un promoteur et constructeur immobilier dédié à la construction métallique. 

La modularité et la praticité de ce procédé en font un matériau de prédilection pour les bâtiments industriels, commerciaux, tertiaires ou de logements ; en outre, sa faible empreinte carbone permet au groupe COREAL de garantir une construction à haute performance énergétique. 

Le Groupe COREAL, qui a livré 168 programmes et plus de 500.000 mètres carrés depuis sa création, est composé d’une entreprise de promotion : Coprom pour l’immobilier commercial et les logements, et d’une entreprise de construction : Coreal pour le secteur industriel, tertiaire et les logements. 

En 2022, le Groupe a réalisé un chiffre d'affaires de 45 millions d'euros, et vise 60 millions d'euros pour 2023. Installé à Thiais (94), présent dans 8 régions de France métropolitaine (Île-de-France, Grand Est, Bretagne, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Hauts-de-France, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Normandie, Pays de la Loire) ainsi que dans les DROM-COM et au Bénin, le groupe compte actuellement 40 collaborateurs, et recrute de nouveaux talents en permanence pour accompagner son fort développement.

Name: RCM - Modular Solutions
Description:
RCM - Modular Solutions DESIGNS, MANUFACTURES AND DELIVERS modular buildings for various sectors of the Canadian and American markets including senior living, mining, hospitality and multi family residential. Founded in 2000, RCM quickly became the reference for modular construction in Quebec,  manufacturing and delivering projects throughout Quebec, Ontario, Northern Territories, Alberta and the United States.
In fact, not far from the economic metropolis of Beauce, the company enjoys a strategic location for its exports and deliveries across Canada. With 150,000 square feet and 22 double work stations equipped with the latest technology, our state-of-the-art facility is at the heart of our success. Every week, RCM manufactures the equivalent of 16,000 square feet of living space, or about twenty modules. Our modular solutions are assembled and inspected by our qualified team who’s primary focus is the quality of our products. 
Every construction project can benefit from the advantages of the modular construction.

Description:

Esse time gerou e continua gerando números expressivos,
reflexos de uma altíssima expertise em matéria de construção civil. Afinal, estamos falando de uma empresa responsável por 43 obras já finalizadas, sendo 4,77 por ano e prazo médio de entrega de 10,39 meses.

Também por isso que, junto às parcerias com diferentes municípios,

Renowned for its integrated approach and robust capabilities in design, manufacturing, and execution, ABL boasts the largest machine-installed capacity at its cutting-edge manufacturing plant in Nagpur, Maharashtra. Certified with ISO 9001-2008, ISO 14001-2004, and OHSAS 18001-2007, ABL is committed to delivering unparalleled quality and service across its entire range of offerings, including pre-fabricated structural members, profiled metallic sheets, insulated panels, and composite deck sheeting.

Our journey began in 2006, with a passion for engineering excellence, driving us to invest in cutting-edge technology and talent. Today, our portfolio boasts iconic structures, showcasing our expertise and commitment to innovation in pre-engineered building construction.

Name: Saudi Rockwool Factory
Description:
Saudi Rockwool Factory is a member of Gulf Insulation Group which provides the local and international market with numerous construction and industrial materials.

Saudi Rockwool Factory was established in 1992 located in the third industrial area south of Riyadh occupying an area of 30,000 m2 to meet the local and international growing needs of Rockwool. the availability of its  raw materials locally was another driving factor to establish this industry.The factory is divided into two main sections; the first section contains three production lines and it is involved in producing dark gray wool with a capacity of 5,000 tons/year

The second section contains two production lines and it is involved in producing yellow wool with a capacity of 22,500 tons/year.The main raw materials used in the production of Saudi Rockwool Factory are lime stone and basalt which is available in the K.S.A abundantly, other materials used in production such as resin, aluminum sheet, wire mesh, fiber glass, etc, are imported from different specialized companies involved in this sector.

As part of our commitment to quality, we perform regular product testing, both locally and internationally, against the highest standards levels. Saudi Rockwool Factory is ISO 9002 certificated since 1998, and the factory also obtains the (CE) mark in 2008.
Saudi Rockwool Factory high qualified marketing team assisted effectively in reaching many markets in the Middle East, Africa, Asia and Europe.

About Us
Dolphin Enterprise is a trusted India consultancy and turnkey solutions provider specializing in Concrete Protection, Waterproofing, Anti-Corrosion, and Sports Infrastructure. Exciting Partnership with CWS Australia
We are proud to announce our latest strategic partnership with Concrete Waterproofing Solutions (CWS), Australia—a global pioneer in innovative waterproofing technologies.

As part of this collaboration, Dolphin Enterprise has introduced CWS100 to India, a cutting-edge deep-penetrating crystalline waterproofing solution designed to provide lifetime protection to concrete structures.

CWS100 offers:
Transparent, spray-applied application
Permanent waterproofing without membranes
Self-sealing of cracks up to 0.4 mm
Increased concrete durability
Environmentally friendly and VOC-free formulation
Perfect for use in basements, tunnels, water tanks, podiums, and infrastructure exposed to harsh environments, CWS100 represents a significant technological advancement in sustainable concrete protection.

Core Services
Waterproofing & Protection Solutions
CWS100 Deep-Penetrating CSH GEL Waterproofing
EPDM Pond Liners
Polymeric & Oxidized Waterproofing Membranes
Bitumen & Coal Tar-Based Pipe Coating Tapes
APP & SBS Modified Membrane

SBT Sverige AB omsatte ca 1 554 MSEK år 2021 och hade 157 anställda. Vi är i grunden en svensk organisation med stöttning av slovakisk och tjeckisk personal.

Name: AME, Inc
Description:
AME Inc., the leading BMS provider in the New York Metropolitan Area, United States, is excited to announce its acquisition by Nordomatic, a global leader in the BMS and software industry. This strategic move marks a significant milestone in AME’s history, positioning the company for accelerated growth and enhanced product offerings.

Founded in 2004, AME has been at the forefront of the BMS industry in New York, New Jersey, and Pennsylvania, delivering exceptional building automation and system integration that have set industry standards. With a strong reputation for innovation, the company has cultivated a loyal customer base and achieved consistent growth. Joining forces with Nordomatic represents a natural next step in their evolution.

“This is an exciting time for our team and our customers,” says Amit Patel, CEO of AME Inc. “By becoming part of the Nordomatic Group, we’re not just expanding our business—we’re expanding our potential. With their expertise in energy efficiency and Smart Buildings solutions, we’re confident we can deliver even more value to our customers and stakeholders. Together, we become one of the world’s biggest independent BMS providers.”

Nordomatic has been a growth company in Europe since 1967 and is now establishing business globally. Nordomatic is also acquiring AICT, an Indian company specializing in software and programming. AME and AICT have been collaborating for many years, creating value for customers.

As AME and AICT integrate with Nordomatic, management will remain the same, and customers can expect the same level of service and commitment to quality as they have come to trust. The AME and AICT brands will continue to operate under their current name, ensuring continuity for customers and partners.

This partnership reflects a shared vision for the future, and this move marks a significant milestone in Nordomatic’s growth journey. It aims to increase market share and create a larger impact on tomorrow.

Name: SIBS MY
Description:
SIBS is a manufacturing-inspired mass-production company which uses the modular building system to build sustainable homes. What makes us sophisticated is our ability to complete 90% of a building in a controlled manufacturing setting, using our built process machinery and workflow management system.

In simple words, our building is 90% complete before it even reaches the construction site. All that’s left after is to integrate the structure with the land it sits upon for it to become fully functional. As we build homes in a manufacturing setting, the process goes through a modular form to various stations.

Here, the production and quality assurance team will perform sequential tasks - from creating the exterior part of the modular building down to its interior, fittings, and furnishings.
 
At SIBS, we value innovation, and our long-term objective is to drive the development of tomorrow’s modular construction industry, where projects cost less, complete faster and are more predictable.

To date, our operations have expanded to deliver modular homes to international shores - The UK, Ireland, Sweden, and Saudi Arabia.

Name: PRESET Building Systems Pvt Ltd
Description:
THE PRESET BUILDING SYSTEM:
INDIA'S FIRST & ONLY integrated and participative construction and design platform. What you design gets built in just a few weeks, ready to move in! That is the magic!
• Extensive pre-designed plans and elevations are pre-loaded and can be selected through filters and these can also be configured individually using design customisation options built into the app.
• A premium ‘pro’ version will allow for complete design of your home from scratch! This is recommended for architects and engineers but anyone with a flair for planning and design can try their hand at it Once a design is selected, it is added to ‘cart’ and advance paid online. This sets off a customer on-boarding process which will be guided by back end process support staff.

BUILDING AS A PRODUCT:
• The PRESET technology consists of a set of pre-designed, prefabricated (also known as Designed for Manufacture and Assembly - DfMA) and pre- finished building components that fit together using patented methods and technologies to create the finished building – a home, in this case – with minimal site work. The component numbers are limited yet unlimited combinations and permutations of rooms and other functions are possible to be created as per the site conditions and design requirements of individual project needs.

• The major structural components are steel based and the walls and roof use a combination of materials that are appropriate as per the geographical and climatic conditions of the location.
• A variety of exterior and interior finishes, claddings, exterior options, add-ons, roof options etc., makes it easy for the customer to personalise his building as per his desire, taste and budget.
• Minimal site preparations are needed and the only work that needs to be done is to create a level concrete surface – basically consisting of levelling and compacting the soil and pouring a concrete base
Trained teams of assemblers will be able to put up the buildings anywhere fast!

Name: The Cobeal Group
Description:
Cobeal is an Engineering, Procurement, Construction, Installation, and Commissioning (EPCIC) company specializing in solving complex environmental challenges for multinational private, public, and government organizations. 

Our group's expertise is broad and includes turnkey design, engineering, building, installing, and commissioning small to large-scale complex facilities and spaces (defense, nuclear, pharmaceutical, medical, aerospace, petrochemical, automotive, geothermal, electric generation, commercial, and archival). 

The company's core specialities include air, large-scale construction, energy, OEM manufacturing of HVAC related equipment, and water generation for military operations. Cobeal offers best-in-class IAQ-solutions and proprietary technology. Cobeal's engineering team served on industry working groups for these standards: ANSI/ASHAE 62.1, IEST, RP-CC002, ISO/TC 209, and ASHRAE 52.1. 

HISTORY: 

Cobeal started in 1963 under the name Ventilación Industrial, S.A. (VISA). The company's core expertise is filtration, dehumidification, and indoor air sciences (the mitigation of particles in hospitals, laboratories, nuclear facilities and nuclear medicine, museums and archives, seed storage, subterranean facilities, public transportation, and other commercial sectors).

Name: PN SNEDKERI
Description:
EN SNEDKERHISTORIE

Rejsen har været lang. Ikke bare i år, om end PN Snedkeri efterhånden har +40 år på bagen, men også i ekspertise og omfang.

Da Pauli Nielsen i 1983 åbnede et lille værksted i vestjyske Vejen, var det ham og en svend, der forarbejdede stel til polstrede møbler. Sønnen Stig kom med sine skolekammerater og hjalp til i snedkeriet, der langsomt voksede over årene. Ikke nødvendigvis med et specifikt mål, men altid drevet af nysgerrighed og håndværkets udvikling.

Nye opgaver og udfordringer blev mødt med arbejdsomhed og ydmyghed, og med tiden kom der flere og flere kunder, der efterspurgte særlige løsninger til hoteller, krydstogtsskibe, kontorer og butikker.

Sønnen Stig Nielsen overtog driften for 15 år siden og drev udviklingen videre, så også private kunder kunne få glæde af snedkeriets ekspertise, der stadig bygger på de værdier, der fra første dag var en integreret del af virksomheden. Værdier, der bunder i et ansvar for det arbejde, der skal udføres, den respektfulde dialog med kunderne, uagtet størrelsen på det arbejde, de skal have udført og en vilje til at opnå det bedst mulige resultat, selvom der skal tænkes utraditionelt for at nå i mål.

I dag samarbejder PN Snedkeri med en række af landets førende arkitekthuse, der ved, at det lille værksted i Vejen er garant for kvalitet og evner at udtænke løsninger, der når kundens ønsker. Det er et samarbejde, der bygger på tillid og er udviklet over en længere årrække, præcis som det er tilfældet med de håndværkere, PN Snedkeri også entrerer med i de Skandinaviske markeder. 

Smede og stenhuggere, der har samme sans for detaljen og forarbejdningen af netop det materiale, de er eksperter i.

Ånden er den samme, som den var fra begyndelsen. Dedikation til håndværket, det entydige fokus på kvalitet, ærlige samtaler og et fælles mål om at levere det bedste.

PERSONLIG KONTAKT: 

Stig Nielsen: sn@pnsnedkeri.dk
Mogens Grove Nielsen: mgn@pn

www.thebuildingtalkspodcast.buzzsprout.com/

'The Building Talks Podcast' is a fortnightly podcast where we chat with the leaders behind Australia's built environment - Property Developers, Architects, Builders, Engineers, Urbanologists, HR & Marketing, Software Developers, Tutors & Researchers, and more besides - all of whom provide their valuable insights and stories that help create the stunning skylines and cityscapes of Australia.

We bring the listeners longer form conversations with the people who help bring our built environment to life and learn how they envisage, finance, create, design, teach, construct and deliver or maintain the fabric of the built environment, be that through their business insights to the industry, or their personal perspective on the built environment and the challenges within it.

We talk to a wide range of people and discuss their background and impression of our buildings, understand the "blood, sweat and tears" that goes into the buildings and the topics in discussion that effect the built environment.

We cover the hot topics faced by the industries working to create our built environment and try to gather a greater understanding and knowledge of the buildings and the land they sit upon.

The aim of 'The Building Talks Podcast' is to provide 'Quite interesting' conversations for anyone interested in these markets, in a relaxed yet insightful format.

If you or someone you know would like to be a part of the show, has something you'd like to discuss or message you feel is valuable to our audience, reach out to us on 0400 934 025 or email info@buildingenvirons.com.au

Desafios que a princípio se apresentaram como obstáculos, e que, no decorrer do seu caminho, revelaram-se em oportunidades para o desenvolvimento de novas tecnologias em complexos hospitalares, estruturas administrativas, empreendimentos comerciais, modernos espaços culturais, habitações populares, indústrias, incorporações, obras de arte e infraestrutura urbana.Essa experiência nos mais variados segmentos da construção civil, junto com o seu planejamento estratégico, possibilitaram um aperfeiçoamento nas áreas de tecnologia, recursos humanos e gestão administrativa e, por conseqüência, um crescimento homogêneo de qualidade, que elevou a CONSTRUBASE a uma importante posição no setor.Para atender às exigências crescentes do mercado, a empresa tem dado especial atenção ao desenvolvimento das técnicas, da qualidade e produtividade na construção, ao mesmo tempo à diminuição dos desperdícios característicos do setor, permitindo a redução de custos e prazos.O conhecimento adquirido nessas quatro décadas de existência credenciou a CONSTRUBASE a escrever um novo capítulo em sua história. O programa de privatização desenvolvido na década de 1990, posicionou a CONSTRUBASE dentre as principais operadoras de infra-estrutura do país, com a conquista de importantes concessões públicas, como: rodovias, garagens subterrâneas, terminais rodoviários e shopping centers, todas consideradas como parcerias bem-sucedidas entre o poder público e a iniciativa privada.

Name: Three Forks Wood Reclamation
Description:
ONE OF A KIND & HARD TO FIND WOOD RECLAMATION SPECIALISTS

We travel the globe to find the most rare reclaimed wood in the world for you!

Three Forks is a veteran-owned new business that provides clients a uniquely different approach to reclaimed wood. Together, the Co-Founders, (Army veteran, Christian Knutzen and Navy veteran, Chris Kelley) have dedicated 58 years of service to their country, during which they were part of elite teams working in faraway places alongside other nations, tackling challenging problems. Throughout this time, they immersed themselves in diverse and vibrant cultures.

After military retirement, no longer part of the "Big Green" machine, their desire to stay connected with global partners and friends led them to create a business focused on sustainability, maintaining a touch of “green,” while also sharing the history and culture of these distant locations with customers in the US. Thus, embarking on a new mission – Three Forks Wood Reclamation.

Three Forks saves the wood from structures that are at the end of their days and pass the wood, as well as its story in both pictures and words, to its next purpose.

Our model is total site reclamation of overseas wooden structures to provide our clients with high-quality reclaimed wood, the one-of-a-kind story of that wood, and beautiful photography from site discovery to reclamation by local craftsmen for fair compensation.

We partner with native teams in different countries – people that we have served with in our military careers – to scout for the most interesting wooden structures that are about to be lost to time and the elements.

We coordinate disassembly by local craftsmen, follow USDA import requirements, and use international container shipping lines – all to bring the most amazing reclaimed wood to our clients, so they can in turn share the beauty and heritage of the wood with their family and friends.

Name: Stonex Consulting
Description:
STONEX Consulting is a consultancy firm specialized in natural stone projects: we are not supplier, we are the trusted consultants that you engage to validate and control the stone package of your building. 

The project phases:
DESIGN - We are involved advising the architects and Interior designers about the material to adopt for the design intent, that suits the technical application

CONTRACTING - We support in the development of the project specifications and validation of the contractors

PROCUREMENT - We help you to develop the right procurement strategy and to keep it under control with our team from the quality and logistic point of view.

TECHNICAL ADVISORY - We accompany Clients and architects to review the materials, visit the quarries and advise weather they suit the program of the project and they are suitable for the application, reviewing the technical data and advising about the testing to carry on. 

During the execution of the project, we review the technical submittals from the contractors (material submittals, method statements, tests etc) in order to validate them.

PROJECT MANAGEMENT - We help you to drive the stone package, keep it under control at any time and taking correction actions when problems arise.

QA/QC - Keeping the quality of the stone under control at every stage, from the slabs selection, until the installed product, it's part of our expertise.

POST CONTRACT & THIRD PARTY Services - We act as third party consultants when engaged to evaluate a project execution or issues related to natural stone.

We are your trusted stone consultant, supporting you in taking the right choices when it come to natural stone.

Name: MODELO TECH STUDIO LTD.

Our integrated team brings deep expertise in architectural, structural, and MEP modeling, with specialized capabilities in Scan-to-BIM, digital twins, and fabrication-ready deliverables. Whether supporting early design or guiding coordination on site, we act as a digital extension of your team to make every decision more predictable and profitable.

Why Work with a BIM Consultant?

Most construction teams recognize the value of BIM, but few have the dedicated resources or experience to manage it effectively in-house. A specialized BIM consultant brings:

Focus: We live and breathe BIM. Our processes are built around quality, consistency, and data accuracy.

Scalability: Scale your BIM resources up or down without fixed overhead.

Expertise: Access a multidisciplinary team familiar with the latest tools, standards, and coordination practices.

Objectivity: We provide a neutral perspective across design and construction teams, helping resolve conflicts early and avoid costly rework.

Results: Our clients consistently see reduced RFIs, faster approvals, and measurable savings in both time and cost.

Areas of Expertise:

BIM coordination and management

Laser scanning and as-built modeling

3D modeling, documentation, and shop drawing production

Digital twins and asset information for operations

Construction sequencing and visualization

We’re not just modelers, we’re collaborators helping our partners build smarter and spend less.

Name: Casta an iNFORCE Company
Description:
Providing optimized industrial floors and pavement designs to Engineers and Construction firms across NZ, Australia and Pacific Islands for the past 20 years.

At iNFORCE we believe in simplifying things, while ensuring full confidence in the outcome, that’s how we have been gaining the trust of the biggest construction companies and engineering firms in New Zealand, Australia and the Pacific Islands, helping them design and deliver stronger, longer lasting and more cost-effective concrete structures.

How do we do this? Our team of design engineers work hand in hand with our clients from the outset of the project with the focus of achieving maximum long-term durability and optimal performance of the concrete slab or structure utilising some of the latest fibre reinforced concrete technology and world class jointing systems.

With a team who have been involved in concrete slab design for over 20 years, our mission is to continually provide the products, the experience, the technical advice and engineering nous to ensure you can have the confidence to simplify your concrete slabs while achieving optimal performance.

Name: Bidault Bâtiment
Description:
La société Bidault a été créée en 1946 par M. BIDAULT Louis. Elle est implantée depuis son origine sur la commune de Saint Donan à une dizaine de kilomètres de Saint-Brieuc dans les Côtes d’Armor (22).
Spécialisée depuis toujours dans la menuiserie et la maçonnerie, elle a su au cours de ces années élargir et diversifier son activité.

Vous pouvez faire appel à notre entreprise pour :
• la construction de bâtiments industriels et tertiaires
• la construction d'équipements de génie civil en béton armé
• la construction de maison d’habitation
• la construction d’immeubles collectifs
• les constructions de bâtiments en ossature bois
• les travaux d’adaptation aux réglementations thermiques et d’accessibilités
• les restructurations de bâtiments avec extensions
• les rénovations

Nous avons su nous faire connaître pour la qualité de nos réalisations et les prestations apportées sur nos chantiers.
Achetée en 2005 par M. FRAVAL Tremeur, la société Bidault alors composée d’une trentaine de salariés a développé ses activités notamment de second oeuvre telles que l’isolation, l’ossature bois et les cloisons sèches.
Le 1er Janvier 2009, la société Bidault a été scindée en 2 entités :
• Bidault SAS spécialisée dans le gros oeuvre
• Bidault Menuiserie spécialisée dans la charpente, l’ossature bois, la menuiserie, l’isolation et les cloisons sèches

Name: Girollar Construções e Incorporações LTDA
Description:
Com o forte propósito de realizar sonhos e mudar vidas, oferecendo oportunidade e melhoria na qualidade de vida às pessoas, o empresário Catarinense Carlos Roberto Girolla traz para Blumenau um novo conceito de moradia para atender às demandas de habitação da sociedade, oferecer soluções e produtos com a melhor relação custo / benefício / qualidade.

É o conceito de morar mais por muito menos. Mais localização, qualidade, segurança, lazer e conforto por bem menos. “Surgimos no mercado com a missão de apoiar nossos clientes e estar ao lado deles em um momento tão importante, que é a conquista da casa própria. Para isso, apostamos na busca constante pela inovação, visando sempre um único objetivo: transformar o sonho de nossos clientes em uma realidade ainda melhor!”

Sabemos que a aquisição de um imóvel realiza sonhos e desejos, muitas vezes, de uma vida inteira. Por isso, todos os nossos empreendimentos são incorporados e construídos com o maior carinho e cuidado, utilizando recursos e princípios aplicados somente em construções diferenciadas, com projetos modernos, sustentáveis, com total infraestrutura, excelente acabamento e condições facilitadas de pagamento.

Name: De Groene Waarden
Description:
We halen de A27 uit de file top 10!

Onze visie: Wij zijn één team en werken eerlijk, transparant en met plezier. 
Op basis van gelijkwaardigheid en vertrouwen versterken wij elkaar.

Name: ND INSTALAÇÕES
Description:
A ND INSTALAÇÕES, fundada em 2002, destaca-se como uma empresa especializada em instalações e manutenção nas áreas elétrica, lógica, telefonia, CFTV, automação, hidráulica, gás, redes de combate a incêndio, SPDA (Pára-Raios e Aterramento)  e montagem de infraestrutura, incluindo calhas, eletro calhas e eletro dutos .
 Comprometemo-nos a oferecer serviços que atendem aos rigorosos padrões de qualidade estabelecidos pelas normas técnicas brasileiras, tais como NBR e NR(S). Contamos com uma equipe técnica qualificada, com anos de experiência no mercado, proporcionando mão de obra especializada e apoio técnico na especificação dos serviços, além de um atendimento rápido e eficiente.
 Alicerçada por uma política administrativa bem definida, a ND INSTALAÇÕES assegura a entrega de mão de obra de alta qualidade, durabilidade e segurança. Buscamos atender integralmente às necessidades dos clientes, promovendo um crescimento sustentável e respeitando o meio ambiente.
 Desde nossa fundação, temos nos destacado pela oferta de serviços certificados e de alta qualidade, cumprindo prazos competitivos. Nossa abordagem inovadora inclui parcerias estratégicas com engenheiros, arquitetos, fornecedores e clientes, o que nos permitiu conquistar clientes de grande porte.
 Além da competência da nossa equipe e da qualidade dos serviços, nosso sucesso é resultado da transparência, cordialidade e agilidade nas negociações.       Buscamos a excelência no atendimento, selecionando clientes entre as empresas mais conceituadas do mercado, que também demandam padrões de qualidade elevados.
 Com uma estrutura especializada para prestação de mão de obra e técnica, atendemos toda a gama de serviços elétricos, lógicos, de telefonia, CFTV, automação, hidráulica, gás e redes de combate a incêndio.
A ND INSTALAÇÕES defende o acesso universal a serviços de profissionais experientes e capacitados a um custo acessível.
Convidamos você e sua empresa a experimentarem a qualidade de nossos serviços.

Name: Göteborg E3 Bygg AB
Description:
Göteborg E3 Bygg är ett byggbolag med inriktning mot kommersiella fastigheter och bostäder. Vi utför både nyproduktioner och ombyggnationer. Vårt verksamhetsområde är Göteborg med kringliggande kommuner. Bolaget har sedan start haft en stark utveckling där vi etablerat oss på marknaden.
Vårt arbete bygger på våra tre värdeord som också skapar bolagets namn E3 Bygg. Detta står för enkelt, engagerat och effektivt.

Enkelt
“Med oss blir projektet och dess processer enklare, vi tillsammans med våra kunder och leverantörer skapar arbetssätt och en miljö som gör oss enkla att arbeta med.”

Engagerat
“Vi arbetar aktivt för att skapa ett arbetsklimat där alla känner sig välkomna och blir involverade i projektet. Detta resulterar till en fin samhörighet och engagemang i alla led, såväl som egen personal, beställare och leverantörer. Vårt intresse för att utveckla projekt och se visionen bli verklighet skapar ett stort engagemang hos oss.”

Effektivt
“Vår ambition är att alltid arbeta effektivt i våra projekt, detta är möjligt då stor kunskap finns inom bolaget där erfarenheter och nyfikenhet skapar arbetssätt som gör varje del i ett byggprojekt så effektivt som möjligt.

Name: K-GROUP
Description:
À propos de K-GROUP**

**K-GROUP** est une société de droit ivoirien qui se distingue par son expertise et son engagement dans divers secteurs clés de l'industrie. Depuis sa création, K-GROUP s'est imposée comme un leader innovant, fournissant des solutions complètes et de haute qualité à ses clients.

**Nos Domaines d'Intervention :**

1. **Aménagement Foncier**
   - Spécialistes en gestion et développement des terrains, nous transformons des espaces en infrastructures viables, alliant innovation et respect des normes environnementales.

2. **BTP Génie Civil & VRD-Route-Hydraulique**
   - Nous réalisons des projets de construction d'infrastructures robustes, y compris des routes, et des ouvrages hydrauliques, garantissant ainsi des solutions durables pour les collectivités et les entreprises.

3- **Assainissement**
   - Nous offrons des solutions d'assainissement pour la gestion des eaux usées et le drainage, contribuant à la protection de l'environnement et à l'amélioration des conditions sanitaires.

4. **Architecture et Réhabilitation**
   - Notre équipe allie esthétique et fonctionnalité dans la conception de nouveaux bâtiments et la rénovation d'édifices existants, en mettant l'accent sur la durabilité et l'innovation.

5. **Vente Immobilière**
   - Nous proposons une gamme diversifiée de biens immobiliers, des résidences aux locaux commerciaux, assurant des transactions transparentes et sécurisées pour nos clients.

**Notre Vision :**
K-GROUP s'engage à être un partenaire de confiance, en offrant des solutions adaptées aux besoins spécifiques de chaque projet. Nous nous efforçons de dépasser les attentes de nos clients par notre dévouement à la qualité, à l'innovation et à la durabilité. 

**Pourquoi Nous Choisir :*
- Expertise reconnue dans divers secteurs.
- Solutions innovantes et sur mesure.
- Engagement envers la satisfaction du client.
- Respect des normes et réglementations en vigueur.
- Équipe professionnelle et dévouée.

TAWAH is officially registered as an NGO under the Non-Governmental Organizations Act, 2002 in March 2011 with the registration number 4487.

We serve marginalized groups in Tanzania include women, people living in poverty, people with special needs, indigenous populations, refugees and minorities. Because of their social status, these groups are often excluded from fundamental aspects of society, such as equal access to education, access to quality healthcare, adequate living conditions.

Connecting women with women underpins our work. Through the collective construction of shelter and sanitation infrastructure, TAWAH teaches practical skills to low income women who can in turn use those skills to generate new economic opportunities.

Name: I am a Housebuilder
Description:
Just 2% of SME housebuilding businesses in the UK are owned and run by women, with women making up just 14% of the 2.1m people working in construction.

The industry has an image problem and failure to attract talent from different backgrounds with different skill sets, is not only exacerbating the chronic skills shortages but also hampering innovation and growth within the sector. 

This is why we’ve launched the ‘I am a Housebuilder’ campaign as part of the All Party Parliamentary Group for SME Housebuilders. 

The campaign seeks to remove the barriers for entry for women in the sector and increase the number of women working in, and running, SME housebuilding firms. 

The three pledges are:

• Increase visibility of successful women within the sector to attract more women to apply for roles.

• Create a mentoring network to help women into leadership positions. 

• Work in partnership with trade bodies and organisations to positively promote the sector to women of all ages, when recruiting from apprenticeship to the board room.

ACME Block & Brick now serves Southern Kentucky throughout middle and eastern Tennessee and into northern Georgia. ACME is headquartered in Kingston, TN to provide a central location to operate an ever-growing block and brick business.

The product line that was once dedicated to the production of only top-quality concrete blocks has expanded through the years into a full-blown masonry and hardscapes superstore. ACME Block & Brick, Inc. is a company based on the highest standards of quality and committed to delivering the best possible service. As we continue to grow and expand, we will always remain with the tradition that this company was built on.

Name: UMP (United Master Planners)
Description:
UMP is a specialized construction management firm with expertise in a range of services, including project controls, project scheduling, cost controls, and construction claims in the heavy construction industry within the public sector. Our experienced team of planners and schedulers boasts two decades of expertise in managing heavy construction projects of various sizes.

We take pride in being approved by the Los Angeles Unified School District (LAUSD), allowing us to fully understand and meet their specific requirements.

Our comprehensive scheduling services encompass:
•	Tender Schedules: Crafting schedules that facilitate precise bidding and project planning.
•	Contract Baseline Schedules: Establishing the foundational schedules that form the basis of project execution.
•	Milestone Schedules: Highlighting key project milestones and their timelines for effective tracking.
•	Critical Path Schedules: Identifying and prioritizing critical activities to ensure project timelines are met.
•	Level 1/2/3/4/5 Schedules: Providing varying levels of detail in schedules to cater to project complexity and management needs.
•	Lookahead Schedules: Offering insights into forthcoming project phases and activities for proactive planning.
•	Current Vs. Baseline Schedules: Comparing the current project status against the baseline schedule for performance evaluation.
•	Recovery / Mitigation Schedules: Developing strategies to recover or mitigate delays and integrating them into the schedule.
•	Updated Target Schedules: Keeping stakeholders informed about revised project targets based on evolving conditions.
•	What If Schedules: Analyzing and presenting alternative scenarios to support decision-making.
•	Integrated Master Schedules: Harmonizing multiple project schedules into a comprehensive overview for effective project management.
•	At UMP, our commitment is to deliver top-tier scheduling solutions that enhance project efficiency and success in the construction industry

Une phrase nous définit : Bâtir pour durer.

Le Groupe LFL est axée sur une gestion qui place l’humain à l’avant plan, que ce soit auprès de nos employé.e.s, de nos clients ou des communautés locales où nos projets se réalisent. Toutes nos actions et notre quotidien sont façonnés par les valeurs de notre entreprise : le respect, le travail d’équipe, la SSE, la rigueur, l’authenticité et l’engagement envers les communautés. 

Nous sommes des entrepreneurs généraux en construction de bâtiments commerciaux et institutionnels ainsi qu’en projets civils, industriels et miniers et ce depuis plus de 65 ans. Nous sommes reconnus pour nos activités de construction dans le Nord du Québec et dans le Nord du Canada (Nunavut) mais aussi pour des projets réalisés plus au sud, soit dans le reste du Québec, en Ontario et à Terre Neuve et Labrador. Nous sommes constamment à l’affut de nouveaux défis et d’opportunités!

Outre notre gestion axée sur l’humain et sur nos valeurs, nos traits distinctifs sont : notre équipe multifonctionnelle hautement expérimentée, une planification méticuleuse, des partenariats solides, l’habileté éprouvée de réaliser des projets majeurs, des employé.e.s fortement engagé.e.s dans le succès des projets de l’entreprise et un climat de travail détendu, agréable où la bonne humeur quotidienne est omniprésente.

L’ensemble de nos actions, basées sur nos valeurs, ont un seul but : bâtir des ouvrages de qualité qui traversent le temps, continuer à bâtir une entreprise engagée, profitable et responsable comme c’est le cas depuis 65 ans maintenant, bâtir des relations de qualité et à long terme qui durent avec nos parties prenantes et offrir à nos employé.e.s des carrières qui durent afin que leur travail devienne plus qu’un travail mais plutôt une expérience de vie.

Name: MOD
Description:
När vi grundades 2014, gjordes det med ett enda syfte: att inspirera vår bransch till förbättring. Idag är det fortfarande det som driver oss – att genom handling och faktiska resultat visa hur utveckling och förvaltning av fastigheter går att göra annorlunda. Snabbare. Lönsammare. Bättre.

Genom ett smartare, mer insiktsdrivet perspektiv på ett väldigt traditionellt hantverk, hoppas vi kunna förändra en hårt cementerad bransch. Vi är mer än ett bolag för en avgränsad del av ett byggprojekt. Från idéstadie till förvaltning, skapar vi optimerade miljöer där människor faktiskt vill verka, leva och bo. Dessutom med våra barn och deras barns framtid i åtanke, genom en process som minskar påverkan på vår omvärld. 

Vår drivkraft är anledningen till att vi är något annat än en grupp människor som bara stämplar in på morgonen och stämplar ut när dagen är slut. Vi är bolaget för alla som vill utmana gamla sanningar och bryta ny mark. Bolaget som går längst fram i ledet, med rak rygg, stadig blick och ett tydligt uppdrag: att inspirera till ett bättre och mer hållbart samhällsbygge för så många som möjligt.

Description:

The company specializes in the planning and implementation of mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems in buildings, ensuring that they function efficiently and sustainably.

Mechanical systems include heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems & Fire Fighting System, while electrical systems include power distribution, lighting, and communication systems. Plumbing systems cover water supply, drainage, and sewage.

The role of an MEP consultant company is to work closely with architects, builders, and developers to ensure that the mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems are properly integrated into the building's design, meet the required safety standards, and are energy-efficient and cost-effective.

MEP consultant companies use cutting-edge technology and sustainable practices to design systems that are efficient, reliable, and environmentally friendly. They play a vital role in ensuring that buildings are comfortable, safe, and functional, while also reducing their environmental impact.

Name: Gardavaud Univers bois
Description:
Gardavaud Univers Bois est une entreprise familiale française emblématique, spécialisée dans la conception, la construction en bois, charpente, couverture, zinguerie.
Installée à Valdahon, dans le Doubs (Franche-Comté), elle bénéficie d'un savoir-faire de plus de 60 ans.

1. Histoire et Identité
Fondée en 1960, l'entreprise est passée d'une petite scierie artisanale à un acteur majeur de la construction bois en France. Elle est reconnue pour son ancrage territorial fort, utilisant principalement des bois issus des forêts du Massif du Jura, situés à proximité de leurs ateliers.

2. Les Techniques de Construction
Gardavaud se distingue par sa maîtrise de trois techniques principales, permettant de s'adapter à tous les styles (du très rustique au très contemporain) :
Le Madrier empilé : La technique traditionnelle des chalets de montagne. Des pièces de bois massives sont empilées horizontalement pour former les murs.
Le Poteau-Poutre : Une structure robuste qui permet de grandes ouvertures vitrées et de vastes espaces intérieurs, idéale pour des architectures modernes et lumineuses.
L'Ossature Bois : La technique la plus courante aujourd'hui, offrant une grande liberté architecturale en construction modulaire en 2D,3D et d'excellentes performances thermiques

3. Un Engagement Éco-responsable
Bois certifié PEFC : Garantie que le bois provient de forêts gérées durablement.
Circuit court : Transformation du bois dans leur propre scierie et leurs ateliers à Valdahon.
Tri, réemploi...
Performance énergétique : Leurs constructions respectent (et dépassent souvent) les normes thermiques actuelles (RE2020), offrant un confort naturel été comme hiver.
4. Services et Réalisations
Gardavaud Univers Bois ne propose pas uniquement des maisons individuelles. Leur catalogue inclut :
Habitations : Collectifs, Chalets traditionnels et villas contemporaines sur mesure.
Extensions : Pour agrandir une maison existante en bois.
Bâtiments Tertiaires : Bureaux, restaurants, santé, éducation

Name: Timber Framing - The Ultimate Renewable
Description:
Timber Framing – The Ultimate Renewable is the leading choice for building Australian homes. It’s one of the world’s oldest resources, and it’s also where our future lies.

Timber is sustainable, renewable, non-toxic and organic, making timber framing one of the most eco-friendly building materials on Earth. The timber in framing is also carbon positive, which means the production process—from sapling to installation—removes more carbon dioxide than it emits. And that’s great news for our planet.

Innovations and new technologies in our industry mean our timber framing is stronger, production is more efficient, and the final result, in some builds, can last for hundreds of years.

With a network extending across the entire supply chain—from forestry and sawmill workers to preservative suppliers, nail plate and frame and truss manufacturers, distributors, carpenters and tradies—we’re all working
together to build strong, sustainable and beautiful homes while protecting the home we all share.

Uma trajetória marcada por mais de 200 mil m² construídos, mais de 80 empreendimentos entregues e mais de mil famílias atendidas, sempre com compromisso, transparência e rigor construtivo. Cada projeto carrega a união entre técnica apurada, estética impecável e atenção genuína às histórias das pessoas que irão viver ali.

Ao longo de duas décadas e meia, a reputação da Lage se ergueu a partir de valores inegociáveis: excelência, ética, segurança, comprometimento e respeito. Esses princípios sempre guiaram a busca contínua por inovação, processos aprimorados e soluções eficientes, comprovados por certificações como ISO 9001 e SiAC PBQP-H, mantidas por mais de uma década.

Em 2025, a construtora celebra 25 anos com uma nova identidade visual. Um marco que reflete evolução e maturidade e reafirma o compromisso de entregar lares com cada vez mais qualidade, sofisticação e cuidado. 

É um novo capítulo na história da Lage, construído sobre bases firmes e um olhar permanente para o futuro. E sempre com você. 

A satisfação do cliente é nosso principal valor, por isso, atuamos de forma criteriosa na escolha dos projetos e das localizações. Participamos ativamente de todo o processo construtivo, cuidando de cada detalhe, do planejamento à entrega.

A Construtora Lage constrói sonhos!

Name: Circular Buildings Coalition (CBC)
Description:
Given its immense material footprint, contribution to greenhouse gas emissions, and impact on human wellbeing, the built environment is a key leverage point in achieving the goals put forward in the Paris Agreement as well as many other sustainability objectives. Together we are leading the way to a circular built environment.
CBC is a collaboration that convenes industry and thought leaders who aim to accelerate the implementation of circular economy solutions as a way of creating a global built environment that operates within planetary boundaries while ensuring a just transition.

Join us in accelerating the transition towards a circular built environment in Europe. At CBC, we bring together built environment stakeholders to overcome barriers and embrace circular economy practices. 
Why does the CBC exist? The challenges of transitioning to a circular economy in the built environment are vast, with roots at local, national, and European levels. However, many impact-driven organizations worldwide are already addressing these challenges. As a coalition, we aim to amplify their efforts and lead the way forward.

To move forward, CBC has a clear roadmap with the following missions:
•	Creating a common language, skills, and knowledge base around how a circular economy in the built environment can help achieve our climate goals while delivering value to businesses. 
•	Increasing demand for circular economy solutions with the key stakeholders in the built environment. 
•	Realising increased collaboration across the value chain between established high-impact actors, and front-runner organisations, that might not otherwise occur. 
•	Promoting the development and uptake of scalable solutions and best practices that address systemic challenges in a transition to a circular built environment. 

CBC is a partnership between Arup, Circle Economy Foundation, Ellen MacArthur Foundation, Metabolic, WBCSD and WorldGBC, powered by Smith Innovation and funded by Laudes Foundation.

Name: BtrLyf
Description:
BtrLyf connects the building industry through open source Digital Twins for making informed and quick decisions in a $7 trillion building retrofit market. 

We use Digital Twinning principle based on Building Physics and AI to be able to predict and manage building performance through connection of sustainable technologies and funds. Our solution is based on the concept of 'Virtual Audits' that provides a way for remote, quick and low-cost energy assessments for buildings to start with. We have further combined this with augmented intelligence and collaboration technology to enhance stakeholder engagement and valuable data analytics. This is offered on a convenient cloud-based platform that connects stakeholders and offers them value-adding apps.

The built environment sector is the largest contributor to global greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. Buildings use about 40 % of global energy, 25 % of global water, 40 % of global resources, and emit approximately 30 % of GHG emissions. These emissions are set to double by 2050 if we carry on business as usual. The current decarbonization approach in the industry is heavily reliant on experts that perform manual audits (energy assessments) that are time-consuming, inefficient, and costly. The built environment stakeholders such as building owners, facility managers, tech providers and financiers are not fully engaged in the process. This creates a barrier for rapid adoption of sustainable solutions in the industry. 

We will help accelerate the adoption of energy efficient/sustainable solutions through digitizing the whole industry ecosystem with our Open Source Digital Twins Collaborative tech platform. As a market accelerator, our solution will create more jobs and push the green economy further. With the digital approach, we will make green buildings highly accessible and economical for the society.

Name: Future of Construction
Description:
SAVE THE DATE: 20—23 May 2026 for the next Future of Construction Symposium at ETH Zurich. Sign-up below for updates. 

The 'Future of Construction' symposium explores how technology shapes the way we design and build. The accelerating convergence of technological domains in architecture, engineering, and construction (AEC) invites us to rethink human capability, skill, and agency. At this intersection, AI, extended reality, and robotics are transforming digital fabrication and augmented design into active sites of experimentation. The “Construction of Future(s)” edition asks how these technologies are reshaping modes of practice and which futures they might construct.

Name: Invisible Sensors AB
Description:
Invisense's speciality is to measure moisture in building parts where moisture is not desirable. We want you to be sure that you will not face problems in the future because you did not have control of the moisture today. 

We have two main application areas with our products and services. 

1) For maintenance
2) For the construction project

Maintenance
Our ultra thin and passive sensors will last as long as your building lasts. There are two main application areas. One is to install sensors during construction. This will lead to that you actually can measure if there is moisture for instance behind water proofing material where there should be no moisture. Forget about ocular inspections, now your bathroom will be able to tell you if there is moisture where it shouldn't be. This way you can repair less and in time. 

The second application is for repair. Now part repairs of wet rooms are possible. Our sensors ensure that the repair is measurable and therefore a warranty can be given. No more tearing down completely healthy materials - that is good for the economy and climate.

Construction Project 
By measuring moisture and temperature in concrete and screed, you can use exactly so much heat you need to dry out the building parts in time for the next phase in the construction. This way you save yourself hassle and energy costs. Say goodbye to the stressful moments when you realize that a part of your construction project is still wet when the flooring guys have arrived.

Name: SIPSOLUTIONSNZ
Description:
Based in the sunny Bay of Plenty, we are a dedicated supplier of Structural Insulated Panels (SIPs) serving the North Island, committed to quality and innovation in sustainable building solutions. Embrace intelligent building solutions that not only expedite your project but also champion a more sustainable future. Opt for local excellence and build smarter with us.

We are a manufacturer / supplier of the SIPpro Rapid Construction System.

SIPpro is a sustainable, low carbon construction method.
SIPpro is designed for the rapid delivery and installation of large pre-assembled high performance floor, wall and roof panels.
SIPpro is a tested and certified system that satisfies the requirements of the New Zealand building code.
SIPpro is designed to integrate seamlessly with conventional timber framing used in the construction of New Zealand housing.
SIPpro panels are available in sizes from 2.42m long x 1.22m wide panels up to 7.32m long x 2.44m wide whole panels and everything in between.
SIPpro delivers up to 60% savings on your heating and cooling energy costs annually. 
SIPpro Rapid Construction System eliminates over 90% of onsite construction waste.
SIPpro is made using 100% recyclable materials.
SIPpro panels can be repurposed at the end of the buildings intended life into new buildings.
SIPpro uses Sustainable Forest Management (SFM) timber OSB and recyclable materials. It is identical in design and performance to North American OSB SIPs.

Our CNC plant cuts out the doors and windows, allowing us to deliver whole walls to site for rapid assembly. Floors, walls and roofs go up very quickly with our large format panels. Our SIPpro panel is New Zealand made in our factory in Mt Maunganui.

Name: George Grant Engineering Limited
Description:
George Grant Engineering Limited (GGE) is a Papakura, New Zealand based company that was incorporated in 1990 as the advantages of steel as a cost competitive framing system were becoming more widely recognized. With the development of better protective coating systems steel rapidly became a real choice for Engineers and Architects both for its convenience, cost effectiveness and aesthetic qualities. GGE continue to invest heavily in their staff, processes, technology, plant and machinery to maintain our competitive advantage and as recently as 2006 we relocated to our own purpose built factory. Central to our ethos is the concept of ‘lean manufacturing’ which encompasses every aspect of our service offering, concentrating on quality and service by eliminating unnecessary cost and time wastage.
 GGE have a proud record servicing the construction industry in New Zealand and the South Pacific for 34 years, operating out of our own purpose built factory complete with the latest technology and modern machinery. We currently employ around 60 staff and our highly skilled personnel have extensive experience delivering large scale Structural Steel projects for a wide range of diverse customers. 
We pride ourselves on our expertise across all key manufacturing processes – from Drafting through to Fabrication and Erection – and by retaining these skills in-house we are able to exceed our quality, value and service obligations.

Name: Digital Twin Skills Academy CIC
Description:
The construction industry is at a crossroads in a post-Grenfell world. The legal requirement to register in-scope existing [Higher-Risk Residential Buildings] under the new Building Safety Act [BSA2022] came into force on 3rd April 2023, with a view to giving both residents of public [and/or privately] owned built assets the opportunity to have a greater say in the administration of their homes.
 
Having supported the work of the National Digital Twin Programme and the curation of the Digital Twin Toolkit, concluding with the production of the Gemini Papers [at the University of Cambridge via the Centre for Digital Built Britain], the Digital Twin Skills Academy has a very focussed activity in relation to the legal requirement for asset owners to comply with the new [BSA2022] legislation and principally for the benefit of the BAME [Black Asian and Minority Ethnic] communities, seek to address the common and day-to-day challenges experienced by all Young People. The Digital Twin Skills Academy CIC or ‘DTSA’ programme is a place based, social value offer, specifically designed to inform, inspire and equip young people [aged 16-25yrs] offering them a dedicated career pathway into digital construction, with a focus on digital twins.
 
Our offer is inclusive and designed to attract the more mature [50+] cohort, with their lived-experience, along with anyone who seeks a change in career. Through engaging and hands-on educational and work-place opportunities, the Digital Twin Skills Academy CIC continuously cultivates future industry leaders. If this is what you’re looking for, please don’t hesitate to get in touch to learn more about our opportunity in digital construction and a chance to join our growing DTSA community.

Name: ECOCLEAN Coatings

Backed by thousands of successful applications in Japan and Asia, the range was first brought to Australia and New Zealand via the ecotio2 brand. In 2022, the range was rebranded to ECOCLEAN coatings to better communicate the long-term cleaning, safety, and environmental benefits the range provides including:

- Significantly improves internal air quality reducing Sick Building Syndrome (SBS)
- Antimould, antibacterial, antiviral, anti-odour and VOC reducing properties when applied to internal surfaces
- Self-cleaning properties on external building surfaces to deliver pollution reduction, reduced building maintenance costs as well as extended asset life. 

ECOCLEAN coatings work by mimicking how mother nature self-cleans the earth, which is why they provide long-lasting cleaning and safety benefits that are net positive to the environment. Sound too good to be true?

Connect with our expert team today to learn more about ECOCLEAN coatings and how it can protect the surfaces in your world.

Description:

O que era apenas um investimento imobiliário da família com a construção de uma edificação de apenas 10 unidades, veio conquistar a confiança de colaboradores, fornecedores, corretores e clientes, oferecendo oportunidades de investimentos seguros em bens imóveis, entregando qualidade, sustentabilidade.
A empresa continuou crescendo e consolidando a sua marca com a construção de empreendimentos de grande porte, como o Recanto do Cardeal (2014), Strelatto Residence (2017) e Terrazzo Club Residence (2020), e atuação nos municípios de Bombinhas e Itapema.
Neste período a Continente investiu em medidas de governança corporativa, e a empresa familiar aprimorou processos construtivos e administrativos, profissionalizando a sua gestão, tornando-se a primeira incorporadora de Bombinhas/SC a habilitar-se às diversas exigências para permitir o financiamento bancário na fase de construção em alguns de seus empreendimentos.
Em 2022, a empresa que totaliza 228 unidades e quase 35 mil metros quadrados construídos, abre um novo escritório em Bombinhas/SC, para atender clientes nacionais e internacionais, de diversos países e continentes, que não buscam apenas um apartamento em uma das regiões mais belas do Brasil, mas sim uma propriedade imobiliária destacada, com a qualidade da Continente: A marca do seu imóvel na praia.

Name: Futurebuild Australia | Sydney 2026
Description:
Australia’s building sector is at a crossroads. By 2030, we need to deliver 1.2 million new homes, upgrade ageing buildings to meet ESG targets, and slash emissions from a built environment responsible for nearly a third of the nation’s carbon footprint. 

Achieving net zero will demand billions in investment, bold innovation, and industry-wide collaboration. The challenge is immense - but so is the opportunity.

Futurebuild Australia (formerly Archibuild Expo) is the only event dedicated to building innovation, sustainability and next-gen construction - uniting the people, products and ideas that are reshaping how we design, build and retrofit for a better built world.

Core Themes:

   • Building Innovation & Technology
   • Advanced & Sustainable Materials
   • Modern Methods of Construction (Modular & Prefab)
   • Digital Construction, Robotics & Automation
   • Smart Building Systems & IoT
   • Low‑Carbon & Energy‑Efficient Solutions
   • Health, Wellness & Occupant Experience

Futurebuild Australia is more than a trade show - it’s a catalyst for transforming the way we build and future-proof the spaces where we live, work and connect, while accelerating our path to net zero.

Supported by the Australian Institute of Architects and co-located with Design Show Australia and Kitchen+Bath Show, Futurebuild is part of Design & Build Week - Australasia’s largest platform for connecting the entire design, build and retrofit ecosystem.

Name: MASS MADERA Built-by-nature

La misión principal de la red MASS MADERA - Built by Nature es acelerar el uso de la madera maciza industrializada como solución a la reducción de emisiones asociadas con el sector de la edificación y la necesidad de seguir proporcionando soluciones habitacionales y urbanas a una población creciente.

El establecimiento de Mass Madera ha sido posible gracias a una subvención denominada accelerator grant de Built by Nature, una red y organización que otorga subvenciones con la misión de acelerar la transformación de la construcción en madera en Europa. Built by Nature conecta a agentes clave del entorno construido y a comunidades forestales para impulsar proyectos a escala de ciudad y amplificar historias de soluciones y proyectos de madera innovadores. En estrecha colaboración con sus principales socios y pioneros, Built by Nature tiene como objetivo cambiar las percepciones sobre la construcción en madera y remodelar la manera de construir la ciudad.

Built by Nature cuenta con el apoyo del socio fundador Laudes Foundation, que se lanzó en 2020 y es parte de la empresa familiar Brenninkmeijer. Laudes Foundation apoya iniciativas que inspiran y desafían a la industria a aprovechar su poder para el bien y tiene un historial de aprovechamiento del capital filantrópico como catalizador del cambio en toda la industria.

Name: Heat Barrier. Bouwkundige brandpreventie
Description:
Heat Barrier houdt zich sinds jaar en dag bezig met het brandwerend maken van bouwconstructies. Wij zijn gespecialiseerd in bouwkundige brandpreventie. Denk daarbij aan het brandwerend maken van hoofddraagconstructies, kabel- en leidingdoorvoeringen en het plaatsen van brandwerende plafonds en vloeren.

We hebben een passie voor brandveiligheid, omdat we begrijpen hoe verwoestend een brand kan zijn. Voor mens, milieu én materie. Het Bouwbesluit is voor ons dan ook slechts een startpunt. Het is de minimale norm waarnaar wij werken. We zijn het echter gewend om altijd die extra stap te zetten.

Net dat beetje meer om een maximale bescherming te kunnen garanderen. Met effectieve en efficiënte oplossingen voor constructies die beschermen en mensen de kans geven om ruim op tijd een veilig heenkomen te zoeken. Constructies die het houden en zo schade aan het pand tot een minimum beperken. “Hoe eerder, hoe beter.” Door op voorhand al na te denken over brandveiligheid  en een overwogen keuze te maken in de juiste brandwerende coating voorkom je hoge (aanpassings)kosten achteraf. Zo ben je niet alleen zeker van een veilige woon-, werk- en zorgomgeving, maar zorg je er ook voor dat je binnen budget blijft. 
Heat Barrier adviseert en biedt oplossingen die ervoor zorgen dat het gebouw gegarandeerd aan alle normeringen voldoet. Daarnaast leveren we het benodigde brandwerende plaatmateriaal en voeren we alle werkzaamheden uit. Kwaliteit verzekerd. Elke (op)levering gaat gepaard met een uitgebreide (EN) certificering.
Heat Barrier is specialist in het brandwerend afdichten van doorvoeringen. Een belangrijk aandachtspunt bij brandveilig bouwen. Zijn de doorvoeringen in brandwerende muren namelijk niet brandveilig afgedicht, dan lijkt een gebouw veilig, maar is het risico op brandoverslag nog altijd aanwezig. Bouw brandveilig. Bouw met Heat Barrier.

Name: MSCON Design Private Limited
Description:
An MEP (Mechanical, Electrical and Plumbing) consultant company provides design, consulting, and engineering services for the building construction industry. The company specializes in the planning and implementation of mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems in buildings, ensuring that they function efficiently and sustainably.

Mechanical systems include heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems & Fire Fighting System, while electrical systems include power distribution, lighting, and communication systems. Plumbing systems cover water supply, drainage, and sewage.

The role of an MEP consultant company is to work closely with architects, builders, and developers to ensure that the mechanical, electrical, and plumbing systems are properly integrated into the building's design, meet the required safety standards, and are energy-efficient and cost-effective.

MEP consultant companies use cutting-edge technology and sustainable practices to design systems that are efficient, reliable, and environmentally friendly. They play a vital role in ensuring that buildings are comfortable, safe, and functional, while also reducing their environmental impact.

Name: ABIMPE
Description:
Em 2015 foi realizado na Cidade do Recife o VII Encontro de Tecnologia de Informação e Comunicação na Construção (TIC), com o Tema EDIFICAÇÕES, INFRAESTRUTURA e CIDADE: do BIM ao CIM. Nesse evento participaram Profissionais, Professores, Pesquisadores e Desenvolvedores de Softwares da indústria da Arquitetura, Engenharia, Construção e Operação (AECO) com objetivo de discutir as TICs e especificamente o BIM e o CIM.
A partir desse evento foi criado um grupo do WhatsApp que congregou os principais profissionais que despontam na vanguarda do uso da tecnologia BIM no Estado de Pernambuco, possuindo membros que já possuem reconhecimento no Brasil e no Exterior e grupos de pesquisas em instituições como a Universidade Federal de Pernambuco.
Passado pouco mais de 1 ano do VII TIC percebeu-se que para que as discussões pudessem efetivamente contribuir com a consolidação do BIM no Estado seria fundamental a criação de uma associação, independente, autônoma que pudesse lutar pela efetiva implementação e consolidação do BIM em Pernambuco, com possíveis impactos na Região e no País. Assim, no ano de 2017 foi dado início ao processo de formalização da ABIMPE e, no dia 12 de dezembro de 2017 será a data do seu lançamento.

Name: Hidroenergy Engenharia
Build Homes NI
Description:
A group of Northern Ireland’s home builders have come together to launch a new group to tackle the growing crisis caused by the region’s failing wastewater infrastructure.

Decades of underfunding Northern Ireland’s wastewater infrastructure represents a political failure that has created a social, environmental and economic crisis.

A chronic lack of capacity in wastewater infrastructure has led to new home completions falling to a 60-year low and contributing to record levels of homelessness.  The poor state of NI Water’s infrastructure is degrading the environment and undermining wider economic growth.

Please join us in our campaign to increase the number of homes being built in Northern Ireland.

Name: Mengato Gruppo Industriale
Description:
Il nostro gruppo trae origine alla fine del XIX secolo quando il nostro trisavolo Pietro Mengato per primo iniziò quella che sarebbe diventata nel corso degli anni una grande avventura nella storia dell'edilizia veneta. Molti sacrifici hanno accompagnato gli eventi dei nostri predecessori che seguirono il capostipite, oltre 115 anni fa. Dal 1929 Massimo Mengato prese il timone dell'azienda e la condusse per 30 anni fino al 1959, quando Germano, assieme al figlio Enzo, subentrarono alla grande realtà imprenditoriale che già al tempo contava oltre 100 dipendenti. Enzo ha dedicato la propria vita alle costruzioni, offrendo ai propri figli Massimiliano ed Antonio, che sono subentrati alla gestione del gruppo dal 2000, delle uniche ed irripetibili opportunità di crescita, prontamente raccolte e fatte fiorire con metodi sempre all'avanguardia e nel rispetto della storia.
Nel 2013 Mengato genera la Divisione Impianti e l'anno successivo la Divisione Serramenti, nasce cosi GRUPPO MENGATO.
Nel 2015 viene acquisita la SANTINELLO COSTRUZIONI PREFABBRICATI stabilimento dove il gruppo produce elementi prefabbricati in C.A.P.
Nel 2017 nasce CASASERVICE: uno studio di interior design per aiutare i clienti nella ristrutturazione e nell'arredo della propria casa.
Nel 2018 nasce CONFORT-HOUSE 4.0 SYSTEM un nuovo sistema costruttivo in cui la tecnologia di gestione dell'abitazione si fonde con una tecnica antisismica unita.
Oggi, 2022, il Gruppo Mengato riunisce tutte le divisioni in un'unica  grande sede a  Camposampiero. Una sede nuova completa di showroom, dove si possono ammirare 6 box espositivi. Dai bagni alle cucine, alle camere, fino ai salotti e camerette per bambini.

Name: Integrity Enterprises llc
Description:
Integrity Enterprises – Your Estimating Partners

Contractors don’t lose money in the field—they lose it in the bid. That’s why at Integrity Enterprises, we don’t just provide remote estimates—we work as your estimating partners, bringing over 20 years of experience in the union commercial wall and ceiling industry.

With backgrounds as estimators, project managers, and contract sales professionals, paired with a Master’s in Architecture education, we bridge the gap between design intent and field reality. Every bid we prepare is backed by decades of lessons learned, both in the office and on the jobsite.

We deliver three core services that scale with your needs:

Complete Cost Estimating
From detailed quantity takeoffs to full turnkey proposals, we prepare material & labor breakdowns, overhead & profit, and supplier-ready material lists that protect margins and win work.

Estimator Training
We equip new and seasoned estimators with the tools to succeed—teaching blueprint reading, proposal writing, and digital takeoff. 

Training includes industry-standard software such as PlanSwift, On-Screen Takeoff, and QuickBid.

On-Demand Estimating Support

Whether you need help with a single project or ongoing support, we act as an extension of your team—delivering consistent, accurate numbers without the overhead of hiring full-time staff.

Specializing in wall and ceiling assemblies—drywall, light and heavy gauge framing, paint, acoustical ceilings, FRP panels, and doors/frames/hardware—we combine trade-specific expertise with modern estimating technology to streamline workflows and deliver clarity in every bid.

Name: Cool VRF Controls
Description:
Cool VRF Controls Becomes Official Distributor for CoolAutomation

Cool VRF Controls is proud to announce that we are now an official distributor for CoolAutomation, a global leader in smart solutions for HVAC systems. Cool VRF Controls specializes in VRF/VRV, split, and air-to-water heat pump systems, and their innovative products enable seamless and universal HVAC integration, remote management, predictive maintenance, remote diagnostics, and universal automated system control.

One of the key benefits of this partnership is their VRF/VRV controls, which allow for remote monitoring and control of HVAC systems. With Cool VRF Controls' cutting-edge hardware solutions, facilities managers can gain full control of their VRF/VRV systems, even across multiple locations and buildings. This makes it easy to monitor and adjust HVAC settings from anywhere, ensuring optimal performance and energy efficiency.

To make it even easier for facilities to take advantage of these benefits, Cool VRF Controls is now offering Virtual Preventative Maintenance Agreements for facilities that purchase these controls. These agreements provide regular maintenance and check-ups to ensure that HVAC systems are running smoothly and efficiently, reducing the risk of breakdowns and costly repairs.

If you have a VRF/VRV system, now is the perfect time to upgrade to Cool VRF Controls through coolVRFcontrols.com. Here are just a few of the benefits you can expect:

+ Remote Monitoring and Control: With Cool VRF Controls’, you can monitor and adjust HVAC settings from anywhere, ensuring optimal performance and energy efficiency.

+ Predictive Maintenance: Cool VRF Control’s products enable predictive maintenance, allowing you to catch potential issues before they become major problems.

+ Universal Integration: Cool VRF Control’s products are designed for seamless integration into any HVAC system, making it easy to upgrade your existing system.

Name: Exploateringskontoret, Stockholms stad
Description:
På exploateringskontoret, Stockholms stad, har vi en viktig roll i att utveckla och bygga huvudstaden. Vi arbetar med många av Sveriges mest intressanta och uppmärksammade stadsutvecklingsprojekt. 

Exploateringskontoret är en av stadens förvaltningar och vi förvaltar och utvecklar stadens mark för bostäder och företagsområden. Vi ansvarar för stadens investeringar i gator, vägar, torg, parker och andra allmänna platser samt säljer eller upplåter mark med tomträtt och arrende. 

Just nu planerar vi för 140 000 nya bostäder till 2035. Exploateringskontoret projektleder och genomför stadens arbeten med hjälp från specialister inom miljö, landskap, trafik, upphandling och kommunikation.
Vi arbetar nära andra förvaltningar som Stadsbyggnadskontoret och Trafikkontoret och hos oss kan du exempelvis jobba som byggprojektledare, landskapsarkitekt, fastighetsvärderare, projektledare, trafikplanerare, ekonom eller bostadssamordnare.   

Vi är i dag drygt 300 medarbetare. 

Exploateringskontoret håller till i Tekniska Nämndhuset på Fleminggatan 4, Kungsholmen, centralt i Stockholm. Tekniska nämndhuset uppfördes under åren 1963-1965. 

Var vänlig och håll god samtalston. Alla inlägg blir allmänna handlingar och kan komma att diarieföras. Kommentarer eller inlägg som innehåller känsliga personuppgifter och som kränker enskildas personliga integritet får inte läggas upp. 

Kommentarer eller inlägg får inte heller innehålla:
hot, förtal, personliga angrepp eller förolämpningar, hets mot folkgrupp, sexistiska yttranden eller andra trakasserier, olovliga våldsskildringar eller pornografi, uppmaningar till brott eller annan brottslig verksamhet, olovligt bruk av upphovsrättsligt skyddat material, svordomar eller obscena ord, kommersiella budskap eller reklam, repetitiva inlägg/kommentarer samt spam

Vi förbehåller oss rätten att radera kommentarer som bryter mot LinkedIns regler, svensk lag eller något i ovanstående lista.

Name: Kaleidoscope
Description:
Kaleidoscope is a Visualization and BIM services providing company, specializing in the infrastructure, industrial, and manufacturing sectors. Our expertise lies in creating captivating animations that showcase 3D working models of equipment, streamline processes, and explain in-depth installation procedures crucial for understanding methodologies in large construction projects, industrial equipment, and product animations.

In addition to our animation capabilities, we offer comprehensive BIM services designed to enhance project visualization, coordination, and collaboration throughout the construction lifecycle. From initial 3D models to 5D cost estimation, we leverage BIM to create digital representations of both the physical and functional characteristics of buildings. This enables stakeholders to make informed decisions and optimize project outcomes.

Our services include: 3D Visualization | BIM 3D Modelling| Scheduling quantities | construction documentation | Revit architectural family creation | Clash detections | 4D BIM simulation of construction sequence and schedule tracking| 5D BIM cost estimation and budgetary tracking.
Whether through animations or BIM models, our value-added services empower infrastructure projects, industries, and manufacturers to communicate effectively, streamline processes, and engage with their target audience seamlessly.
