Name: Respyre
Description:
Respyre meets the needs of the building industry while allowing your creation of living structures. Bringing nature and construction together. Our solution tackles urban problems such as, air- and noise pollution and relieves the city of other nuisances in order to improve the well-being of all urban inhabitants. 
We aim to make nature-inclusive building easy and sustainable. Therefore, we will implement one of nature’s most influential pioneers. Moss. Our goal is to tackle environmental, urban, and health problems by utilizing moss in- and around cities across the globe. 
We have developed applications for new buildings and renovation projects that will accommodate the growth of mosses on the surface. With its bioreceptive concrete, Respyre turns any unused surface into an opportunity to bring new life into the urban environment. 

Any surface covered in moss, small or large, becomes an autonomous and natural respiratory system for the city. A low maintanance technology that is committed to the natural cycle of resources and the sustainability of the environment. With this, Respyre empowers cities to breathe.

info@gorespyre.com

Name: Reduction Roadmap
Description:
Reduction Roadmap er et banebrydende projekt, der - som det første nogensinde - oversætter Paris-aftalens målsætninger og den planetære grænse for klimaforandringer til konkrete, årlige CO2-reduktionsmål for nyt dansk boligbyggeri. Med konkrete reduktionsmål viser Reduction Roadmap, hvor vi som branche står i dag, hvor vi skal hen, og med hvilken hastighed vi må reducere vores udledning af drivhusgasser for at arbejde indenfor planetens klimabudget og Paris-aftalens målsætninger. 

Reduction Roadmap er et forskningsbaseret værktøj med en klar opfordring til fælles handling blandt alle aktører i den danske byggebranche. Værktøjet er udviklet i et tværfagligt partnerskab, som består af arkitekter, ingeniører, forskningsinstitutioner og NGO’er indenfor byggeriet med afsæt i den nyeste forskning og viden om menneskeskabte klimaforandringer.  

Reduction Roadmap er skabt af Artelia, CEBRA og EFFEKT. Reduction Roadmap 1.0 blev skabt med støtte fra initiativet Boligbyggeri Fra 4 Til 1 Planet. Reduction Roadmap 2.0 er støttet af Realdania.

 Se mere på ReductionRoadmap.dk.

Name: UK NZC Buildings Standard
Description:
A cross-industry initiative to develop the UK's first Net Zero Carbon Buildings Standard. Leading industry organisations BBP, BRE, the Carbon Trust, CIBSE, IStructE, LETI, RIBA, RICS, and UKGBC have joined forces to champion this initiative.

Whilst significant progress has been made in defining what ‘net zero’ means for buildings in the UK, a process of market analysis showed a clear demand for a single, agreed methodology. The UK Net Zero Carbon Buildings Standard will enable industry to robustly prove their built assets are net zero carbon and in line with our nation’s climate targets.

Name: Quantum Passivhaus
Description:
Experts in energy-efficient building design and prefab panels

Quantum Passivhaus is dedicated to accelerating the North American construction sector’s transition to net-zero building standards with energy-efficient design and build solutions.

Since 2017, our team of design, engineering, and construction experts has been using building science practices to meet the growing demand for comfortable, cost-efficient, and ecologically smart buildings. While the roots of our business lie in the design and construction of high-efficiency custom homes, today we provide a range of prefab building solutions for commercial, residential, and mixed-use new builds and retrofits.

Quantum is proud to be Canada's first prefab builder with 4 Passive House Institute (PHI)–certified panels.

This year, we've introduced a series of over-cladding panels to respond to Canada's urgent need to retrofit existing building stock.  These panels attach to new and existing structures and are a tool to affordably and quickly transform existing buildings to net zero or net zero ready performance levels.

We design and produce our innovative prefab panels at our specialized facility in Minden, Ontario, and serve customers across North America.

To maximize the impact of our energy-efficient building expertise, we also provide hands-on training to skilled trade professionals. We are committed to sharing the best building science and our hands-on experiences to help develop and support high-performance prefab construction capability within the building and retrofit sector.

Name: Iran TechnoWood Co
Description:
گروه ساختمانی شاهرخی به عنوان عضوی از شرکت فرداد تهویه فنی شاهرخی که از سال 1360 فعالیت خود را به عنوان بزرگترین تولید کننده ی تجهیزات پخش، کنترل و تهویه هوا در خاورمیانه آغاز نمود، می باشد.
گروه ساختمانی شاهرخی فعالیت خود را از سال 1396 با نام تجاری تک نوین چوب ایرانیان آغاز نمود و اهداف خود را در جهت بومی سازی و اشتغال در کشور با رائه خدمات طراحی، تامین، تولید و اجرا گسترش داد. در سال 1397 به عنوان نماینده انحصاری شرکت تکنوود ترکیه که تولید کننده محصولاتی از جنس آلومینیوم ، جی آر پی، گالوانیزه و کامپوزیت با روکش طبیعی چوب می باشد و از سال 1402 به عنوان نماینده رسمی شرکت ماتک ترکیه که ارائه دهنده ی پرگولا های بایوکلاماتیک، سیستم های سقف شیشه ای، آلومینیومی و پارچه ای متحرک و ثابت، پرده های زیپ دار و سایبان و.... می باشد. همچنین در راستای تکمیل سبد محصولات خود با توجه به نیاز بازار ایران به بازرگانی برند های برتر دنیا پرداخته است.
در کنار ارائه انواع پروفیل با روکش چوب طبیعی با معرفی محصولات نوین ساختمانی از قبیل سقف های متحرک، سیستم نمای موتورایز و ثابت، شیدر های اتوماتیک و دستی، سیستم سقف های پرتابل مقرون به صرفه، جداکننده های فضای داخلی و خارجی و...گامی نوین در صنعت طراحی و اجرا پروژه های ساختمانی برداشته است.
این مجموعه همواره به دنبال ارائه بهترین خدمات با تعهد کامل بر کیفیت و کارآمد ترین روش های اجرایی است زیرا به دنبال ارائه، یک راهکار مهندسی در جهت حفظ معماری پایداراست. گروه ساختمانی شاهرخی با سعی و تلاش واحد های فنی و مهندسی، تحقق و توسعه و نظارت و اجرا با استفاده از نیرو های مجرب و متخصص و با سرمایه گذاری زمانی و ریالی در بخش های مختلف تولید و توسعه به منظور خود کفایی و پیشرفت در این صنعت، گام های بسیار مهمی را برداشته که در سطح ایران و در این رسته بی بدیل و بی رقیب بوده اند.

Name: GRUPO MD ENGENHARIA
Description:
Criado em 2011, o Grupo MD Engenharia possui ampla experiência em gerenciamento de projetos e obras, com forte atuação na construção civil, especialmente em obras corporativas, hospitalares, soluções turnkey e restaurações de fachadas. Nossa missão é oferecer serviços e ferramentas essenciais para a construção de empreendimentos, garantindo inovação, menor prazo, menor custo e qualidade total.

Adotamos uma gestão baseada em processos integrados e alinhada às melhores práticas do guia Project Management Body of Knowledge (PMBOK). Nossa metodologia personalizada abrange todas as fases dos projetos, assegurando que escopo, prazo, custo e qualidade sejam rigorosamente atendidos, com atenção à gestão de recursos, riscos, partes envolvidas, comunicação e segurança.

O Grupo MD Engenharia entrega soluções completas de engenharia em áreas como planejamento e controle, avanço físico-financeiro, gestão de contratações (Procurement), engenharia de custos, fiscalização técnica de obras, diligenciamento, comissionamentos e entrega de asbuilts e databooks. Nossa atuação abrange projetos industriais, comerciais, residenciais, logísticos, hospitalares (Healthcare) e outros empreendimentos de alta complexidade.

Com uma abordagem inovadora e equipes especializadas, o Grupo MD Engenharia é referência em soluções integradas que agregam valor aos empreendimentos, contribuindo para o sucesso dos clientes e a excelência do setor.

Name: Renoo
Description:
Renoo est une entreprise spécialisée la rénovation. 

Nous accompagnons les propriétaires et les professionnels sur leurs projets de travaux, de l'idée aux finitions. 

 Dans le secteur de la rénovation, il est souvent difficile de trouver des professionnels sérieux et de confiance. Les propriétaires sont confrontés à des logements mal isolés, mal agencés et peu fonctionnels. Beaucoup sont déçus par l’expérience des travaux.

Renoo veut changer ça grâce à:

 Une sélection d’artisans de confiance & signataires d’une charte d’excellence.
 Un accompagnement étape par étape avec un interlocuteur unique.
 Des outils, des inspirations et des conseils personnalisés.

Qu’il s’agisse d’un projet d'aménagement, de rénovation intérieure, extérieure ou énergétique, nos experts travaux sont réactifs dans les 72 h pour vous faire un chiffrage et répondre à vos questions.

Notre accompagnement vous permet d’obtenir notamment des conseils travaux, des facilités pour vos demandes de permis, un suivi personnalisé de votre projet et une vérification des finitions par un expert à la levée des réserves.

Notre réseau d’artisan est constituée d’une vingtaine d’entreprises spécialisées dans la rénovation TCE, la rénovation énergétique ou des travaux spécialisés notamment, la menuiserie bois.

Nos critères de sélection des entreprises sont stricts. Pour intégrer notre réseau, les entreprises partenaires doivent avoir au moins 3 ans d'existence, être en possession d'assurances décennales en règle et de certificats de l'URSSAF valides. Dans certains cas, certifié notamment RGE pour nos demandes de travaux de rénovation énergétique subventionné. Également, nous favorisons des entreprises qui disposent de leurs équipes en internes et qui ont pignon sur rue.

Vous avez des questions ? Un projet? Contactez nous au 07 69 32 69 79.

N’hésitez pas à suivre nos aventures sur Instagram pour découvrir plus d'inspirations, de conseils et des échanges avec des professionnels du bâtiment.

Name: ENEIGO
Description:
Eneigo is a full-service provider of engineering systems solutions, offering a comprehensive range of services that includes consulting, design, implementation, and supervision. The company is dedicated to providing its clients with a seamless experience, ensuring that each project is executed smoothly from start to finish.

Eneigo's consulting services are designed to help clients identify the mechanical systems that are best suited for their needs and requirements. The team of experts works closely with clients to understand their operations, processes, and goals, and provides tailored recommendations for engineering systems that align with their needs.

The company's design services are focused on creating efficient and effective engineering systems that meet the unique requirements of each client. The team of experienced engineers and designers creates detailed drawings, schematics, and blueprints that bring clients' ideas to life.

Implementation is a critical stage of any engineering systems project, and Eneigo's team of experienced technicians and engineers ensure that every aspect of the installation is executed precisely and according to the design. The company uses state-of-the-art tools and equipment to minimize disruption to clients' operations during the installation process.

Name: Toits Temporaires Urbains
Description:
Toits Temporaires Urbains a été crée par la Caisse des Dépôts et la SNCF après une phase de 2 ans de Recherche & Développement, menée en groupement avec le conseil Départemental de Seine Saint Denis, qui a permis de mettre au point des bâtiments en bois RE2020, déplaçables et modulables, les BMM. Elle va assurer la rotation d'un parc de BMM sur différents fonciers temporairement disponibles (4 à 7 ans), qui permettra de répondre à des besoins de logement, d'hébergement et/ou de locaux d'activité identifiés sur les territoires.
  
Au-delà la location des BMM, Toits Temporaires Urbains se place en véritable ensemblier des transitions urbaines, accompagnant les porteurs de projets sur les différentes phase précédant la mise en service de leur opérations transitoires : développement du projet, montage, aménagements, construction des bâtiments en usine et installation sur site ...


Sélectionné parmi plus de 27 groupements candidats, le groupement lauréat du partenariat d'innovation, constitué du constructeur bois SELVEA, des cabinets d'architecture VIRTUEL et ALT et de quatre bureaux d’études - Ethic, Géranium, Atelier Rouch et Edile construction - a conçu une solution constructive respectant tous les objectifs d'innovation demandé par le groupement de commande : 
	• Qualité architecturale : formes urbaines variées. Qualité d’usage supérieure aux critères actuels des constructions déplaçables.
 	• Innovation économique : prix maîtrisé et modèle économique innovant reposant sur une offre locative permettant d'amortir les bâtiments sur des durées plus longues
	• Modularité et réversibilité : plusieurs usages possibles (logement, hébergement, activité) 
 	• Performance environnementale : en plus de s’inscrire pleinement dans la logique de sobriété foncière les Bâtiments Mobiles et Modulables répondent à la norme RE2020 (réemploi ,matériaux biosourcés, PAC). Durée de vie estimées > 50 ans
 	• Mobilité : déplaçable moins 3 fois

Open 3D-revit/BIM omgevingen spelen hierbij een belangrijke rol, als coördinerend hoofdconstructeur blijft Van de Laar een stabiele factor in de steeds verder versnipperde rolverdeling binnen de bouw.
We berusten niet in de makkelijkste oplossing, maar blijven altijd "out of the box" denken en gaan op zoek naar de grenzen van wat mogelijk is binnen de constructie (bestaand of nieuwbouw). Dit om tot duurzame, flexibele en innovatieve oplossingen te komen. Oplossingen vinden welke eerst voor onmogelijk gehouden werden maken ons werk leuk en interessant. Bovendien zorgen we ook voor een gedegen begeleiding gedurende de uitvoering van elk project en daarna. Zodat we zeker weten dat onze kwaliteit wordt gewaarborgd.
Om onszelf scherp te houden verzorgen we scholing en trainingen voor onze mensen en zijn we alert op alle nieuwe ontwikkelingen in het werkveld. We hebben een open cultuur, met veel ruimte voor onderlinge feedback. Plezier en uitdaging in het werk maken dat we elke keer weer trots kunnen zijn op de door ons gerealiseerde projecten. Elk project is uniek. Groot of klein, we werken er met evenveel passie aan.

Name: Ecorecycled brick
Description:
Business Summary:
Brick has long been used as a building material. In brick production, dried clay is heated, and bricks are obtained.

Brick production is usually done in two ways: traditional and machine. Of course, many current factories use the technique, including these methods. Production of bricks using clay, which is now common due to the need to bake in high-temperature furnaces, causes high energy consumption and the production of greenhouse gases. In addition, the quality of suitable soil for bricklaying is very close to the quality of agricultural soil. And the existence of numerous factories producing clay-based bricks is a threat to Agricultural soil. In addition to the above, many mining wastes, quarries, construction debris, and bleaching soils in sugar factories are known as environmental wastes. In cities where these industries thrive, these wastes create significant ecological problems. So far, the proposed methods for managing this type of waste usually involve high-priced additives that do not allow the product to compete in the market. In our proposed method, the production of bricks based on mineral catalysts is available at a low price. The produced bricks have significant waste and cheap local minerals as raw material in our approach. The final product has a very competitive price, with clay bricks available. The production method of this product does not require a temperature process at all and minimizes energy consumption in the process.

Name: PYTHON Fasteners
Description:
We have developed a range of specialized products to facilitate structural connections into a wide variety of masonry substrates. This includes extensive applications for preservation and restoration work in existing masonry buildings. Our range of fasteners has led to improvements across the construction industry - enabling more effective and reliable retrofits to be utilized while reducing the time and cost of construction.

Our story

Our story started in assisting the Canterbury Earthquake Royal Commission (New Zealand) in collecting information on the performance of all masonry buildings in the Christchurch area following the 2010/2011 Canterbury earthquakes. The leanings from this event led to over a decade of research into anchor performance in masonry, the earthquake behavior of masonry buildings and the development and validation of seismic retrofit techniques for these buildings.

This task soon became a passion. The passion became our mission: to help protect those who live and work in and around masonry buildings while preserving their heritage value for generations to come.

Our team

Our team comprises of structural engineers with international experience in earthquake retrofit and remedial solutions for masonry buildings, as well as  worldwide post-earthquake building assessment and extensive experimental research experience.

Our expert engineering team is available to provide guidance on structural detailing and design. In addition to extensive product testing data available, we go a step further to ensure the highest level of confidence in our products, by providing on-site proof and quality assurance testing.

Name: Offsite Wood
Description:
Offsite Wood is a nonprofit initiative dedicated to empowering architects and designers with high-quality, efficient BIM content focused on sustainable wood construction. Our mission is to make it easier to design with wood, particularly during the early phases of building projects, by providing practical tools and resources that streamline the process.

We offer a growing library of Revit and Archicad content, including Revit project templates with nested and Python-automated families, prefabricated wall systems compatible with both platforms, and detailed material libraries featuring rich textures and 3D previews. All of our content is freely available for download on our website and is continually updated to reflect current practices and market needs.

To support environmentally responsible design, our models are developed with Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) in mind, often incorporating environmental data sourced directly from product Environmental Product Declarations (EPDs).

Beyond content, Offsite Wood also serves as a bridge to the industry, connecting users with wood product manufacturers across Canada to help bring their designs to life with the right materials and partners.

Name: Wool Insulation Wales - Truewool
Description:
Truewool is a bio based product that provides a safe and effective material for thermal and acoustic efficiency. Created using sustainable and renewable traceable welsh mountain grade wool. Truewool is a natural material that is safe to handle. Wool has the ability to purify indoor air helping improve air quality by the absorption of Volatile Organic Compounds -VOC's commonly found in our built environment that can be harmful to health.
Wool has the unique ability to manage moisture and humidity and can absorb up to 30% of its own weight in water vapour before becoming wet to the touch and without compromising thermal performance which makes Sheep's wool insulation the recommended insulation by the UK & Welsh Govt for safe and effective retrofit of pre 1919 solid wall properties. Bio based insulation such as Sheep's Wool is also the preferred choice for the heritage & listed buildings sector due to the hygroscopic properties of the material.
Wool is naturally fire resistant up to temperatures of 1,040°F (560°C) and is a keratin based protein which means it does not support the growth of mould or mildew making it an excellent choice as home insulation.

Name: Rising Stars Program
Description:
The Rising Stars Program is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit that provides interested youth ages 16-24 with dedicated career support, mentorship and industry exposure to sustainable careers within the construction industry.

By cultivating a steady pipeline of skilled workers for in-demand trades, the Rising Stars Program bridges the skills gap for underrepresented youth while providing employers with a qualified workforce.

A nationally renowned program, Rising Stars is currently offered in six cities across the U.S., including Boston, Mass.; Brockton, Mass.; Brooklyn, N.Y.; Charlotte, N.C.; Cleveland, Ohio; and Newark, N.J.

Description:
BlocStar propose des solutions minérales esthétiques et durables pour l’habillage des bâtiments en ITI et ITE. Ses solutions sont adaptables selon chaque spécificité d’opération tant en neuf qu’en réhabilitation.
Nos briques et plaquettes en béton de parement sont destinées à la réalisation de bardages (murs doubles), vêtages, moucharabiehs, ... .
À partir de nos 3 sites industriels, nous pouvons, au cas par cas, réaliser des produits spécifiques en dimensions, teintes et textures adaptées à l’expression et au rendu des façades de chacune de vos opérations.
Nos produits présentent un faible bilan carbone (voir nos FDES sur le site INIES) et peuvent être proposés en béton dépolluant pour assainir l’air des villes. Nos solutions en béton clair assurent également, grâce à l’effet Albédo, la diminution des îlots de chaleur.
Nous disposons de documents réglementaires (ATEX, DTA) pour assurer la mise en œuvre de nos produits en toutes zones sismiques, ainsi que sur ossature bois.
Les objets BIM pour tous nos produits peuvent être obtenus en lien https://www.blocstar.fr/formulaire-de-demande-de-fichiers-bim/
Enfin, nos équipes (architectes et ingénieurs) vous accompagnent tout au long de votre projet, de la conception à la réalisation.

Name: Fremtidens Grønne Byggeplads - Green Construction Site Of The Future
Description:
English below...

Visionen er, at projektet vil bidrage til fremtidens bæredygtige samfund, hvor tilgængeligheden af bæredygtige alternativer får flere bygherrer til at kræve mere bæredygtige byggepladser.

The purpose is to give the industry evidence of which green initiatives provide the most climate and environmental impact in relation to investments. The vision is that the project will contribute to the sustainable society of the future, where the availability of sustainable alternatives will make more contractors demand increased sustainable construction sites.

Name: Habitat28 Tiny Houses
Description:
Facing the Housing Affordability and sustainability issues head-on, Habitat28 provides an alternative housing solution. Evolving the Prefabricated Homes and merging it with the Tiny Homes Movement, Habitat28 intends to empower consumers with multiple options to suit their housing needs. 
Our prefabricated tiny home units are designed and manufactured in Ontario, Canada, meet Ontario Building Code and are designed and built for year round living. 
We offer cutting edge modern design, eco friendly and sustainable materials and versatile floor plans to suit many different needs and possibilities. Our tiny home units are meant to be installed on a foundation, or concrete / steel posts and are not on wheels, which makes them a great option for laneway housing, garden suites, additional dwelling units and primary tiny homes in the municipalities that allow tiny homes as a primary dwelling. Habitat28 tiny home units are designed to be able to connect to the existing services on site and offer conventional plumbing and water supply possibility. 
Some of the standard features include: large skylight, spray foam insulation, built in cabinetry, hot water on demand, steel frame, double-glazed argon gas filled windows, panoramic balcony, split A/C heat pump for heating and cooling, radiator in-floor heating in the washroom, 4 season, custom window coverings, unique interior and exterior LED light strips. 
Our model home can be toured at our Discovery Centre at the Toronto Premium Outlets Mall, in Halton Hills.
Our reservation process is very simple, and can be completed on our website at www.habitat28.com in 3 easy steps. We have an extended deposit structure, and our units may be financed. 
Currently we have a 6 months waiting list from order to delivery and we ship our units worldwide.

شرکت سوله کاوه پارس یکی از واحدهای فعال در بزرگترین شهر صنعتی ایران شهر ( صنعتی و منطقه ویژه اقتصادی کاوه ) واقع شده است. این شرکت فعالیتهای صنعتی خود را با اخذ پروانه بهره برداری از وزارت صنایع در سال 1372 با ساخت انواع سوله ، اسکلت های فلزی پیچ و مهره ای و جوشی ، طراحی و ساخت انواع جرثقیلهای سقفی ، همچنین ساخت کارخانجات از پی تا کلید آغاز نموده است. این مجموعه پس از گذشت دو دهه علاوه بر ارتقاء سطح دانش کمی، کیفی و کادر فنی خود و با به روز کردن تجهیزات، تکنولوژی و ماشین آلات خود توانسته است در زمینه ساخت انواع سازههای فولادی پیشرفت چشمگیری نماید و طی چند سال اخیر خود را به عنوان یکی از طراحان و سازندگان برتر در سطح کشور و کشورهای همسایه ایران مطرح نماید.
اجرای پروژه های متعدد در کشورهایی همچون عراق، ترکمنستان، گرجستان، افغانستان، ترکیه و ... انتخاب این واحد به عنوان واحد برگزیده شبکه خانههای صنعت و معدن ایران، همچنین اخذ گواهینامههای مدیریت کیفیت مبتنی بر ISO 10668 و ISO 10001 (انگلیس URS) و ISO 10002 و ISO 9001-2008 (آلمان TUV) شاهدی بر این ادعا می باشد.

Name: Ciavest - MM Construction Company
Description:
Martins Mendes has a legacy that dates back to 1995, when it began operating under the name Ciavest, delivering high-quality services across multiple sectors. In 2011, the company evolved its focus to the construction and real estate market — a shift that marked the beginning of a new era driven by innovation, quality, and strategic growth.

Since entering the construction industry, Martins Mendes has built more than 10 residential buildings from the ground up, each reflecting the company’s commitment to smart design, efficient use of space, and long-term value. Separately, it has also completed a wide range of renovation projects — from small-scale interior updates to large, complex overhauls, some of which exceeded R$1 million in investment.

Renowned for its commitment to quality, the company continually invests in cutting-edge technologies, collaborates with trusted suppliers, and maintains a strong alignment between design, execution, and market demand. This formula has led to the consistent delivery of modern, high-value properties that stand out for their durability, aesthetic appeal, and market appreciation.

Innovation is at the core of the company’s DNA. Under the leadership of a forward-thinking director, Martins Mendes actively explores global trends and best practices in real estate and construction. This pursuit has taken the team to some of the most influential industry events around the world — including in the United States, Italy, the United Arab Emirates, Qatar, Germany, Switzerland, and France — bringing global insights back to the Brazilian market.

HØUSE NEXT
Description:
HØUSE NEXT is a European initiative based in Denmark, committed to transforming the housing market. We apply mass-production techniques from the automotive industry alongside some clever tricks to be able to finally address Europe’s housing affordability crisis.

Why HØUSE NEXT?
We started HØUSE NEXT after uncovering a groundbreaking truth: only 5% of a house’s cost comes from the materials in Europe. The remaining 95% is driven by outdated construction methods—where crews spend five to eight months outdoors, installing one nail at a time with handheld tools.

The housing industry is overdue for disruption. Like cars, electronics, and countless other products, homes should be built in controlled factory environments—faster, with consistently higher quality, and without weather-related delays and exposure.

We know we are not the only housing company that has revealed this truth. A quick search will show an abundance of modular, prefab, and 3D-printed housing companies claiming to solve the housing crisis. However, a review of any home sales page or statistical data will reveal that not a single one of these companies has been able to make a real impact on the continuously increasing cost of housing.

We have spent a long time studying both established companies and startups, analyzing why their costs remain so high—often exceeding the price per square meter of traditionally built homes.

Name: FRESH: Future REgenerative production for Sustainable Housing and buildings
Description:
Could becoming regenerative revitalize building production in Sweden?

Regeneration expands on sustainable and circular measures for harm mitigation (e.g., reducing CO₂ emissions) by also focusing on repairing environmental, social, and economic damage and improving well-being. Despite efforts in regenerative building design, building production lacks a similar focus; however, regeneration could facilitate structural shifts in spatial planning and community building by enhancing building practices, businesses, and skills to promote circularity and resource efficiency, potentially achieving climate positivity beyond mere climate neutrality. The FRESH project is investigating the whats, whys, and hows of transforming Swedish building production into being regenerative.

FRESH is financed by Formas, the Swedish Research Council for Sustainable Development, and is a collaboration among three Swedish universities: Chalmers University of Technology (Gothenburg), Lund University (Lund), and Jönköping University (Jönköping). The project's reference group features representatives from Byggherrarna, Byggföretagen, Svensk Byggtjänst, IQ Samhällsbyggnad, Installatörsföretagen, CMB, LTH, Coreco, and Link Arkitektur.

Name: CampoSPHERE
Description:
CampoSPHERE est une entreprise spécialisée dans le réemploi modulaire depuis 2010. Son objectif : offrir une alternative à la démolition des bâtiments préfabriqués en prolongeant leur durée de vie grâce à une solution éco-innovante.

L’entreprise est labellisée « Greentech Innovation » par le Ministère de la Transition Ecologique et lauréate du Concours d’innovation du Programme d’Investissements d’Avenir de l’État (PIA3).

Qu’il s’agisse de bâtiments à usage de bureaux, d’établissements scolaires, de bases-vie ou d’hébergement, CampoSPHERE accompagne les propriétaires dans leur projet d’enlèvement de leur structure modulaire avec pour objectif de viser le “zéro déchet”.

Notre mission en tant qu’entreprise de réemploi modulaire consiste à :
-	réduire la production de déchets, les émissions de carbone et les coûts de démolition, 
-	apporter un accompagnement personnalisé en proposant des   services AMO sur mesure (diagnostic PEMD, Programmiste, rédaction d’appels d’offres, montage d’opérations d’enlèvement de votre bâtiment modulaire en fin d’usage…), 
-	créer des emplois indirects (42 emplois Equivalents Temps Plein), et 
-	respecter les dispositions du II. de l’Art. L.541-1 du Code de l’Environnement (prévenir la production de déchets en favorisant le réemploi). 

Depuis 2018, notre solution a permis le réemploi de 30.000 m² de bâtiments modulaires. Elle a également permis aux propriétaires de générer un demi-million d’euros d’économies. 

Que vous soyez à la recherche d’un bâtiment modulaire ou que vous souhaitiez (dès à présent ou prochainement) vous débarrasser de l’un de vos bâtiments provisoires, CampoSPHERE vous accompagne dans votre projet de réemploi et vous aide à réduire vos coûts tout en limitant le gaspillage de ressources !

Name: IRT Surveys
Description:
Established in 2002, we work with housing associations, local authorities, sustainability consultants and building surveyors to help understand and improve the condition and energy efficiency of buildings in order to maximise budgets and optimising retrofit programmes.

Advanced infrared thermography, specialist drone imaging and energy modelling software from IRT help our customers to tackle the issues of building fabric/roof defects, heat loss and damp & mould. With many unknowns surrounding the condition of existing building stock and the need to become net zero by 2050, IRT play a vital role in capturing building data and understanding the true current condition of properties. 

IRT’s thermal imaging technology solutions provide for all sectors covering all building types from housing stock surveys (using our new integrated MappIR van technology) through to tower blocks, schools, corporate estates, hospitals and highly sensitive sites such as RAF bases.

IRT’s cloud technology platform called ‘DREam’ assesses the energy performance of housing, allowing each organisation to model their properties with recommended retrofit measures, optimise their retrofit plans and match properties to available government funding. 

Combined, it enables us to lead the way in optimising retrofits. Pioneers in the sector, we continue to innovate with the focus on supporting net zero strategies, addressing fuel poverty, meeting sustainability targets, and decarbonising housing stock.

Headquartered in Dundee, Scotland, our services are available across the UK.

	Tem como objetivo gerir Sistemas de Gestão da Qualidade de empresas construtoras.

	Com uma estrutura de documentos única e metodologia própria, tem como maior objetivo desmistificar os processos que envolvem a certificação das empresas construtoras.

Idéalement située, à proximité immédiate de l’axe Rennes-Nantes, notre usine de production couvre un territoire élargi de la Bretagne à la Normandie et jusqu’aux Pays de la Loire. 

𝐐𝐮𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐥𝐚 𝐜𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐭𝐫𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐞𝐧𝐯𝐨𝐢𝐞 𝐝𝐮 𝐛𝐨𝐢𝐬 ! Nous disposons d’une usine de production dimensionnée, équipée et moderne. 
Parce que l’innovation est au cœur de notre ADN, l’usine SOCBOIS est équipée d’une 𝐥𝐢𝐠𝐧𝐞 𝐝𝐞 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐝𝐮𝐜𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐫𝐨𝐛𝐨𝐭𝐢𝐬𝐞́𝐞 𝐦𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐞 : 𝐒𝐦𝐚𝐫𝐭 𝐅𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫𝐲 𝟒.𝟎 𝐛𝐲 𝐙𝐞𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐩𝐬 
Conçue pour s’adapter à une diversité de projets, elle permet de réduire les temps de production tout en garantissant la qualité des livrables jusqu’à la finition.
L’industrialisation de notre processus de production #MOB #FOB nous assure agilité et rapidité d’exécution. Les solutions en ossature bois sont multiples et respectent un cadre qualitatif normé et contrôlé, où l’humain reste maître du jeu à chaque étape.
Cette technologie unique associée à l’expertise de notre bureau d’études, des opérateurs de production et des poseurs garantissent un niveau d’exigence élevé tout au long du processus de construction.

𝐔𝐧 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐣𝐞𝐭 𝐚̀ 𝐛𝐚̂𝐭𝐢𝐫 ? 𝐔𝐧𝐞 𝐜𝐚𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐝𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐚̀ 𝐩𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐠𝐞𝐫 ?  𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐚𝐜𝐭𝐞𝐳-𝐧𝐨𝐮𝐬.

Name: REHOUSE EU
Description:
The focus of the REHOUSE project is to increase the scope and productivity of the renovation process, improve the comfort and satisfaction of building inhabitants and users, and increase the use of integrated solutions for the decentralized generation of renewable energy.
 
Over the course of next 4 years the project will develop 8 innovative and holistic solutions for efficient, cost-effective, and sustainable renovation processes. The solutions will be deployed across 4 demo sites in Greece, Italy, France, and Hungary respectively. This will include detailed designs, pilot set-up and demonstrations to validate the solutions. If proven successful, the renovation solutions can be introduced to the market, implemented on a large scale, and eventually contribute to speeding up the current renovation rate.
 
REHOUSE is a project co-funded by the European Commission‘s Research and Innovation Programme Horizon Europe.

Description:
OPNEX embodies the ideal fusion between building optimization and a futuristic vision. “OP” in OPNEX stands for optimization and operation, highlighting the company’s commitment to constantly improving and refining processes for optimal building performance. This syllable also evokes the idea of elevation, as in "up", indicating a quest for surpassing and excellence both in our internal processes and in the services provided to our clients. “NEX” resonates with “nexus”, a Latin term meaning “connected”, illustrating the point of junction and interconnection, as well as “Next”, which points towards innovation and the future. Thus, OPNEX stands out as a name embodying progress, interconnectivity and readiness for the future, symbolizing a journey towards intelligent and advanced building management systems.

Our expertise:
Installation and commissioning of automatic building control system.
Design and design assistance.

Energy efficiency and optimization of building management.

Name: EPB Center
Description:
EPB Center is the go-to consultancy start-up for planning, coordinating and guiding the process of promoting the implementation and use, maintenance and further development of the CEN/ISO set of EPB standards (CEN/ISO 52000 "family") and safeguard the coherence of their technical content.

Founded in 2017 by two key-actors in the energy performance of buildings sector, as founding parties (ISSO and REHVA), EPB Center has become the Core Service Center for information and technical support on the use of the set of EPB standards.

A high number of experts from many countries worked closely together to develop a coherent set of standardized methods to determine the energy performance of a building (EPB). They have been gathered around the core of EPB Center, which acts as a consultancy knowledge-hub for the implementation of EPB Standards.

Name: Smart Square Project
Description:
The Smart² Project (Smart Tools for Smart Buildings: Enhancing the intelligence of buildings in Europe), aims to develop and deliver the appropriate tools and applications, which will enable the promotion and establishment of intelligence assessment of buildings in Europe, through buildings Smart Readiness Indicator (SRI) scheme. Smart² aspires to deliver a cloud based open platform for assessing the intelligence of buildings, available in all 24 EU official languages, considering as well the specificities of the Member States, with a view to maximize synergies with other EU initiatives.

The Smart² Project is funded by the European Union, under the Grant Agreement Nº 101077241

Name: global contractant
Description:
Dans le cadre de son développement sur le territoire des « Hauts de France et limitrophe » l’entreprise évolue et s’affirme autour d’une nouvelle identité !!!

Fabrik Nord qui a été la rampe de lancement administrative il y a quelques années, se décline maintenant sous la nouvelle dénomination « global contractant ».
Nous avons voulu avec cette nouvelle « Marque » y intégrer à la fois notre métier « le contractant général » et en même temps affirmer notre engagement « global ».
Notre philosophie et nos propres méthodes restent les mêmes : Être toujours à vos côtés et répondre à vos exigences tout en prônant les bons conseils grâce à nos chefs de projets.


Cependant « Fabrik Groupe », avec ses entités Nantes Bretagne et Vendée, conserve son identité historique.
« Fabrik Groupe » et « global contractant » sont dorénavant deux entreprises indépendantes à part entière, et évoluent sur des secteurs géographiques différents.
« Fabrik Groupe » continue donc à évoluer sur l’ouest de la France.

Name: Lam Ambiente srl - Società Benefit
Description:
LAM Ambiente Srl è stata costituita nel 2010, in seguito all’acquisizione di una
storica azienda locale, specializzata da oltre 35 anni nella lavorazione del legno.
Negli anni successivi il gruppo di soci è variato, fino al 2018 quando si è formata
la configurazione attuale. L’obiettivo di LAM Ambiente è quello di trasferire nel
settore della bioedilizia in legno l’esperienza maturata in precedenza, facendo
propri i moderni concetti di ecosostenibilità, bioarchitettura e green economy. La
sede, situata alle pendici del Parco Nazionale delle Foreste Casentinesi, permette
a LAM Ambiente di beneficiare di una tradizione professionale secolare sia nella
lavorazione del legno che nella costruzione di prefabbaricati (con realtà
prestigiose come il gruppo Baraclit Spa).
Attualmente LAM Ambiente è in grado di progettare e realizzare costruzioni in
legno “chiavi in mano” di qualsiasi dimensione e planimetria, completamente
arredate e personalizzabili in base alle più svariate esigenze della clientela.
I valori alla base della mission aziendale sono eco-sostenibilità, risparmio
energetico, rispetto per l’ambiente e per la salute, qualità del prodotto e del
processo produttivo.

Whether you’re looking to modernize your kitchen, create a luxurious bathroom retreat, expand your living space, or build your dream home from the ground up, PQ Companies has the expertise to bring your vision to life.

Our team brings years of experience in real estate, construction, and project management, combining creativity with precision to deliver results that exceed expectations. We understand that every home is unique, and every client has a different story. That’s why we take the time to listen, plan carefully, and guide you through the entire process with transparency and professionalism. From the first consultation to the final walkthrough, we pride ourselves on delivering not only high-quality craftsmanship but also a seamless and stress-free experience.

What sets us apart is our ability to handle every stage of the process under one roof. We don’t just remodel homes—we buy, sell, flip, and build them. This unique approach allows us to view each project through both a design and investment lens, ensuring that our clients not only love their finished home but also benefit from added long-term value. Our work spans everything from small-scale upgrades to full custom builds, always with an emphasis on quality, innovation, and attention to detail.

At PQ Companies, we are more than builders and remodelers—we are partners in creating spaces where families can thrive and memories can be made. Whether you’re a homeowner looking to renovate, an investor seeking opportunities, or someone ready to build new, our mission is to deliver unmatched service and lasting results.

PQ Companies: Building, Remodeling, and Reimagining Homes Across Palm Beach County.

Name: EDGE - Eco Design Green Environment
Description:
EDGE Sustainable Materials Hub

Eco Design Green Environment (EDGE) seeks to inspire and support positive change to the ways in which we design and construct our built environments.

Spread over 3 floors, EDGE offers a continually evolving, design-led
showcase of stimulating materials, collaborative workspaces and on-hand
advice for professionals and public alike. Discourse and discussion are central to the space and we play host to open and inspiring talks, CPD’s and workshops to help enrich the debate and foster a legacy surrounding sustainability.

At a time when the debate surrounding humankind’s impact upon the earth, its
climate and the people who inhabit it continues to intensify, it is more
important than ever that we have a responsible attitude to material
specification. To do so requires makers and manufacturers that are willing to
take a considered approach to sustainability and at EDGE we make it our
mission to find them. 

We seek those that: consciously endeavour to choose raw materials based on provenance and quantity required, aim to reduce the energy needed and pollution created in the production and transportation of their materials, reuse resources and waste, create regenerative materials and utilise closed-loop production methods.

We do not believe that materials designed to reduce their negative social and environmental impact should ever hinder innovation - if anything, they should enhance it. Our aim is to inspire creativity whilst offering a permanent space for aspirational material suppliers and specifiers to connect.

We believe in transparency and think that an honest approach to materiality is
key to making more sustainable decisions when planning our built
environments.

We don’t have all the solutions, but that won’t stop us from striving to discover
them.

Join us in making a start.

Name: Expanded Polystyrene Australia (EPSA)
Description:
Welcome to Expanded Polystyrene Australia (EPSA) – the national leader in the manufacturing and distribution of expanded polystyrene (EPS) products across the country. With a commitment to sustainability and the circular economy, we are dedicated to promoting EPS as the ideal product for a greener future.

At EPSA, we take our role as the national body for EPS seriously. Our mission is to advance the use of EPS in various industries while ensuring responsible practices and product stewardship. We firmly believe that EPS plays a pivotal role in creating a sustainable environment, and we strive to be at the forefront of this movement.

One of our most significant achievements is the development of the POD Code of Conduct. This essential framework lays out the product stewardship practices for the distribution and clean up responsibilities by EPSA registered waffle pod manufacturers. By adhering to these guidelines, we ensure that EPS products are manufactured, distributed, and disposed of responsibly, minimizing their environmental impact and ensuring a circular approach.

Our dedication to responsible EPS waste management led to the establishment of the innovative StyroCycle initiative. Through this initiative, we provide a convenient drop-off service for the community seeking to dispose of their expanded polystyrene waste responsibly. Collected waste is then carefully re-purposed into high-quality building insulation, contributing to the creation of thermally efficient homes and reducing the demand for new raw materials.

EPSA is not only focused on advancing EPS products but also on creating a sustainable and collaborative community. We work closely with industry stakeholders, government bodies, and the public to raise awareness about the benefits of EPS and the importance of a circular economy. Together, we aim to build a future where waste is minimized, resources are conserved, and environmental impact is reduced.

Name: Rebricks
Description:
Rebricks Indonesia is a company whose mission is to be a solution for the plastic problem in Indonesia by turning plastic waste into building materials. We started our work in July 2018. We focus our research on recycling rejected plastic waste (i.e: Multilayered plastic, soft food packaging, mix materials plastics). After one and a half years, in November 2019, we launched our first product, Rebricks Pavers. 

We focus on recycling rejected plasti because we found that scavengers, private waste collectors, and regional waste banks in Jabodetabek don’t collect or sell sachets waste; it has no economic value. Sachet waste ends up in incinerators, landfill, or polluting environment.

Our first product, Rebricks Pavers recycles sachet. Our pavers have undergone pressure power tests in B4T of The Ministry of Industry. Rebricks Pavers have 250kg/cm2 pressure power; it fits type B criteria in Indonesia National Standard (SNI 03-0691-1996). We produce up to 100 m2/day. In 100 m2 of pavers, we recycle around 88.000 sachet waste.

Name: Projsite Sweden AB
Description:
Projsite är den digitala plattformen som förenklar och optimerar byggprojekt genom att samla hela logistiken på ett ställe. Med smart samordning som leder till ökad säkerhet, bättre effektivitet och ett tydligt hållbarhetsfokus ger vi byggföretag full kontroll över sina projekt – från planering till genomförande.

Genom att samla allt i ett kraftfullt och användarvänligt verktyg gör vi bygglogistiken mer överskådlig och förutsägbar. Plattformen hanterar leveranser, resursbokning, avfall och lager på ett strukturerat sätt, vilket minskar dubbelarbete och skapar tydligare flöden. Dessutom ser Projsite till att kommunikationen mellan olika aktörer i ett projekt blir tillgänglig. Resultatet är en smidigare vardag för alla aktörer i projektet, där rätt resurser finns på rätt plats vid rätt tidpunkt. 

Säkerheten på byggarbetsplatsen stärks genom kontrollerade transporter, tydliga flöden och uppföljning av incidenter. Det skapar tryggare arbetsmiljöer och minskar risken för olyckor och störningar. Med Projsite kan projektledare och team enkelt följa upp trafikflöden och transporter, vilket bidrar till både ordning och säkerhet i byggprocessen.

Effektiviteten ökar genom smart resursplanering. Oavsett om det handlar om kranbokningar, mellanlager eller materialleveranser hjälper Projsite till att optimera utnyttjandet av resurser och minska väntetider. Genom att digitalisera flöden och minska beroendet av manuell administration frigörs tid och pengar som kan användas där de gör mest nytta.

Samtidigt får företagen möjlighet att arbeta mer hållbart. Med miljöstatistik, avfallsdata och spårbarhet i transportflöden blir det enkelt att följa upp och ta ansvar för projektens miljöpåverkan. Genom insiktsfull statistik stödjer Projsite byggbranschens gröna omställning och bidrar till en mer cirkulär och resurseffektiv byggprocess.

Vi gör det möjligt för byggföretag att fokusera på själva byggandet, medan vi tar hand om komplexiteten.

We utilise Insulated Concrete Formwork (ICF) technology to build quickly, efficiently, and with reduced labour. This construction method allows for reduced programme timescales and reduced construction waste, and importantly, no large pre-fabrication costs, months in advance.

We undertake residential, commercial, and domestic development projects, installing insulated raft foundations and constructing insulated concrete walls. We can facilitate a Design & Build service that provides the engineering specification along with necessary surveys and the supply and installation of both sub- and super- structures.

We provide a streamlined service at competitive costs.

We aim to bridge the gap that has historically left sustainable housing out of reach for many and to inspire developers to construct environmentally friendly properties at scale.

Name: Lime Green Products
Description:
Lime Green was founded in 2002 and has established itself as the UK's foremost manufacturer of hydraulic lime mortar, lime plaster and lime render.

Our products are used in a vast array of projects from London Landmarks to residential cottages and self builds, cutting edge commercial developments to art galleries and Chelsea show gardens.

Our products have helped build, renovate and conserve iconic places such as Kings Cross, St. Pancras and London Bridge stations, among others.  Memorial Arch, Gunnersbury Park Museum, Damian Hirst’s Newport Street Gallery, Shakespeare’s Globe and Westminster Fire Station.

Lime Green's State of the art mixing plant is located just outside Much Wenlock in Shropshire. Continuing over 500 years of lime production on Wenlock Edge.  We have capacity to hold 600 tonnes of raw materials, providing the capacity for a daily manufacturing output of approx. 100 metric tonnes. A sophisticated software system ensures highly accurate computer-controlled batching of ingredients for all lime-based products.

We are also leaders in insulation for solid wall structures.  Our innovative Warmshell System combines woodfibre insulation with either our Solo plaster or renders to create a highly effective, internal or external insulation system.

By working with other companies and organisations, as well as through ongoing research and development in key areas such as product chemistry, environmental assessment and historic building maintenance, we continue to make our lime-based products even better.

Name: COOCK BIMup
Description:
BIM (Building Information Modeling/Management) heeft zich stevig gevestigd als een pijler in de bouwsector, maar de adoptiesnelheid varieert aanzienlijk tussen bedrijven wat betreft snelheid en diepgang. Vooral bij de ware digitale pioniers groeit het besef dat BIM niet alleen gaat om 3D-software; het is een holistische benadering om het volledige bedrijfsproces te bekijken. Het dient als een digitaal kader om het hele bouw- en bedrijfsproces te structureren, waardoor efficiëntere, op data gebaseerde samenwerking mogelijk wordt in de sector.

 We zijn verheugd om een baanbrekend project aan te kondigen dat tot doel heeft BIM naar nieuwe hoogten te brengen in de hele bouwsector, het bevorderen van betere samenwerking en het introduceren van innovatieve BIM-toepassingen. Voor nieuwkomers betekent dit het opzetten van een meer digitale workflow. Voor meer geavanceerde bedrijven zal dit project leiden tot diepere integraties met bedrijfsprocessen, technologie en innovaties.

Het COOCK-project BIMup, met de steun van VLAIO - Flanders Innovation & Entrepreneurship, biedt een schat aan generieke use cases, samen met bijbehorende sjablonen, stapsgewijze handleidingen en documentatiebladen die online beschikbaar zijn.

Onze focus ligt op een snelle adoptie en integratie van deze resultaten, wat leidt tot aanzienlijke efficiencywinsten en het creëren van extra werkgelegenheid binnen bedrijven. 

Sluit je aan bij ons om de bouwsector te revolutioneren door verbeterde BIM-praktijken! Verken de mogelijkheden, ontgrendel efficiënties en omarm de toekomst van de bouw met ons. Samen zullen we een helderdere, meer digitaal gedreven toekomst bouwen.

 Een samenwerking tussen Buildwise, Embuild Vlaanderen, Netwerk Architecten Vlaanderen (NAV) en Techlink

קבוצת שבירו, מהמובילות בתחום הנדל"ן בישראל מאז 1944, מתמחה בייזום וביצוע של פרויקטים רחבי היקף למגורים, נכסים מניבים, מסחר, מלונאות ודיור סטודנטים. הקבוצה, בבעלות משפחת שבירו, משלבת בין מסורת עשירה לבין חדשנות טכנולוגית מתקדמת, ומובילה את ענף הנדל"ן הישראלי באיכות, במקצועיות ובשירות אישי.

עם שליטה מלאה ועצמאית בכלל שלבי הפרויקט – משלב הייזום, התכנון והרישוי ועד לביצוע, השיווק וליווי הלקוחות – קבוצת שבירו בונה באלפי יחידות דיור בפריסה ארצית רחבה בערים מובילות כמו תל אביב, רמת גן, פתח תקווה, ראשון לציון, חיפה ועוד.

עקרונות היסוד של הקבוצה – יושרה, שירותיות ואיכות – מנחים את פעילותה יום-יום. לאורך עשרות שנות פעילותה, הקבוצה שילבה בין חזון חלוצי, ערכים משפחתיים ושאיפה למצוינות, תוך שמירה על מחויבות עמוקה לצמיחה ושגשוגה של מדינת ישראל.

בנוסף למומחיות הנדסית וטכנולוגית, קבוצת שבירו מתאפיינת בהון אנושי יוצא דופן – מיטב האדריכלים, המהנדסים והקבלנים, הפועלים יחד בתכנון וביצוע חסרי פשרות.

הקבוצה ממשיכה להוביל פרויקטים מורכבים וחדשניים, ליישם סטנדרטים יוקרתיים ולספק מענה כוללני בכל תחומי פעילותה – ממגורי יוקרה ועד נכסים מסחריים ודיור מוגן. עם מחויבות בלתי מתפשרת ללקוחות ולעובדיה, שבירו היא לא רק מובילת שוק אלא גם בית חם המעניק חוויית נדל"ן יוצאת דופן.

לקבוצת שבירו – מסורת, איכות, וחדשנות בבנייה לדורות.

Name: Tiny Heirloom
Description:
As a family-run business, we hold our values and principles close to heart in every decision we make. We believe that upright integrity and hard work are how a company makes history.
With over a decade of team experience in residential construction, we realized there was something more meaningful in building tiny. So we immersed ourselves in the tiny home movement and despite all its glory, we found there was something lacking. Downsizing to create a more simple and free life is what it’s all about but at what point do you stop compromising your living standards?

We decided to bridge the gap so that downsizing doesn’t have to mean downgrading. At this point, we realized there was something special so we took it even one step further. Why couldn’t we create a way for someone to downsize and upgrade at the same time?

So, striving to take a creative and fairly new tiny home platform and make it exceptional on all fronts, spurred us on to come up with a way people can take ownership of the simple yet complex thought that “less is more”.

We have set out to do just that.

Name: Clean Concrete (ReCem & ReCinis)

Our solutions, ReCinis (SCM*) and ReCem (alternative binder) are/enable:
• Significant CO2 reduction
• Scalable
• Easy to adopt/use
• Cost competitive

ReCinis – SCM*
• A waste fly ash recycling process
• Produces a C618/EN450 standard compliant fly ash or SCM*
• 20%+ replacement for cement
• A direct replacement for fresh fly ash
• Provides the concrete industry with a reliable source of consistent quality ash for decades to come, long after coal -fired power plants are phased out

ReCem – Alternative binder
• A Geopolymer binder (fly ash based)
• 100% replacement for cement
• Circa 90% lower CO2 footprint
• Enhanced performance
• Easy to adopt/no major change required to existing precast operations

*SCM – Supplementary Cementitious Material

Name: INBUILT Project
Description:
INBUILT is an EU-funded Horizon Europe project focused on transforming sustainable building practices in Europe. Led by Université Côte d'Azur, the project will develop and demonstrate 10 innovative building products and systems designed to reduce the carbon footprint of buildings significantly.

These products, utilizing local bio- and geo-materials as well as reused and recycled components, will be tested in real-world settings in France, the UK, and Germany. INBUILT's collaborative approach, involving a consortium of 16 partners, aims to advance the construction sector by demonstrating the viability of sustainable materials and construction techniques.

In addition, these solutions will be coupled with a digital platform, employing a Building Information Modelling approach to optimize the lifecycle management of construction projects, enhanced by Integrated Project Delivery. This initiative aligns with Europe's sustainability goals by promoting resource conservation and efficiency in the construction industry.

Le génie civil, la rénovation, la transformation et la démolition ainsi que la plâtrerie, gypserie et isolation extérieur sont nos domaines de compétences. 

Nous comptons actuellement plus de 40 collaborateurs à temps complet et renforçons ponctuellement nos effectifs par l’engagement de personnel intérimaire ou de sous-traitants, notamment dans le domaine spécifique de la pose d’armature.

Nous souhaitons continuer à nous affirmer et nous implanter dans notre secteur de marché, mais également contribuer au développement du tissu économique régional.

La force de René Seuret SA repose sans conteste sur la capacité de ses collaborateurs à mettre en commun leur savoir et leur engagement pour atteindre un but partagé: bâtir ensemble !

Quels que soient les postes qu'ils occupent, les femmes et les hommes de l'entreprise constituent le cœur de compétences de René Seuret SA.

Respecter l'homme, sa sécurité et son environnement, sont nos principales préoccupations. L’entreprise attache beaucoup d’importance à la valorisation du personnel et au capital humain.

Nous avons aussi tout particulièrement à cœur d'œuvrer pour le développement durable et l'environnement en triant les déchets de chantier de façon scrupuleuse mais aussi en effectuant des choix respectueux de l'environnement en économisant ainsi les ressources naturelles pour les générations à venir.

Ensemble, bâtissons demain !

Name: Livful tiny & compact kit houses
Description:
Master your space and live more efficiently as we have given the tiny houses different qualities through maximising the space: www.livful.ee. Natural, climate friendly, full of natural light, and affordable to bring meaningful life everywhere. The DIY house kits are just like at IKEA, our panels come straight from the factory to your door ready to be assembled at site within couple of hours by just 2 people. 

The flat packaged kits offer optimal transportation efficiency everywhere – from cities to sandy beaches and mountains.  Livful mini house kits consist of panels, doors and windows which are large enough for fast assembly yet light enough for 2 people to lift and assemble without additional lifting equipment.  Cross-laminated timber (CLT), which is used in panel production, is a wood panel product made from gluing layers of solid-sawn lumber together. This ensures full use of the material and shape stability and offers better shape retention than log cabins. 

Our house kits are designed for a comfortable fit, are error free and assembled within hours, not days. The CLT panels, doors and windows are connected at the building site by a combination of grooved joints, special screws and glue making the connections airtight. All the details and pretreatments of the house are double controlled, ensuring that your kit is as easy as possible to construct. The roof and floor of the Livful mini house are made of the same CLT panels as the wall. 60 mm floor and roof thickness reduces cold drafts, prevents the outside chilly air from entering the house and prevents heat loss.

Name: First Priority Restoration
Description:
Moving you forward when disaster sets you back.

First Priority Restoration is a seasoned, dedicated, and comprehensive disaster restoration company with decades of industry experience. Specializing in responding to and mitigating the aftermath of disasters, First Priority Restoration has become a reliable partner for homeowners and business owners alike.

The company stands out due to its 24/7 availability for emergency services, which is vital in disaster situations where prompt response can mitigate further damage. Whether it's water damage, fire damage, mold remediation, or other restoration needs, First Priority Restoration has a team of skilled professionals equipped with the latest tools and knowledge to handle any restoration job, irrespective of its scale.

One of the unique features of First Priority Restoration is its forensic estimating service, a highly accurate method of assessing damage and providing detailed, fair, and transparent restoration cost estimates. This service is particularly valued by clients for its honesty and reliability, especially in times of distress.

The company also offers surgical construction services, meaning that they can not only mitigate damage but also reconstruct and restore damaged areas to their original condition. This service is invaluable to clients who want a seamless and swift return to normalcy after a disaster.

The First Priority Restoration team is fully committed to providing exceptional customer service, always ready to address any questions or concerns that clients may have throughout the restoration process. In times of disaster, clients need a company that understands their distress and works diligently to alleviate it.

In essence, First Priority Restoration's approach goes beyond merely addressing physical damage. The company's commitment to quality, transparency, and customer care makes it a beacon of hope and support when disaster strikes.

Name: Practical BIM
Description:
"Practical BIM" a pour but de faciliter l'utilisation de la maquette numérique dans le bâtiment, afin :
     - d'augmenter votre productivité et d'améliorer votre organisation
     - d'augmenter la fiabilité et la qualité générale des documents produits
     - de développer l’innovation, basée sur le traitement de la donnée

UN CONSTAT PARTAGÉ :
1) Beaucoup d’entreprises du bâtiment n’utilisent pas encore la maquette numérique, et encore moins le BIM (démarche collaborative),
2) Quand elle est utilisée, la maquette numérique est souvent non-conforme ou incomplète,
3) Beaucoup de bureaux d’études sont actuellement en surcharge, d’où un besoin de sous-traitance ou de changement de méthode de production.

LE BUT DE PRACTICAL BIM :
Le déploiement du BIM et de la maquette numérique.

DES PRESTATIONS SUR 3 AXES DE DÉVELOPPEMENT :
1) INTÉGRATION BIM
          -Formation généraliste sur le BIM
          -Formation logiciels métier (SimpleBIM, BIMoffice,…)
          -Mise en place du processus BIM
          -Partenaire CADatWORK
2) ÉTUDES
          -Conformité maquette (vues métier, modèle analytique,…)
          -Calcul réglementaire Bbio_DH pour permis de construire
          -Analyse de cycle de vie (ACV) pour RE2020
3) RÉALISATION
          -DPGF : extraction de quantités (économie de la construction, entreprises)
          -Plans de localisation 2D et 3D
          -Montage de maquette « structure » et DPGF
          -Accompagnement à la mise en place du DOE numérique

Name: Karma Consultants
Description:
Karma Consultants are a team of Professional Chartered Engineers and Technicians dedicated to the commissioning and completion tests for building services (MEP) within buildings or facilities. Our Engineers understand everything about system design intent and therefore are ideally placed to ensure the system installed is commissioned correctly, following sound engineering and established step processes we will ensure the design performance is achieved.
Not only can we track the commissioning process and report progress with achieved acceptance criteria, we can compile all the O&M and Training requirements so that the transition and handover to FM agents is smooth and efficient.
We can advise what should be incorporated into O&M Manuals for any project including the number of volumes required, the relevant drawings, T&C reports and certain manufacturers information. All O&M Manuals and associated documents follow best practice guidance as issued by BSRIA, CIBSE and ASHRE.
We are specialists with trouble shooting badly performing buildings. We can analyse the controls as well as check air and water volumes to see what may be causing problems.
We carry out condition audits for Clients who wish to understand remaining life expectancy of main plant and equipment. The same audits can be used to monitor the effectiveness and value of FM contractors who may be engaged.
No matter what the project nature; we have expertise for commissioning and project completion work for Residential, Educational, Hotels, Retail, Leisure, Healthcare, Rail and Military projects.

Name: Applied Engineering Constructions (AEC)
Description:
AEC (Applied Engineering Constructions) is led by second-generation construction professionals with over 30 years of combined, hands-on experience across residential, commercial, and complex infrastructure projects. Trained on active sites and alongside seasoned industry leaders, we understand that successful construction is not just about execution—it is about making the right engineering decisions early.

AEC helps developers, asset owners, and investors transform complex projects into buildable, sustainable, and high-performing systems. We engage at the pre-construction and early decision stage, applying structural optimization, buildability engineering, and Flow Engineering to reduce execution risk, improve efficiency, and align design, construction, and energy strategies.

Our work also integrates advanced engineering, computational design, delivery intelligence, and renewable power planning to support High rise communities, data centers, industrial facilities, and large commercial infrastructure. AEC operates as an engineering control partner—from feasibility and project delivery to long-term operations—and selectively participates in SPV-based asset models where engineering certainty and demand are clear.

We focus on efficient structural systems, practical sustainability, and lifecycle thinking to build assets that last, perform, and remain relevant over time.

Let’s build with intent.
#AppliedEngineering #Buildability #EngineeringFirst #SustainableInfrastructure #InfrastructureDevelopment #AssetCreation #FlowEngineering

Description:
Collaborative Design & Build : Transforming Budgets into Masterpieces with Transparency

At our firm, we believe in the power of collaboration and transparency in design and construction. We understand the importance of working within your budget and maximizing its potential. Whether you have a budget of 300,000 Naira or any other amount, we excel at utilizing it wisely to bring your vision to life.

Moreover, we work closely with you to plan each phase of the project in alignment with your financial resources. Let's say you have a subsequent payment of 200,000 Naira. We will allocate that specifically to cover workers' pay, prioritizing their skill and dedication to realize your project.

Our goal is to make your building experience seamless and hassle-free. We are committed to providing you with peace of mind as we navigate the complexities of the construction process. By fostering open communication and transparent financial management, we ensure that you can build your dream structure with ease, knowing that your budget is being utilized optimally.

Name: SABATsarl - Société d’Aménagement et des Bâtisseurs
Description:
Bienvenue chez SABAT Sarl
 Plongez dans la nouvelle ère de l'éco-construction avec SABAT Sarl
 Qu'est-ce que l'Écoconstruction ?  L'écoconstruction favorise des matériaux naturels comme la terre crue, minimisant l'impact environnemental grâce à l'argile.
 Les avantages de la Terre Crue :
 Confort Acoustique : Profitez d'une isolation acoustique de premier ordre avec la terre crue, qui atténue les bruits extérieurs pour un intérieur tranquille et apaisant.
 Régulation Thermique : Bénéficiez de la propriété thermorégulatrice de la terre crue, qui maintient une température ambiante agréable toute l'année.
 Santé et Bien-être : Vivre dans un espace où l'air est pur, sans composés chimiqued, c'est choisir un habitat sain pour vous et votre famille.
 Écologie Profonde : Choisissez un matériau dont la production a un faible impact sur les ressources naturelles.
 Design Unique : La terre crue offre une palette de possibilités esthétiques pour des créations architecturales originales.
 Innovation avec nos Cloisons BB :
 Zéro Bois : Nous éliminons complètement le bois de nos processus de construction, contribuant à la préservation de nos forêts.
 Durabilité : Nos Cloisons BB ne se contentent pas d'être écologiques ; elles apportent également une solidité de l'ouvrage.
 Impact Local : De #Bassam à #Songon, en passant #Bouaké  et #Korhogo, et bientôt à #Yakro, nous incarnons l'innovation dans le domaine de l'éco-construction.
 Nos Engagements :
 Architecture Innovante : Nous combinons design contemporain et fonctionnalité avec des matériaux haut de gamme pour garantir une durabilité sans compromis.
 Expertise Artisanale : Notre équipe, composée d'artisans et d'ouvriers expérimentés, s'engage à réaliser des ouvrages de qualité.
 Éducation Environnementale : Nous sensibilisons les communautés aux bienfaits de l'écoconstruction via des vidéos lives
 Rejoignez la révolution verte avec #sabatsarl La durabilité n'est plus un concept lointain.

De par son implantation d’origine dans une région sismique, CTE Bois est fort d’une expertise reconnue dans le domaine du Génie parasismique, tant pour les ouvrages neufs que pour les projets de restructurations.

Cette complémentarité interne à l’entreprise permet de concevoir les structures en s’efforçant d’utiliser le bon matériau au bon endroit pour apporter une réponse pertinente aux différentes contraintes architecturales, structurelles et environnementales.

Name: Lean Construction Institute - Nashville Community of Practice
Description:
Lean Construction Institute - Nashville Community of Practice is a local network for Owners, Designers, and Construction professionals committed to advancing their careers, improving project outcomes, and fostering a culture of Lean thinking. We bring together individuals passionate about innovation and collaboration.

As a member of our CoP, you’ll gain access to: a vibrant community of Lean practitioners to expand your network; opportunities to share and learn best practices to enhance individual, team, and organizational success; and a variety of events and activities, including:

– Gemba Walks: Experience Lean in action
– Educational Sessions: Build your skills and knowledge
– Networking Events: Connect over coffee, golf, or project presentations

OUR MISSION:
Empower Lean thinkers and adopters in our local area by providing the tools, resources, and connections needed to:

– Advance their careers by learning Lean techniques and applying them effectively

– Create impact through workshops, success stories, and Lean training sessions

– Build a stronger community that drives innovation and eliminates waste across the construction lifecycle

HOW WE’RE TRANSFORMING THE INDUSTRY:
– Promoting Collaboration: Bridging the gaps between Owners, Designers, and Builders
– Enhancing Satisfaction: Lean project delivery ensures every stakeholder sees value
– Encouraging Continuous Learning: Inspiring growth and Lean adoption through our events

JOIN LCI TO FURTHER ADVANCE YOUR LEAN JOURNEY:
While CoP participants are not individual members of LCI, your company can become a member to unlock even more benefits! LCI membership includes:

– Exclusive access to Lean training and tools 
– Discounts on workshops, webinars, and the annual LCI Congress – the premier event for Lean learning and networking 
– Access to dedicated LCI professional staff

STAY CONNECTED: 
Follow this page for updates on upcoming events, webinars & trainings, or visit www.leanconstruction.org

 Costruzioni civili e industriali

Ogni progetto è per noi una missione: disegnare il futuro con strategia, precisione e impatto reale.

Non inseguiamo il cambiamento: lo guidiamo.

 Con visione imprenditoriale, spirito operativo e ambizione globale, stiamo costruendo un impero che unisce ingegneria, sostenibilità e presenza concreta sul territorio.

Disegniamo il futuro, lo rendiamo realtà e portiamo il nostro nome ovunque conti davvero!

Grâce à la combinaison de ces connaissances hétérogènes et de notre équipe dont la fierté témoigne du sentiment d’appartenance qui est cultivé chez nous, SA Construction est en mesures d’entreprendre les travaux les plus audacieux, complexes et uniques de l’industrie.

Quality Air Services provides restoration, maintenance and replacement needs of all heating, ventilating and cooling systems found in multi-family properties located in the Washington DC Metropolitan area.

We provide a vast amount of niche services and products - from pipe freezing services and fan coil unit repair/replacement, to closed-loop riser re-pipe and valve replacement services. .

We also provide full line of maintenance, cleaning, repair and replacement services for your property's HVAC systems (to include fan coil units, heat pumps, split systems, furnaces, rooftop units, etc...)

Next time you are having any type of heating, ventilation or air conditioning issue, please give us a call to set up a time to speak with one of our qualified professionals. We would love to have a conversation with you and your team on how we might be able to prevent and protect your multi-family property/portfolio from HVAC related issues as well as leaks and water damages caused by faulty or outdated HVAC equipment/piping.

Name: Reha-Bau Kft.
Description:
A Reha-Bau az 1990-es években indult családi, építőipari vállalkozás. Révész Róbert ebben az időszakban az építőipari szegmens résztvevői edukációjára kiemelt figyelmet fordított. A kezdetben kitűzött célok egy része megvalósult, egy része módosult, viszont az elmúlt években csatlakozó, a családi vállalkozást a szívükön viselő örökösök, új perspektívákat beemelve a cég életébe, annak jelenét megreformálva szolgálják ki a hazai piacot. 

Célunk, hogy ügyfeleink számára értéket teremtve, kifogástalan minőségben végezzük el a munkát, úgy, ahogyan azt az elmúlt években is a Reha-Bautól megszokhatták. Első sorban műgyanta burkolatokkal, illetve annak szakszerű és hosszan tartó kivitelezésével foglalkozunk. Ezen felül szerkezet megerősítéssel, utólagos szerkezetmegerősítés, amely a maga nemében a piacon innovatív technológiaként ismert. De minden kihívást örömmel veszünk és bátran állunk bele olyan feladatokba, amely sok esetben aprólékosságot és fokozott figyelmet igényel. Az építőipar hektikusságát kiegyenlítve, a Reha-Bau az a partner ügyfeleink számára, aki hosszú távon, minőségben jelent biztos pontot.

Name: Reir Verk ehf.
Description:
Reir Verk er dótturfélag Reir eignarhaldsfélags, sem var stofnað árið 2005 af Hilmari Þór Kristinssyni og Rannveigu Eir Einarsdóttur.  Á fyrstu árum félagsins voru grunnstoðir Reir ehf. endurbætur og nýbygging á fasteignum, aðallega í miðbæjarkjarna Reykjavíkur.

Síðustu ár hefur meginmarkið eignarhaldsfélagsins verið að þróa fasteignir og lóðir með sölu eða rekstur í huga. Reir Verk ehf. byggir á þeirri reynslu sem hefur skapast innan móðurfélagsins og er í dag öflugt byggingarfélag sem vinnur að fjölbreyttum fasteignaverkefnum.

Fyrirtækið hefur á að skipa öflugum starfsmönnum, stjórnendum og tækjabúnaði og getur því tekist á við verkefni af hvaða stærðargráðu sem er. Okkar markmið er að veita einstaklingum, fyrirtækjum og stofnunum heildarlausnir í byggingarverkefnum. Við miðum að því að veita góða þjónustu og framleiðum vöru í hæsta gæðaflokki. Við leysum fjölbreytt verkefni frá upphafi til enda og veitum lausnir í gegnum allt byggingarferlið.

Name: Integrated Design Cubed | IDCUBED
Description:
Integrated Design Cubed—IDCUBED—brings together experts in architecture, fabrication, systems design, and engineering to design, manufacture, and build affordable, sustainable, high-quality, modular mass timber buildings at scale to address the dual crises of our time: climate change and housing scarcity. 

IDCUBED is a US-based company founded in 2022 by architects Peter Rose of Peter Rose Partners and Andreas Krawczyk of NKBAK, Justin Cook of the RISD Center for Complexity, and Christian Kaufmann of Kaufmann Bausysteme GmbH, as a manufacturing partner.

IDCUBED practices a radically efficient and highly precise process of building-making with a dramatic reduction in the number of components (80% fewer parts compared to conventional modular construction), and an enormous reduction in labor and construction time. IDCUBED is applying this method to design high-quality, low-cost buildings, including housing, workforce housing, schools, and offices at scale.

Name: sementō
Description:
L'entreprise sementō est spécialisée dans l'économie de la construction, la rénovation énergétique copropriété et la réalisation de diagnostic PEMD (produits, équipements, matériaux et déchets).
Nous accompagnons une clientèle variée, promoteurs immobiliers, collectivités, bailleurs sociaux, entreprises du bâtiment et copropriétés dans leurs projets de réhabilitation, rénovation énergétique en copropriété et de gestion / valorisation des PEMD. 

L’entreprise sementō s'est fixée trois missions :

 Mission d’économie de la construction
Co-traitant au sein d'une maitrise d'œuvre, nous intervenons durant toutes les phases du projet. (Esquisse, AVP (APS, APD), PRO / DCE, ACT, DET et AOR)). Notre expertise se concentre sur les lots Hors d'eau, Hors d'air et Architecturaux.

 Diagnostic "Produits, équipements, matériaux et déchets" (PEMD)
Le diagnostic PEMD est l'étape clé d’une bonne stratégie de valorisation des produits, équipements et matériaux issus d’opérations de démolition ou de rénovation significative.

 Analyse du Cycle de Vie (ACV)
Nous participons à l'analyse du cycle de vie conformément à la méthode E+C-.  / Ic Construction

 Assistance à maitrise d’ouvrage.
Nous épaulons le maître d'ouvrage dès la phase de faisabilité de son projet. Notre mission consiste à l'aider à définir ses besoins, à rédiger le préprogramme travaux et le budget prévisionnel. 

En 2025, l'entreprise a déménagé dans la commune de Saint-Cyr-au-Mont-d'Or et nous intervenons sur l’ensemble du secteur Rhône-Alpes.
N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour discuter de la manière dont sementō peut contribuer au succès de votre projet de construction ou rénovation.

Vi sætter en ære i at skabe unikke facader, der bryder bybilledet og lever op til nutidens krav om bæredygtigt og brandsikkert byggeri.
