En daarmee geven we tegelijkertijd iets van ons specialisme prijs.  Want steigers bouwen in de Amsterdamse binnenstad is vrijwel nooit routinewerk. Het vereist inventiviteit, doorzettingsvermogen en vooral ook de wil om voor onze opdrachtgevers onder alle omstandigheden en op elke plaats een veilige steiger te bouwen. 

Afspraak is bij ons afspraak. We stellen hoge eisen aan onze medewerkers wat betreft vakkennis, omgangsvormen en verantwoordelijkheidsgevoel. Daarmee legden we de basis voor een bedrijfscultuur waarin we het motto 'afspraak is afspraak' ook daadwerkelijk kunnen nakomen. 

Germabouw heeft gekozen voor aluminium steigers van onder andere het topmerkk Layher. Oersterk maar ook relatief licht, dus handzaam. En mede daarom slagen wij erin om voor onze klanten snel en tegen concurrerende tarieven steigers te bouwen die aan de hoogste veiligheidseisen voldoen.

   - Operates to ISO 45001 OHS Management
   - Operates to ISO 14001 EMS
   - Global GreenTagCertTM verified and certified
   - A library of patents and design registrations

Raven Products is a member of the Raven Group of companies operating around the globe. Our leading group brands comprise Raven Door & Window Sealing Systems, CS Cavity Sliders, and DTAC tactiles and stair edging solutions.

'IT Centraal – Bouwen rond IT' is een kennis- en mediaplatform dat inspireert en oplossingen aanreikt rond duurzaam bouwen op basis van nieuwe technologieën: the internet of things, smart cities, smart buildings… Slimme en innovatieve toepassingen die oplossingen bieden voor toekomstgericht bouwen, leven en werken.

KENNISDELING, COMMUNICATIE EN NETWERKING.

Een selecte groep experten uit de industrie deelt hiervoor hun kennis en deskundigheid. Vanuit een gezamenlijke visie wordt een substantiële bijdrage geleverd rond IT én het effect hiervan op het management, de werknemer en de werkomgeving.

IT CENTRAAL DEELT KENNIS:

> via inhoudelijke communicatie
We publiceren inhoudelijke artikels over projecten, case studies, workshops, visies van professionals en producten.

> via gerichte publicaties
Relevante communicatie en cases worden gepubliceerd op de website. Deze publicaties worden aangekondigd via digitale nieuwsbrieven.

> via netwerking met de doelgroepen
De doelgroepen worden uitgenodigd op workshops en symposia, waarbij onafhankelijke experten nieuwe inzichten komen delen over de mogelijkheden van balansventilatie met warmterecuperatie.

> via kennisdeling met de andere partners
De onzichtbare meerwaarde in het project bestaat uit de wetenschappelijk en technisch onderbouwde informatie en kennis die wordt gedeeld tussen de deelnemers.

Name: Lawson Projects
Description:
Lawson Projects is an Independent Project Management firm based in Western Canada. Since 1976, we have been providing critical services to a range of clients, including landlords, business owners, investors, operators, tenants, and facility managers.

The core services and roles that we provided: 

1) Project Management Services: Lawson Projects offers comprehensive project management services to its clients. This includes overseeing all aspects of a project, from conception to completion. 

2) Client's Agent: In the capacity of a client's agent, Lawson Projects represents the interests of their clients. We work on behalf of their clients to ensure that the project meets their specific needs and objectives. 

3) Leadership in Development and Building Processes: Lawson Projects provides leadership throughout the development and building processes. This leadership is crucial for ensuring that all stakeholders, including contractors, architects, and other project team members, work together effectively and in a timely manner to meet project goals.

4) Monitoring and Progress Management: Lawson Projects actively monitors the progress of a project, which includes tracking milestones, budget adherence, and timeline management. This is essential to ensure the project stays on track and any deviations are addressed quickly.

5) Effective Communication: Lawson Projects serves as effective project liaisons, facilitating communication and collaboration among all parties involved in the project. This helps streamline decision-making and problem-solving, ensuring that the project runs smoothly.

6) Client Benefit: Ultimately, Lawson Projects is dedicated to delivering effective solutions that benefit their clients. This includes delivering projects that meet or exceed client expectations, staying within budget, and meeting project deadlines.

En plus de la vente et de la location de machines, nous fournissons un service après-vente complet pour assurer le bon fonctionnement et la sécurité des équipements. Ce service inclut notamment le dépannage, la  maintenance, la réparation et le remplacement des pièces défectueuses ou endommagées.

Enfin, l'entreprise propose également des formations sur l'utilisation de ces machines de manutention et de levage de personnes, afin d'assurer la sécurité des utilisateurs et de prévenir les accidents sur les chantiers. Ces formations peuvent être dispensées dans les locaux de l'entreprise ou sur le site de votre choix. Notre centre de formation est agréé IPAF.

80% de notre chiffre d’affaires concerne des projets en réhabilitation, pour la grande majorité en site occupé.

•	1ère chaufferie bois de la communauté de commune du pays d’Aix en 2004
•	1ère installation d’autoconsommation collective horizontale photovoltaïque en PACA en 2017
•	1er bâtiment lauréat de l’appel à projet ADEME ACV en 2012 avec le SMED 13
•	1er lycée de la région PACA en ossature bois en 2009
•	Réalisation d’une installation de récupération des eaux de pluie pour usage domestique en totale autonomie sur le monastère de Collobrières en 2004
•	Récupération des eaux grises pour l’arrosage sur une maison individuelle en 2007
•	Des projets frugaux et low tech très performants comme l’école Montessori qui date de 2011 en botte de paille, BDM or
•	La réalisation de puits canadien notamment à la banque de France d’Avignon en 2010

Nos missions en entretien maintenance et en réhabilitation nous permettent de voir la vraie vie des bâtiments, les problématiques de passation, de continuité d’information... Nous intégrons cette composante afin de proposer une qualité environnementale pragmatique plutôt qu’idéaliste et contre performante….

Name: Ambla Nordic Consulting AB
Description:
Från pionjär till förändringskraft
Ambla Nordic föddes ur en vision redan 2007, då grundaren Gunilla Qvarnström ledde etableringen av rollen som informationssamordnare i Region Skånes första BIM-projekt..
Redan från start såg vi potentialen i digital information som en motor för förändring i byggbranschen.
Sedan dess har vi varit en drivande kraft i en mängd projekt i Sverige – från skolor och arenor till avancerade sjukhusbyggen.
Vi tror på en ny väg framåt, där digitalisering, samverkan och tydliga processer skapar verklig förändring.

En hållbar framtid
I takt med att vår verksamhet och metod utvecklats har vi följaktligen fått ett nytt namn, Ambla Nordic med en egenutvecklad, resultatbaserad arbetsmetod, Ambla Method. Vi står nu redo för framtida utmaningar.
Vi vet att byggbranschen står inför stora utmaningar, låg produktivitet, splittrade processer och ineffektiv informationshantering.
Vi har gjort det till vårt uppdrag att vara en aktiv del av förflyttningen mot hållbara byggprojekt.
Tillsammans med några av Sveriges största offentliga beställaren har vi bidraget till att realisera landets mest komplexa och ambitiösa byggprojekt.

Name: Sarooj Beton Arbabian
Description:
Parand Industrial Zone, Robat Karim, and western regions of Tehran. With years of experience, advanced production facilities, and a strong engineering background, we have established a trusted reputation in delivering durable, high-performance concrete for industrial, commercial, and residential projects.

Our production process is powered by fully automated batching plants, a modern fleet of transit mixers, high-capacity concrete pumps, and a certified quality control laboratory. These capabilities enable us to supply concrete with optimal consistency, strength, and workability to meet the strict technical requirements of today’s construction industry.

We manufacture a wide range of concrete grades — including C10-C50, high-strength mixes, flooring concrete, shotcrete, and self-compacting concrete (SCC) — all designed to perform under demanding structural and environmental conditions. We also specialize in the use of concrete admixtures, such as superplasticizers, water-reducers, microsilica gel, and durability enhancers, ensuring superior performance, longer service life, and improved placement efficiency.

Our technical team provides professional support in mix design, material selection, onsite quality monitoring, and optimization based on project needs. Sarooj Beton Arbabian has played a key role in major construction projects, including industrial facilities in Parand Industrial Park, commercial complexes, large-scale residential developments, and infrastructure works.

Our mission is to deliver the best concrete in West Tehran, with a strong commitment to quality, on-time delivery, innovation, and customer satisfaction. We continuously raise production standards through modern technology, skilled professionals, and efficient logistics to remain a reliable partner for contractors, developers, and engineering companies.

Follow us on LinkedIn or visit our official website to learn more about our services, technical capabilities, and ongoig projects.

Name: Keong Hong Holdings Limited (强枫控股有限公司)
Description:
Headquartered in Singapore and established in 1983, our Group’s core businesses are building construction, property development and investment, as well as hotel development and investment. The Group develops and owns properties and hotels across Singapore and the Maldives.

Keong Hong entered Singapore’s property development market in 2012 with the launch of Twin Waterfalls, a 728-unit Executive Condominium (EC) project in Punggol. This was followed by several residential developments including SkyPark Residences EC, The Amore EC, Parc Life EC, Seaside Residences, and The Antares.

The Group expanded into hotel development and investment with two resort projects in the Maldives: Mercure Maldives Kooddoo Resort and Pullman Maldives Maamutaa Resort. 

To strengthen its building construction business, the Group pursued vertical integration through strategic acquisitions in 2017. This expanded its capabilities in metal formworks, timber flooring, decking, trellis, and roofing, boosting supply chain resilience and competitiveness and ensuring consistent quality and efficiency across residential and commercial projects.

The Group was upgraded to the Singapore Exchange Mainboard on 2 August 2016, following its initial listing on the Catalist Board on 16 December 2011. Supported by a highly qualified management team and a workforce of over 400, Keong Hong has built a strong reputation over the decades through its consistent commitment to quality and service excellence.

Name: Dom Bez Kosztów
Description:
Dom plus energetyczny – czym w praktyce jest "dom bez kosztów"?

Domy plus energetyczne wytwarzają energię, której nadmiar jest odprowadzany do sieci elektroenergetycznej, co przynosi realne korzyści finansowe dla właścicieli. 

W takim domu zapewniony mamy dodatni bilans energetyczny, a wszystko to dzięki wyposażeniu go w nowoczesne instalacje, takie jak:
* Fotowoltaika z magazynem energii, 
* Pompa ciepła na potrzeby C.O. I C.W.U.
* System rekuperacji i klimatyzacji 
* Stacja ładowania i auta elektryczne 

Co mają auta elektryczne do budowy domu? 

Energia produkowana przez panele PV pozwala na pełne pokrycie potrzeb grzewczych i bytowych. Nadwyżka wykorzystywana jest na sprzedaż lub do ładowania nowoczesnych samochodów hybrydowych i elektrycznych.

Jego średnie zapotrzebowanie na prąd w warunkach jazdy miejskiej wynosi 14 kWh, podmiejskiej 13 kWh, a z prędkościami autostradowymi - 20 kWh na każde 100 km.

Zainteresowani? 
Zapraszam do biura w Chojnicach- Topole 19C.

Name: Charpente Onillon
Description:
Implantée à Mauléon (Deux-Sèvres) depuis quatre générations, l’entreprise Charpente Onillon s'est bâtie sur l’excellence et la transmission du savoir-faire familial.

Fondée en 1905, la société s'est d'abord consacrée à la construction de bâtiments agricoles avant d’étendre progressivement ses compétences auprès des professionnels dans les secteurs industriel, tertiaire et artisanal. Charpente Onillon répond également aux projets des particuliers pour l’habitat neuf et la rénovation.

Cette longévité est le fruit d’une capacité d’adaptation constante face à l’évolution des besoins et des normes, et d’un souci permanent d’anticiper les attentes de ses clients.
Aujourd’hui, l'entreprise opère dans un rayon de 100 kilomètres autour de Mauléon et bénéficie d’une solide réputation, forgée sur des réalisations durables et de nombreuses certifications telles que Qualibat et Qualibat RGE.

Name: Four Seasons Outdoor Living Group
Description:
Four Seasons is the leading, branded North American manufacturer and distributor of patios, patio enclosures, sunrooms and products for ‘Enjoyment Outside the Home’.

The core strategy focuses on continuous improvement by pursuing growth opportunities and product innovations that capitalize on a premier brand. We pursue operational efficiencies to expand margins, offering product price categories for all customers and economic cycles, and a continuous pipeline of acquisition opportunities.

Four Seasons was established as a consumer brand nearly 50 years ago. Generational and continuous investing has created a brand that now resonates both with professionals and homeowners. The brand has also been used as part of the Company’s consumer lead generation program, which translates into B2B recognition, attracting both new contractors and ‘big box’ relationships.

The core strategy focuses on continuous improvement by pursuing growth opportunities and product innovations that capitalize on a premier brand, operating efficiencies to expand margins (supply chain costing, plant and product consolidations, etc.), offering product price categories for all customers and economic cycles, and a continuous pipeline of acquisition opportunities.

The Company serves the Repair & Remodeling and Additions markets for residential and commercial customers. Four Seasons’ markets are supported by favorable new home construction trends and the availability of financing.

We are the only manufacturer of our kind offering building products with a national footprint and diversified sales channels. The company operates 5 factories (with Service Centers), 11 standalone Service Centers and works with 18 distribution partner locations, to serve customers directly and over 4,000 professionals. Additionally, Four Seasons supplies 270 active sunroom dealers and sells through E-Commerce and factory-direct retail channels.

Name: Wullum Pasgaard A/S
Description:
Vi er både tegnestue og rådgivende ingeniørvirksomhed.

Dette gør os i stand til at bygge bro mellem det arkitektoniske udtryk og det funktionelle, bæredygtige aftryk.

Vi bruger meget tid på at lytte til vores kunders tanker og behov. Vi ser det som vores fornemmeste opgave, at udnytte vores kreative evner, byggetekniske kunnen og økonomiske overblik.

På den måde får du eller din virksomhed et byggeri I kan se jer selv i langt ude i fremtiden.

-

Vi håndterer alle typer af opgaver lige fra skitsetegning, projektering, energiberegning og statiske beregninger til økonomistyring, tilsyn og byggeledelse.

Mange af vores opgaver udfører vi som totalrådgiver, men arbejder jævnligt også sammen med andre arkitekt- og ingeniørvirksomheder om løsning af opgaver.

Projektering i 3D indgår som en naturlig del af vores arbejdsproces. Ligeledes anvender vi forskellige typer af beregningsprogrammer for løsning af de ingeniørmæssige opgaver.

3D modellering af byggeriet giver allerede fra start af et stærkt fundament til, at vurdere og tage beslutninger ud fra. Derudover giver det også mulighed for, at udarbejde fotorealistiske visualiseringer af byggeriet.

I vores endelige output ligger vi meget vægt på, at det tegningsmateriale vi udarbejder, er fyldestgørende og let forståelig for de, som skal udføre byggearbejderne. Således unødige fejl undgås.

Kort fortalt sikrer vi, at du får at funktionelt og arkitektonisk smukt byggeri. Det er det vi brænder for.

Vision
L’associazione ha per scopo:
raggruppare persone fisiche o giuridiche la cui attività è essenzialmente orientata verso la costruzione, l’urbanistica e l’ambiente, la creazione e lo sviluppo di uno spirito di comprensione tra i suoi membri, favorire tutti gli scambi di informazione tra i suoi membri, procurare loro la possibilità di conoscere meglio le persone, i gruppi e gli organismi che partecipano ad attività simili.

O diferencial da Coberchapas está na qualidade dos nossos produtos, aliada à nossa expertise no setor. As nossas chapas e telhas são fabricadas com materiais de primeira qualidade, passando por um rigoroso controlo de qualidade para garantir a excelência em cada peça. Além disso, contamos com uma equipe de profissionais altamente qualificados, prontos para fornecer suporte técnico e orientação aos nossos clientes em todas as etapas do processo.

Ao escolher a Coberchapas, nossos clientes têm acesso a benefícios duradouros. Nossos produtos oferecem alta resistência às intempéries, garantindo uma proteção eficaz contra chuva, vento, sol e outras adversidades climáticas. Além disso, proporcionamos isolamento térmico e acústico, confiante para o conforto e economia de energia em ambientes construídos.

Nosso compromisso é com a satisfação de nossos clientes. Estamos sempre em busca de soluções inovadoras e de qualidade para atender às suas necessidades específicas. Oferecemos preços competitivos, agilidade na entrega e um atendimento personalizado, buscando superar as expectativas em cada projeto.

Name: Building Consents Registered Building Control Approver
Description:
We are a Registered Building Control Approver Covering North West England & The Midlands

The design and construction of modern buildings is both complex and expensive so you need a strong, trusted, intelligent partner to support you every step of the way.

Building Consents Ltd. is a company of experienced Registered Building Inspectors (RBIs) operating throughout the UK but concentrating on the North West (North Wales, Liverpool, Manchester, Cheshire), the Midlands (Birmingham, Coventry) and South West (Dorset, Somerset). We have a decade of successful projects and repeat business through close partnership with leading developers, contractors and architects as well as home-owners.

Our typical projects include multi-storey residential and student accommodation, hotels, hospitals, educational, medical and industrial buildings but also houses, loft conversions and kitchen and lounge extensions.

We are proud to be members of the Chartered Association of Building Engineers, the RICS and are regulated by the Building Safety Regulator, part of the HSE.

As a Registered Building Control Approver we work for developers, architects, contractors and homeowners to audit and inspect their projects to ensure they comply with Building Regulations.

We undertake a thorough check of drawings and specifications and then make regular inspections of the work in progress to check compliance.

If the work complies we issue a final completion certificate providing confidence that the building has been designed and constructed safely.

Our surveyors are professionally qualified and trained to the highest standard, so that we can provide you with up-to-date compliance checks at each stage of your project.

We also work with you at each stage to make sure we document and audit your design and then inspect the work in progress at key stages.

A Tecno Montagens conta com uma equipe treinada e altamente capacitada para realização de montagens de kits em PPR, PEX e PVC, e temos como diferencial a rapidez no atendimento às demandas de nossos clientes, para que eles não tenham problemas com prazos e qualidade, sob 4 pilares essenciais:
Viabilidade / Processos / Logística / Controle

MISSÃO
A Tecno Montagens, empresa localizada na Zona Leste de SP, tem como missão atender construtoras e instaladoras através do desenvolvimento e produção de kits hidráulicos. Realizamos um atendimento consultivo, identificamos as dificuldades enfrentadas pelos clientes e desenvolvemos a solução de forma customizada. Nosso principal objetivo é contribuir para redução de problemas e melhoria do fluxo de trabalho dos engenheiros, instaladores e construtoras.

VISÃO
Ser reconhecida no estado de São Paulo como empresa referência em industrialização de kits hidráulicos, desenvolvidos com qualidade e eficiência, atendendo nossos clientes com agilidade e preços competitivos.

VALORES
Atendimento consultivo e satisfação dos clientes
Agilidade com qualidade
Melhoria do fluxo de trabalho dos nossos clientes
Responsabilidade e parceria

Located in Halifax, West Yorkshire, at the centre of the M62 corridor, we provide a quick and reliable supply of engineered timber products to customers across the whole Yorkshire, Midlands and Lancashire up to the Scottish Boarders.

Working closely with our valued customers from some of the most reputable national house builders and largest timber/ builders merchants throughout the country,  to self build customers, we have successfully nurtured long-standing relationships due to our customer service, quality of engineering and reliability of delivery for all stages of their projects.

Through our extensive investment in machinery, logistics and employees we have become a leader in engineering timber for the construction industry in the UK. 

With its energy- efficient credentials timber framed build has become at the forefront of construction with its air tightness, waste reduction and speed of construction, it is becoming the construction method of choice. 

For quality engineered products, and enquiries regarding design of timber framed buildings contact us through our website.

Name: Quadlock Portugal
Description:
A Quad-Lock Building Systems é um fabricante de formas isolantes de betão, também conhecidas como ICF's. O nosso sistema é uma forma de concreto estável feita de EPS que é utilizada tanto na construção residencial como comercial.

O sistema de cofragem Quad-Lock combina múltiplas etapas de construção num só conjunto, tornando-o mais rápido e menos dispendioso do que os métodos de construção convencionais. Acabaram-se as montagens e desmontagens de cofragens, molduras de madeira, lã de vidro/rocha, barreiras de humidade, barreiras de ar, fitas adesivas, etc. Quando se constrói com Quad-Lock, está-se pronto para instalar os acabamentos interiores e exteriores após a betonagem.

Para além dos benefícios durante a construção, o nosso ICF também proporcionam incríveis benefícios duradouros para os proprietários e ocupantes do edifício. O isolamento contínuo nos nossos conjuntos de paredes, aliado à natureza hermética do betão betonado no local, fazem com que o envelope dos nossos edifícios sejam mais dos eficientes em termos energéticos na indústria da construção. 

Outros benefícios:
Ambiente interior confortável e silencioso
Estrutura de betão resistente que resistirá a incêndios, sismos, inundações, etc.
Sistemas avac menos potentes, mais baratos e sem grande necessidade de manutenção.

Para mais informações sobre como podemos ajudar no seu próximo projecto, por favor visite-nos em https://www.quadlock.pt

REALLABOR FÜR  ZIRKULÄRES UM-BAUEN

Com esse propósito nasce a vōrtica, um modelo de negócio inovador focado na criação e desenvolvimento de produtos e serviços de vanguarda, que buscam resolver as principais dores da comunidade com soluções inteligentes capazes de transformar o estilo de vida da região. Fruto das inquietações dos partners da GR, os quais perceberam o quanto poderiam contribuir com o seu Know-how em outras frentes de atuação, expandindo o portfólio de soluções para o mercado imobiliário, agregando novos modelos de negócios e ampliando o seu ecossistema.
Outro diferencial da vōrtica está em sua cultura e estrutura organizacional, que adota o modelo de Partnership, o qual é amplamente difundido no Vale do Silício e vem ganhando cada vez mais adeptos no mundo corporativo, em diferentes indústrias. A tradução literal do termo significa “parceria”, mas o modelo visa, na prática, encontrar, atrair e reter gente qualificada e alinhada com o mesmo propósito de inspirar e transformar uns aos outros e o lugar onde vivemos.
Location: Santa Maria, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Hausmade
Description:
Hausmade est un habitat léger en chanvre-chaux autonome, résilient, apportant un haut niveau de confort à moindre coût et respectant l’environnement. Ce projet vise à répondre à une demande grandissante en s’inscrivant dans le mode de vie minimaliste de ce type d’habitat tout en levant les freins majeurs relatifs à ce mouvement.
A l'initiative de ce projet conciliant industrialisation et écologie, Nils Frantz, ingénieur en énergie et environnement et Gianvito Corraza, architecte, ont eu pour idée de réunir leurs compétences et passions de sorte à converger vers le développement d'un habitat capable de répondre efficacement aux besoins en pleine mutation dans le secteur du bâtiment : 
Une conception bioclimatique et bio-inspirée pour un Habitat léger de 20 m², sobre, contemporain, à haut niveau de confort et proche de la nature.
L’utilisation d'un matériau biosourcé (chanvre-chaux), considérant les efforts de recherche considérables ces dernières années en la matière, à la fois léger et à la base de la haute performance finale obtenue en termes de confort thermique et hydrique en été comme en hiver.
Un concept multi-fluide performant, écologique, permettant une large autonomie tout en répondant à tous les besoins du quotidien ; incluant une autonomie énergétique 100% renouvelable et le traitement des effluents par phyto-épuration, objet d'une étude et modélisation poussée, adapté aux nombreux climats du territoire national.
Un ensemble disposé sur micro-pieux, sans impact sur le terrain dans lequel il s’implante, ensemble optimisé pour un (dé)montage rapide et simple, capable de se mouvoir avec élégance dans une grande diversité d’environnements, sujet à des démarches administratives allégées, eu égard à l’emprise au sol réduite et à son très faible impact environnemental
Des aménagements intérieurs de grande qualité, valorisant des matériaux nobles faiblement transformés, biosourcés ou issus du réemploi ; modulaires permettant là aussi de concilier industrialisation

Description:
Bluefield Land can tackle the most challenging of brownfield sites by working alongside our sister companies, Cardiff Demolition, Neal Soil Suppliers, Atlantic Recycling and Neal Remediation. All of which form part of the Dauson Environmental Group.

Here at Bluefield Land we specialise in the acquisition of brownfield sites and their subsequent regeneration to deliver new eco-efficient homes. Whilst the delivery of new homes is our specialism, we happily consider other opportunities, such as commercial, retail or industrial development.

Name: Alumidi Esquadrias de Alumínio Ltda
Description:
A Alumidi Esquadrias é uma empresa jovem no setor de esquadrias de alumínio, mas nasce com um DNA de excelência e inovação, ancorada na sólida experiência de seu fundador e diretor, o engenheiro mecânico Diego Silva Costa.
Com uma carreira construída ao longo de 17 anos em posições de liderança nos setores técnicos e comerciais de grandes empresas do segmento, Diego acumulou um know-how raro no mercado. Ao longo desse período, esteve à frente de projetos icônicos da construção civil de alto padrão, como os edifícios Saint Paul e Saint Louis da Construtora São José, One Sixty e Haus By Yoo da Cyrela, e o premiado EXP Moema, da Construtora Menin.

Nessas obras de grande porte e complexidade, Diego teve papel essencial no desenvolvimento de perfis especiais e soluções sob medida, sempre focado em atender aos mais altos níveis de desempenho acústico, conforto térmico e exigências técnicas de arquitetos e designers renomados.

Inspirado por esse histórico de desafios e conquistas, Diego fundou a Alumidi com o propósito de oferecer ao mercado um novo padrão em esquadrias de alumínio: tecnicamente preciso, esteticamente refinado e com atendimento personalizado desde a concepção do projeto até a sua entrega final.

A Alumidi une juventude e experiência, combinando o olhar inovador de uma nova geração com a bagagem de quem já participou das maiores realizações do setor. Cada projeto é tratado com excelência, comprometimento e foco em soluções inteligentes — marcas registradas da trajetória de seu fundador.

Name: Bel-Aire Welding Ltd.
Description:
Incorporated by owner, Darrell Bohle, in 1992, Bel-Aire Welding Ltd. has been serving southern Alberta’s miscellaneous and structural steel needs for over 30 years.

Bel-Aire Welding Ltd. is situated in our custom-built production facility at 254 – 24th Street North in the Lethbridge industrial park.  The facility offers a 28’ hook height and a double flow-through crane system, as well as housing our PythonX CNC Plasma beam line.

Our services range from small repairs to residential projects to full-scale building renovations and new builds.  Along with these services we also provide repair, maintenance and miscellaneous and/or structural steel services for plants and other large operations in southern Alberta.  At Bel-Aire Welding Ltd. we are always seeking opportunities to enhance our current services as well as expand into new markets.

We continue to be a strong community supporter providing training and education for our apprentices as well as an ongoing scholarship fund in the Lethbridge College Apprenticeship Program, which we established in 2005.  Darrell has been a member of both the local and the provincial Apprenticeship Boards as an advocate for young welders.  Bel-Aire Welding Ltd. is also pleased to be sponsoring the Virtual Welding Classroom in the Trades wing at the Lethbridge College.

Bel-Aire Welding Ltd. is CWB Certified for structural steel fabrication and erection as well as COR certified through the Alberta Construction Safety Association.

At Bel-Aire Welding Ltd. our management team and staff are trained/certified to provide you with excellent quality workmanship in a timely, professional manner to ensure the highest degree of quality and satisfaction for our customers

Spécialisés en charpente, ossature bois, extensions, surélévations, terrasses et bardages, nous concevons et réalisons des ouvrages durables, esthétiques et respectueux de l’environnement.

Basés sur la commune de Isneauville, nous accompagnons nos clients particuliers et professionnels dans la construction et la rénovation de bâtiments en bois, du premier croquis à la réception du chantier.

Notre approche repose sur l’écoute, la précision artisanale et la qualité du travail bien fait. Chaque projet est unique : nous adaptons nos solutions aux besoins, aux contraintes techniques et au style architectural de nos clients.

Le bois est un matériau vivant, noble et écologique. C’est pour nous plus qu’un savoir-faire : une véritable passion. Grâce à sa légèreté et ses hautes performances thermiques, il permet de créer des espaces chaleureux, confortables et durables.

Que ce soit pour :
	•	Une charpente traditionnelle solide et sur mesure,
	•	Une extension ou surélévation en ossature bois,
	•	Une terrasse conviviale adaptée à vos envies,
	•	Ou un bardage moderne et protecteur,

… nous mettons tout en œuvre pour garantir un résultat de qualité, dans le respect des délais et du budget.

Notre engagement : allier artisanat, performance et durabilité.
Nous travaillons avec des matériaux certifiés, des fournisseurs locaux et une équipe passionnée, fière de contribuer à la valorisation du bois dans la construction.

Vous avez un projet ? Parlons-en !

Contactez-nous pour étudier ensemble la meilleure solution technique et esthétique pour votre habitation ou votre bâtiment.

Name: Etablissements CHAZALLON SAS
Description:
La société Chazallon a été créée en 1967 par son fondateur Pierre Chazallon à Saint-Front 43550, avec dans un premier temps, une activité de négoce et réparation de matériel agricole. Elle a ensuite évolué sur l'activité de Constructions Métalliques à partir de 1976.

En 1978, la clientèle qui était essentiellement agricole se diversifie dans le secteur industriel et des bâtiments publics.

1991 marque la création d'un établissement secondaire à Saint-Germain-Laprade dans une zone industrielle, nécessaire pour le développement de l'activité. 

2002, l'entreprise est reprise par Franck et Pascal Chazallon.

En 2014, le siège social de la société est transféré à Saint-Germain-Laprade, il s'en suivra plusieurs agrandissements pour atteindre 2800 m² de production et 200 m² de bureaux.

Aujourd'hui, l'activité principale consiste en la fabrication et la pose de charpentes métalliques pour les bâtiments industriels, tertiaires ou agricoles, ainsi que les travaux de couverture et bardage métallique.

A partir de plans d'architecte, notre bureau d'études calcule et dessine afin d'optimiser le projet et proposer au client la meilleure solution technique et financière. Nous concevons ensuite les plans de fabrication et d'exécution pour assurer la fabrication des pièces dans nos ateliers et le montage sur site.

Pour répondre à une demande toujours plus forte, un nouveau bâtiment devrait voir le jour prochainement avec une technologie des plus avancées…

Name: Proto Homes
Description:
Proto Homes is an industrialized homebuilding platform. Proto Platform is the world’s first web-based platform to Bring the Industrial Production Model to Homebuilding.

The Proto Platform offers homebuilders everywhere access to a Lego-like set of proprietary integrated components that can be assembled into fully customizable homes at any size, as well as a suite of app-based tools to manage the production and installation of the components. Additionally, the platform will support a JIT component delivery system and connect homebuilders to a nationwide network of prescreened design and building professionals who are trained in designing with and installing the components. 

Component manufacturing and delivery are handled by local Proto Fulfillment Centers, which are independently owned and operated and licensed by Proto Homes. The Proto Platform provides these local fulfillment centers with all the essentials, including manufacturing capabilities and access to an industrial supply chain, enabling small, regional builders to finally build homes as efficiently and cheaply as the large builders servicing the Base Market.  

It's easy to imagine a future in which the homebuilding industry is simply further consolidated by large scale builders. In this future, these players have little incentive to change how they build and little to offer the market other than size and more of the same. Productivity in the homebuilding industry continues to lag and the domestic housing shortage deepens further aggravating the housing market. 

In the future envisioned by Proto Homes, the cottage homebuilding industry will consolidate around building platforms rather than a select handful of legacy builders. As the homebuilding industry becomes productized, these new platforms will serve as a one-stop shop for every aspect of the homebuilding process, from design to permitting to materials procurement and production, assembly, post-occupancy services and more.

Name: BRDA Foundation
Description:
The BRDA Foundation was founded in July, 2022. Our team is small, but determined to change the construction and real estate industry, and we have the numbers to prove it!
For the past two years, we have been carrying out projects that enable the circulation of reclaimed building materials and furniture. We offer services to architects, asset managers and real estate developers, promoting social involvement and sustainable practices in the construction sector, decreasing CO2 emissions and minimizing waste. We promote material reuse in architectural projects. And, by doing that, we support schools and non-profit organizations in both Poland and Ukraine.

- As part of the WINDOW project, we send reclaimed PVC windows to NGOs in Ukraine, supporting grassroots reconstruction. Since July 2022, we’ve sent 2057 quality windows to our neighbors. 
- Our exhibition about material reuse created together with TŁO studio one the 1st Prize at the London Design Biennale 2023.
- Our second flagship project, BUDO, gathers building components other than windows. We sell part of the inventory in order to finance our humanitarian aid project. Most of the gathered components and furnishings, however, goes to those in need – non-profits, schools and social institutions. So far, we’ve salvaged almost 20 tons of objects from the landfill, saving up nearly 100 000 euros for those, who make the world a better place. For our clients, this means boosting their ESG and saving up on the utilization process. It’s a win win situation!
- In order, to scale up our projects, in 2024 we will be launching our OBIEG online platform, which will deal with office fit-outs, commercial centers and large storage units… stay tuned!

Find us at conferences, universities and construction sites. Let’s change the building sector together.

Name: TOTEM Building
Description:
In order to help the Belgian construction sector to objectify and reduce the environmental impact of buildings, the three Regions have developed the TOTEM tool [Tool to Optimise the Total Environmental impact of Materials]. The project partners are OVAM, Brussels Environment and the Public Service of Wallonia.

[CREATE] TOTEM stimulates the creativity of project designers to carry out projects that combine all the requirements related to tomorrow's environmental challenges

[EVALUATE] TOTEM enables the environmental impact of construction elements or buildings to be assessed according to a scientific method adapted to the particularities of the Belgian construction market.

[INNOVATES] TOTEM aims to encourage innovation and eco-design in building systems.

Five years of research and development, in collaboration with universities and design offices, were necessary for the realisation of this scientific methodology, adapted to the specificities of the Belgian construction sector.

TOTEM's main values are objectivity and transparency, to enable the players in the Belgian construction sector (architects, design offices, contractors, owners, promoters, public authorities, etc.) to identify and limit the potential environmental impacts of buildings from the earliest stages of the design process.

Description:

We take the time to listen and understand your project needs, so that we can tailor-make an estimating solution, ensuring that the estimate we provide represents real world building costs. We will provide you with a fully costed construction estimating package complete with a detailed list of labour, materials / take-off / bill of quantities to ensure that your next project stays on track.

If you are looking for a construction estimator or quantity surveyor, our team of dedicated professionals can prepare construction estimates to assist you keep your next building project on budget.

One thing to remember;
It’s not all about price. There are plenty of online estimators with a little bit of experience that offer “quality” estimates at a small price, in a short turnaround time.

The successful formula for repeatable, quality cost estimates, is a combination of experience, commercial intellect, and the right tools for the project at hand. Cost estimating is more than just numbers it is both an art and a science. But, most importantly, it requires a strong dose of structure and discipline. Never underestimate the value that experience brings to the table!

No matter what you are building we believe we can assist you keep track of the costs for your current jobs as well as prepare estimates for future projects at the tendering stage. We can adapt our estimate to suit your specific needs and labor rates for homes, swimming pools, commercial, civil or infrastructure projects.

Name: Horizon Timber Frame
Description:
We believe in exceptional craftsmanship and sustainable materials
At Horizon Timber Frame, we believe that exceptional craftsmanship and sustainable materials can transform the way our built environment takes shape. We’re bringing this vision to life by providing bespoke timber framing services of the highest quality throughout the UK.

Our team of experienced experts handles every project with care and precision, from design and manufacturing to delivery and installation. The future of construction starts with sustainable choices.

Why Choose Us?
At Horizon Timber Frames, we bring an innovative approach to sustainable timber construction. When you choose us as your timber framing partner, you’re investing in a higher standard of quality, precision, and environmental responsibility.


Who We Are
All of our timber frame projects are fully erected to roof level and include the supply and fit of the roof felt, battens and/or roof sarking board where required. A site-suitable crane hire is also provided by Horizon for each project for the purpose of the erection of the timber frame structure. All sewer drains are supplied and fitted to run down through the insulated foundation and slab system and protrude 1 metre past the perimeter of the foundation, for easy connection to services.

Our variety of timber frame options enable Horizon to be flexible in what we can offer and achieve in each timber frame project. The range of timber frame products include our 300mm passive twin stud timber frame, which in conjunction with our passive insulated foundation is our most innovative system. The passive house system offers self-builders superior comfort, in tandem with huge financial savings due to the exceptionally minimal space heating requirements.

Name: Groupe RESILIANS. Agence Centre Loire Assistance
Description:
Le réseau Résilians s’inspire de l’action quotidienne de ses équipes sur le terrain et de l’aide qu’elles apportent en réparant les dégâts causés par un sinistre.
Résilians propose ainsi des solutions de sauvegarde, décontamination, assèchement, interventions suite à des catastrophes naturelles, traitement de l’amiante, recherche de fuites et de rénovation bâtiment sur l’ensemble du territoire Français.
Pourquoi "Résilians" ?
Le terme latin « résilians », qui exprimait à l’origine le « fait de rebondir », désigne aujourd’hui la résistance d’un matériau aux chocs.

Par extension, la « résilience » désigne la capacité à surmonter une altération de son environnement, à se reconstruire après un traumatisme.

Name: A3 Engenharia
Description:
Fundada em 1990, a ATREZ nasceu a partir do empreendedorismo do Engenheiro Edson Saud e sua esposa Regina, sócios-proprietários da empresa até hoje.
Em seus primeiros anos de atuação em Taubaté, atuou em obras de pequeno e médio porte, tendo realizado diversos edifícios residenciais, além de residências para venda, casas para terceiros, imóveis próprios, obras comerciais e industriais. A partir de 2012, direcionou sua atuação para os empreendimentos, trabalhando no Edifício Zahle e Edifício Rivera, iniciando uma nova fase da empresa que permanece até os dias atuais. Em 2017 a ATREZ assinou seu primeiro contrato pelo plano associativo com a Caixa Econômica Federal, após um extenso e rigoroso processo, entre eles a obtenção do selo de Certificação de Qualidade no PBQP-h e ISO 9001 pela primeira vez. Atualmente, com a entrada do Eng. Leandro Saud no quadro societário, a ATREZ se reinventou para continuar explorando seu espírito inovador, buscando implementar todas as grandes novidades relacionadas às tecnologias e facilidades das smarthouses em seus empreendimentos.

Name: Rennell Capital Group
Description:
At Rennell Capital Group, we specialize in MEP cost estimating that drives clarity, confidence, and control across complex construction projects. Our team partners with developers, general contractors, and design teams to deliver accurate, detailed mechanical, electrical, and plumbing (MEP) estimates that stand up to real-world execution and value engineering.

Whether you’re working in commercial, healthcare, education, or mixed-use development, our expertise helps you:
	•	Prevent costly overruns
	•	Bid with confidence
	•	Optimize systems for budget and performance
	•	Reduce design-phase guesswork

 MEP Services Include:
	•	Schematic Design & Construction 
       •.    Document Estimates
	•	Independent Estimate Reviews
	•	Constructability & Budget Alignment Analysis
	•	Forensic Estimating & Expert Witness Support
	•	Preconstruction & Design Phase Budgeting
	•	BIM & Revit-Based Takeoffs
	•	Cashflow Forecasting & Risk Identification

Our clients choose RCG when they need real-world pricing, reliable quantity takeoffs, and a team that actually understands field conditions and install sequences, not just spreadsheet theory.

 Real Estate & Construction Consulting

Beyond estimating, RCG provides end-to-end consulting for real estate projects, including project management, development planning, and cost analysis. We’ve worked on everything from value-add multifamily renovations to ground-up developments and ADUs.

Our clients rely on us to guide:
	•	Construction timelines
	•	Contractor coordination
	•	Design-build strategy
	•	Budget and schedule control

 Giving Back: Rennell Community Foundation

We believe in building more than just buildings. Through the Rennell Community Foundation, we support local students pursuing careers in the skilled trades. From tool stipends and scholarships to paid internships with partner companies, we’re helping grow the next generation of plumbers, HVAC techs, and electricians—right in our own backyard.

Your MEP estimating partner

Afrigroupe s’engage donc à secouer et à faire bouger les lignes rigides établies en gardant l’empreinte historique qui l’a portée jusque-là, pour devenir leader avant-gardiste dans le secteur du bâtiment. 

C’est dans cette perspective que nous nous engageons à collaborer avec des institutions professionnelles à l’expertise avérée de Côte d’Ivoire afin d’accompagner les nouvelles générations ivoiriennes et africaines dans la concrétisation de leur futur.

Name: The Maintain App
Description:
Introducing a game-changing subscription-based property maintenance solution that's about to shake up the industry! We've created something truly remarkable—a simple and convenient way to manage your property maintenance needs. Say hello to The Maintain App, your dedicated tool for hassle-free property upkeep.
Our mission is to make property maintenance a breeze for both residential and commercial sectors. With The Maintain App, we're introducing a unique concept of property maintenance on a subscription basis, neatly packaged in easily manageable blocks of 10 hours per month. It's the perfect solution to streamline your maintenance process without any hassle.

But here's the best part: We've developed a cutting-edge mobile app that puts the power in your hands. The app is designed to make task management and subscription organisation a breeze for all users. It's user-friendly, intuitive, and tailored to meet your specific needs. No more juggling multiple platforms or complicated processes. With The Maintain App, everything is at your fingertips.

Before our official launch, we'll be reaching out to established businesses in the industry. We believe in partnering with those who already understand the importance of efficiency and want to take their operations to the next level. By working with trusted industry leaders, we minimise the need for extensive vetting processes and focus on providing top-notch service.

To get the word out, we'll be showcasing the app and its benefits through a direct marketing approach. Our visual package will demonstrate how The Maintain App can transform your operations, making it a valuable asset for your company. As a token of appreciation, we'll be offering incentives for companies that contribute to our research and development efforts.
Revenue will be generated through subscriptions, with a monthly fee per user. This flexible payment model eliminates hefty upfront costs and penalties for starting with a small number of users.

Name: AI Champion
Description:
Business Finland has granted Co-Innovation funding to the AI Champion project, where researchers join forces with companies from the Building and Construction sector. The AI Champion project will develop 100 "human-like" AI agents that improve automation and information flow in building services engineering supply chains. 

Tampere University participates in the project with multidisciplinary research teams from the faculties of Built Environment, Management and Business, Information Technology and Communication Sciences and the GPT-Lab. The University of Oulu contributes expertise in product management and business digitalisation. In the project, Granlund, Fira, and Koja Chiller, who also receive funding from Business Finland, work closely together on research into artificial intelligence agents for supply chain management and the development of joint services and products. The research is also funded by ETS Nord, Kiilto, GF BFS, Nimlas, LVI-Info, STK, and Airlyse.

Description:
Consiliarri Construction: Where imagination meets precision! We're not just builders; we're dream weavers. From meticulous maintenance projects to complete residential and commercial builds, our services encompass every stage of a project, ensuring a seamless journey from vision to reality.

Let me break it down for you a short overview of our services:
•	Maintenance: Our maintenance crew swoop in to keep your building in good condition. Leaky faucets? We fix them. Creaky doors? We lubricate them. 
•	Refurbishment: We enhance and modernise spaces, making them more appealing and functional. A new coat of paint and new fixtures go a long way. Suddenly, dingy corners become showpieces.

•	Construction: We undertake building projects from start to finish. This includes planning, design, council consent, and actual construction. 
•	Residential Developments: Our goal is to turn empty plots into vibrant homes. We build with an innovative twist. Our modular homes are built in a factory setting away from the NZ weather impacts, and with quality control. They are more affordable and faster to complete than traditional homes. They can be customised to suit your needs and preferences. They are high-quality, durable, and energy efficient. This can include single-storey houses and townhouses. 
•	Commercial Developments: For commercial clients, think about retail centres, and sleek offices. We handle the entire project from start to finish. 
•	Project management: We understand the importance of being thorough and efficient in each stage of the process. That's why we manage each project end-to-end, ensuring high-quality outcomes.

We are here to create a new approach to the construction industry, look after our people and make our Aotearoa even more AWESOME!

Fondée en 2019 à Saint-Léandre, CAMM, est le produit d’une expertise familiale de longue date dans la transformation du bois d’oeuvre et d’une passion pour l’optimisation de l’espace. Motivée à participer au développement économique de la région qui l’a vu grandir, Camille Therrien-Tremblay, établie son entreprise aux abords du moulin familial pour bénéficier de la proximité avec son fournisseur de bois ainsi que des conseils de ses mentors. L’entreprise a vu son chiffre d’affaires tripler depuis sa fondation et elle emploie, à ce jour, de 5 à 10 personnes annuellement.

La mission de l’entreprise est de construire en atelier, de façon éco-responsable, pour les amateurs de micro-maisons, de plein air et pour les entreprises et organismes touristiques du Québec, des micro-habitations adaptatives, transportables, clé en main ainsi que d’autres abris utilitaires et meubles de jardin fabriqués avec des matériaux durables et écologiques dont principalement, le cèdre blanc transformé localement.

CAMM offre également un service de location de micro-habitations, à court ou moyen terme, pour le secteur touristique, évènementiel ou pour les particuliers. Ce service est offert dans l’est du Québec et le nord du Nouveau-Brunswick.

CAMM souhaite s’imposer comme une référence et un exemple à suivre dans le domaine de la micro-habitation autonome et éco-responsable. Chaque composante de leurs produits et chaque technique utilisée sont soigneusement sélectionnées selon les plus hauts standards dans le domaine.

Name: AAMOI - Association d'Aide aux Maitres d' Ouvrages Individuel - CCMI
Description:
L'Association d'Aide aux Maîtres d'Ouvrage Individuels (AAMOI) est l'association de référence dédiée à la défense et à l'accompagnement des familles dans leur projet de construction de maison individuelle (CCMI).

Avec une expérience de plus de 20 ans, nous avons conseillé et soutenu plus de 15 000 familles à travers la France, assurant la sécurisation de leurs projets et la défense de leurs droits.

 Notre Mission

L'AAMOI intervient sur trois domaines clés pour garantir la sérénité de votre construction :

1.  Accompagnement préventif : Sécurisation de votre projet avant la signature du CCMI, incluant l'analyse de contrat, l'information sur les pièges à éviter, et l'accès à notre "Top Constructeur".
2.  Soutien curatif : Aide à la résolution des litiges (retards, malfaçons, non-conformités) par voie amiable ou judiciaire, en vous fournissant les références légales et la documentation nécessaire.
3.  Défense de l'intérêt général : Action collective pour l'établissement de jurisprudences et la suppression de clauses abusives dans les contrats types du secteur.

Que vous soyez en phase de recherche ou confronté à des difficultés de chantier, l'AAMOI est votre partenaire expert.

 Ne vous lancez pas seul.
 Pour une construction sereine et sécurisée, visitez notre site web et rejoignez la communauté AAMOI : http://www.aamoi.fr/

Name: Gök İnşaat Madencilik
Description:
Gök İnşaat Madencilik Tic. Ltd. Şirketi 1985 yılında İlyas Gök tarafından kurulmuştur. 1997 yılına kadar inşaat sektöründe yer alan şirketimiz,  1997 yılında madencilik ve nakliyat sektörüne atılmıştır. 1997 yılından günümüzde dahil olmak üzere inşaat, madencilik ve nakliyat hizmetlerine devam ediyor. Afyonkarahisar ilinde 30'u aşkın yap-sat modeliyle inşaat yapmıştır.

Gelişmeye ve yeniliklere açık olan Gök İnşaat Madencilik Nakliyat Limited Şirketi., gelecekte de varlığını bu sektörde en üst düzeyde korumaya devam etmeyi hedeflemektedir.


Kalite Politikamız:
Gök İnşaat Mad. İmalat Nak. San. ve Tic. Ltd. Şti. olarak vizyonumuzu ve misyonumuzu güler yüzlü müşteri ve çevreci politikamız sayesinde edinmiş olduğumuz tecrübelerimizi de katarak geliştirmeyi başardık.

Vizyonumuz, şirketimizin geleceğe yönelik yatırımlarıyla inşaat ve enerji sektöründe yapmış ve yapacak olduğu iyileştirmelerle sürdürmüş olduğu varlığını daha üst seviyelere taşımasıdır.

Misyonumuz ise, yüksek kalitede ve düşük maliyetle müşterilerimizin taleplerine cevap verebilmek, memnuniyetlerini sağlamak ve güler yüzlü müşteri politikamızdan devam etmektir.

Bu sayede şirket politikamızı oluşturan ilkelerimiz;

*Satış ve satış sonrası hizmetlerimizle müşterilerimizin memnuniyetini sağlamak,

* Mal ve bilgi akışının düzenli bir şekilde yapılmasını sağlayarak müşterilerimizin taleplerini zamanında karşılayabilmek,

* Doğal çevreyi korumak için gereken hassasiyeti göstermek ve yasal düzenlemelere uymak,

* Tedarikçilerimizle güven ve işbirliği içinde çalışmaktır.

Name: Stone Initiatives – The testing specialists
Description:
We help create safe and lawful built environments by providing expert evaluation and guidance on the use of dimension stone in architecture, heritage restoration and product manufacture.

Stone Initiatives is the only NATA-accredited laboratory in Australia that specialises in dimension stone. Our experienced team provides reliable stone testing and useful results in the fields of surface finishes, heritage, slip resistance, and facades and cladding. We help you minimise risk, meet project requirements and make informed choices for the success of your product.

Stone Initiatives' services include:
– fast and reliable slip testing
– determination of the physical properties of dimension stone and related products
– selection and sourcing of stone
– durability and weathering assessment of stone and related product
– detailed investigation into stone and construction material failures
– performance and development of quality assurance programs and specifications
– objective and independent Expert Witness services related to the selection, installation and use of stone products and related infrastructure.

We know that reporting and evaluation should be about more than just numbers, which is why we provide unique insights and meaningful results, saving you time and helping you make the right choices for your valuable project.

Visit our website or get in touch for further details.

Name: Surefoot Footings Australia
Description:
Surefoot Footings is revolutionizing the footing industry with its groundbreaking, concrete-free alternative to traditional screw piles and bored piers. Our innovative foundations are reshaping the way construction projects are executed, providing an exceptional efficiency that stands up to gravity, uplift, shear, and moment loads.
Engineered with high-strength steel and a distinctive hybrid design, our "all-in-one" steel footings showcase an unparalleled balance of strength and adaptability. This is not a one-size-fits-all solution; we tailor our footings to the specific requirements of each job, factoring in site soil conditions and structural design loads. This results in a footing system that not only replaces screw pile foundations with impressive outcomes but is also custom-built for each project.
Our unique shape and high-strength steel combine to create an efficient pile cap in our "all-in-one system". When the piles are driven and the cap secured, the multidirectional piles' opposing forces offer a solid, stable, and economical foundation. The system's design allows it to become even more efficient when resisting various loads, with the soil structure absorbing the applied stress.
Suitable for a wide range of projects, our footings adhere to all compliance standards and regulations, ensuring safety and quality in all aspects. With Surefoot Footings, you're not just choosing an alternative; you're opting for a superior, future-forward solution in the footing industry. Discover the Surefoot difference today.

Name: Basalt Engineering
Description: We are a US manufacturer of basalt fiber based products for reinforcing concrete, with our primarily product being basalt fiber (BFRP) rebar. Basalt fiber is created from volcanic rock. Our basalt rebar is 2.5x stronger, 5x lighter, noncorrosive (does not rust), nonconductive, and transparent to radio frequency and microwave as compared to traditional steel rebar.  The manufacturing of our basalt fiber rebar reduces carbon emissions by 60% compared to manufacturing steel rebar. The sustained life of our product is 100 years as compared to 50 years with steel rebar and it can be recycled with concrete, unlike like steel rebar which requires the rebar to be removed prior to recycling.  Our products are considered new technology in the concrete reinforcement industry, which has been around for over 135 years.

Name: INEX 2050
Description:
INEX 2050 n'est pas seulement un aperçu du futur ; c'est une incarnation révolutionnaire de l'expertise en ingénierie environnementale d'INEX BET, allant de conceptions novatrices de bâtiments à des écosystèmes urbains résilients. Il se présente comme un pôle de compétences dédié à la transition climatique.

Le Rapport Bruntland nous accompagne depuis plus de 30 ans - un parcours générationnel. Pendant ce laps de temps, nous sommes arrivés à une jonction critique, l'année charnière de 2050, où les modèles climatiques, sociaux et économiques risquent de s'effondrer. Cette fenêtre de 30 ans est notre opportunité de stimuler un changement positif sur les plans écologique, environnemental, technologique et social. INEX 2050 émerge en réponse à l'impératif de changer nos perspectives temporelles et spatiales, envisageant les bâtiments de 2050 dès aujourd'hui et guidant nos villes vers des modèles plus résilients.

Au cœur d'INEX 2050 réside un triple engagement : d'abord, redéfinir notre rôle dans le conseil environnemental, nous alignant sur les attentes de la prochaine génération ; ensuite, être une force motrice de la transition écologique et climatique ; et enfin, explorer, expérimenter et préfigurer les trois prochaines décennies dès maintenant. 
Rejoignez-nous pour façonner un avenir qui commence aujourd'hui - INEX 2050, là où l'innovation rencontre l'activisme.

Name: Ecosophy Studio
Description:
Our Expertise: Building Fabric Consultancy

At Ecosophy Studio, our name is a testament to our commitment to environmental sustainability. Derived from 'Eco', a nod to the ancient Greek word "Οίκος" (Ecos), meaning home, and 'Σοφία' (Sophia), symbolising deep knowledge or wisdom, our consultancy embodies the union of ecological awareness and sophisticated building science.

Beyond Compliance: Better Building Performance

While regulatory compliance is a common driver for hygrothermal modelling and thermal bridge modelling, our approach goes beyond minimum standards. Our goal is to optimise building performance holistically, by integrating modelling outcomes and our  PassivHaus expertise into broader conversations about fabric efficiency, airtightness, hygrothermal risk, and occupant health. We work closely with your design or technical team to interpret results and improve outcomes - not just to tick boxes, but to build better buildings.

We leverage state-of-the-art software to simulate the long-term hygrothermal performance of building assemblies and construction details under varying conditions. This enables us to deliver high-quality, project-specific assessments and guidance on moisture-related risks to architectural firms, energy consultants, and construction companies - both large and small. We also support manufacturers and suppliers bringing innovative products and building systems to market. Through in-depth hygrothermal risk analysis, including comprehensive parametric studies, we evaluate performance across different climates, structures, and conditions - helping ensure successful product integration and long-term reliability.

As certified PassivHaus consultants, we foster close collaboration between engineering and architectural teams in both new-build and retrofit projects. Our goal is to strike a balance between energy efficiency, material durability, occupant comfort, and carbon reduction - paving the way toward PassivHaus or EnerPHit certification.

Name: LP Build
Description:
In LP Build, ci dedichiamo a creare spazi che rappresentano un perfetto equilibrio tra comfort, funzionalità ed estetica. Il nostro approccio si basa sulla convinzione che gli ambienti in cui viviamo e lavoriamo debbano essere non solo belli da vedere, ma anche progettati per migliorare la qualità della vita, offrendo soluzioni pratiche e sostenibili. Ogni progetto che realizziamo è pensato per rispondere a queste esigenze, con un'attenzione particolare alla sicurezza e all'efficienza energetica.

Il vero punto di forza di LP Build è il nostro team tecnico, composto da professionisti altamente qualificati che lavorano in stretta collaborazione con architetti e progettisti. Questa sinergia ci permette di seguire il progetto in tutte le sue fasi, dal concept iniziale fino al completamento, offrendo supporto continuo e consulenze specializzate per garantire che ogni dettaglio sia curato alla perfezione.

Innovazione e sostenibilità sono i principi che guidano il nostro lavoro quotidiano. Ci impegniamo a trasformare edifici in organismi efficienti e intelligenti, in linea con gli standard NZEB (Edifici a Energia Quasi Zero), per ridurre al minimo l'impatto ambientale e massimizzare il risparmio energetico. Grazie a questa visione, siamo in grado di realizzare spazi moderni, all'avanguardia e funzionali, che rispondono alle esigenze del presente e anticipano quelle del futuro.

LP Build non si limita a costruire, ma trasforma idee in realtà concrete.

Name: HANO
Description:
HANO is one of the leading companies for the production of aluminum glass facades and aluminum hardware in Bosnia and Herzegovina and beyond, designing, producing and installing facades at some of the most prestigious facilities in the region, and providing services of the highest quality according to internationally recognized standards.

The name HANO stands as a synonym for the most sophisticated facade constructions. In a period of two decades, the company has developed into a leading company in the field of aluminum in construction (HANO) and processed glass (RAMA-GLAS), not only as a contractor and distributor within the construction sector, but also as an authority in providing complete architectural solutions. The continuous process of research and development, investing in the latest technological solutions and strong commitment and consistency in following internationally recognized relevant standards, have led to HANO gaining an enviable reputation for the quality of its service and innovation in both domestic and foreign markets.

The company owns modern German machines for processing aluminum profiles, production of aluminum facades and aluminum hardware. All equipment is located in about 2550m2 of closed production facilities.

The capacity of the installed plants is the production of approximately 1000m2 of facade in one calendar month. The company also has modern equipment for processing aluminum composite panels as well as other types of panels for outdoor use, decorative panels and panels for interior use.
Location: Ilidža, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina

Name: Novkol
Description:
S timom iskusnih inženjera, politikom konstantnog ulaganja u najmoderniju opremu i stalno prateći najnovija dostignuća u nauci i tehnici, preduzeće vrlo brzo postaje jedan od lidera među izvođačkim kompanijama u zemlji.

Osnovna delatnost firme je projektovanje i izvođenje građevinskih radova iz oblasti:

- geotehničkih podzemnih konstrukcija;
- hidrotehničkih konstrukcija.

Specifičnost po kojoj se NOVKOL izdvaja je uvođenje novih tehnologija u oblasti geotehnike prema najvišim standardima zastupljenim u razvijenim zemljama.

NOVKOL čine oko 150 zaposlenih ili angažovanih radnika – diplomiranih inženjera i tehničara građevinarstva, mašinstva, geologije i rudarstva, kao i kvalifikovanih radnika različitih struka.

Preduzeće poseduje veliku licencu izdatu od nadležnog Ministarstva za izvođenje hidrotehničkih objekata, kao i 23 ličnih licenci zaposlenih inženjera za odgovorne izvođače i projektante iz oblasti konstrukcije, hidrotehnike i geotehnike.

Preduzeće je među prvima u Srbiji implementiralo sertifikovani integrisani sistem menadžmenta prema zahtevima standarda ISO 9001, ISO 14001 i OHSAS 18001. NOVKOL je priznat kao kvalitetan izvođač koji brine o aspektima životne sredine, bezbednosti i zdravlju zaposlenih. Zahvaljujući tome uživa ugled među značajnim investitorima.

Name: MIOI BET
Description:
Le cabinet de bureau d’Études MIOI BET est spécialiser en installation électrique (CFO-CFA) dans le bâtiment. Il a pour objectif de permettre à tout porteur de projet immobilier d’avoir un diagnostic technique, un estimatif financier et une gestion de l’ensemble de leur projet électriquement parlant. L’entreprise est une EI (Entreprise individuel), elle a était créée en 2023.

Notre objectif est de répondre aux contrôles qualité et prix afin d'assurer la
satisfaction du client. Pour mener à bien nos divers missions nous aidons nos clients en leur
proposant des :
- Consultations pour un diagnostique technique et financier
- Etudes de plan conformément aux normes en vigueur
- Suivis de chantier
De ce fait, la MIOI BET est spécialisée dans l'étude de travaux électriques. Notamment la :
- Réalisation d’estimatif
- Réalisation de dossier en phase de projet (PRO)
- Réalisation de dossier de consultation d'entreprise (DCE)
- Réalisation de plan d'exécution (EXE)
- Apport de matériel électrique spécifique
- Gestion de chantier

En tant qu’Entreprise Individuelle, l’entreprise est constituée que de son gérant qui est Hamza El-fhayed. Son parcours scolaire s'inscrit dans le domaine scientifique. Après, l'obtention d'un bac S - SVT spécialité SSI (anciennement sciences informatiques dite SI), il poursuit avec un BTS électrotechnique. Cet apprentissage lui a permis de s'insérer dans le domaine de l'électricité en tant que monteur-câbleur dans la construction de tableau électrique. Cette
expérience professionnelle de 2 ans a été enrichissante et a démontré sa capacité à travailler en équipe, dynamiquement et efficacement tout en apprenant afin de s’améliorer dans le
domaine de l’électricité. Par la suite, afin d’avoir plus de possibilités de carrière, il a pris la décision de reprendre ses études en effectuant la licence professionnelle Métiers de l'électricité et de
l'énergie, parcours Chargé d'Affaires en Ingénierie Électrique et Électronique (CAIEE) à l'IUT de Montpellier.

Name: CIAM SUD-EST
Description:
CIAM : L'expert en charpente métallique en Occitanie 

Depuis 1975, CIAM est votre partenaire de confiance pour la conception, la fabrication et le montage de structures métalliques. Avec plus de 50 ans d’expérience, notre entreprise couvre toute la région Occitanie grâce à son siège à Rodez (Aveyron) et ses deux antennes à Toulouse et Montpellier.

 Une expertise qui s'articule autour de trois axes majeurs :

1 Conception :

Un bureau d’études performant doté des meilleurs outils du métier .
Calculs précis, traçage détaillé et modélisation de tout type de projet, pour une réalisation sur-mesure.

2 Production :

Deux ateliers modernes totalisant plus de 6000 m², équipés pour répondre à toutes vos demandes .
Des machines de pointe, notamment un banc de découpe plasma , pour le débit, le perçage, l’assemblage, la découpe de tôles informatisée, le soudage, la mise en peinture, ainsi que la réalisation de chéneaux et accessoires pour couverture et bardage.

3 Montage :

Des équipes qualifiées et expérimentées sur le terrain .
Des projets réalisés avec soin et efficacité, qu’il s’agisse de locaux commerciaux, bâtiments industriels, agricoles ou tertiaires.

 Avec CIAM, vous bénéficiez d’une solution complète et cohérente, garantie par notre maîtrise de chaque étape du projet. Nous mettons un point d’honneur à respecter vos exigences de qualité, de délai et de budget.

Faites confiance à CIAM, l'expert en charpente métallique en Occitanie !

Fondée et dirigée par un Maître Artisan d’Art en Charpente, l’entreprise incarne les valeurs de l’artisanat : excellence du geste, transmission du savoir-faire, et engagement durable. Chaque projet est pensé comme une pièce unique, façonnée avec rigueur, passion et respect du bois.

Nous intervenons sur des bâtiments anciens comme sur des constructions neuves de caractère. Parmi nos réalisations : la réhabilitation d’une grange en salle de spectacle, la restauration d’un pigeonnier en chêne tortueux, la création d’un pavillon en colombage pour un domaine viticole, ou encore la fabrication d’abris animaliers et de structures décoratives.

Nos clients sont des particuliers exigeants, des architectes du patrimoine, des collectivités locales, des domaines viticoles, ou encore des professionnels du bâtiment en quête de savoir-faire traditionnel et de finitions soignées.

Façons Bois accompagne également les jeunes charpentiers dans leur formation, avec la volonté de faire vivre et évoluer les métiers d’art.
Notre ambition : bâtir avec sens, transmettre avec exigence, et faire rayonner le savoir-faire artisanal dans chaque réalisation.

VIA-T is dé transitieversneller naar duurzaam en biobased bouwen, , gefundeerd op vier pijlers.

Innovatie
Kennis, innovatie en technologische ontwikkelingen zijn de aanjagers op het gebied van circulariteit, duurzaamheid en energietransitie. VIA-T geeft innovatieve ontwikkelingen een podium en brengt de verschillende partners uit het innovatienetwerk met elkaar in contact.

Onderwijs
De transitie naar duurzaam bouwen start met goed opgeleide mensen. VIA-T staat voor Sterk Techniekonderwijs en stimuleert vmbo-leerlingen over te stappen naar het ROC in een technische richting.

Leren-werken
Duurzame inzetbaarheid, mensen vasthouden in het bedrijf en laten doorontwikkelen is een belangrijke programmalijn binnen VIA-T. Daarom wordt een leer-werkplek opgezet voor na- om- en bijscholingstrajecten op maat.

Praktijk
Architecten, ontwikkelaars, bouwers, installateurs; alle partners in de bouwketen zijn welkom binnen het netwerk van VIA-T. Zij werken iedere dag met vernieuwende technologieën, technieken en materialen en dragen zo bij aan de duurzame transitie binnen de leefomgeving.

Description:

Vi utför tjänster så som mark-, rivning- och anläggningsentreprenader.

Kvalitetspolicy:	
MOAB Anläggning skall arbeta aktivt för att tillfredsställa kunderna med kvalitativa arbeten och goda ekonomiska förutsättningar som skapar ett långsiktigt förtroende och samarbete parter emellan.

För att uppfylla detta ska vi:
•	I tidigt läge kunna bidra med kompetens och erfarenhet.
•	Vara lyhörd till beställarens och andra intressenters krav.
•	Gemensamt ta fram underlag och ramar för att optimera projektets kvalitet och ekonomi.
•	Dokumentation och uppföljning för varje projekt.

Miljöpolicy:	
MOAB Anläggning skall vara det bidragande företaget till att minimera föroreningar och skadlig miljöpåverkan.

För att uppfylla detta ska vi:
•	Minimera mängden avfall och öka återbruket.
•	Miljövänligare val utav maskiner och material.
•	Vara effektiva och minimera resursslöseri.
•	Följa alla gällande lagar och regler.

Arbetsmiljöpolicy:	
MOAB Anläggning skall arbete för att skapa en säker arbetsplats med bra arbetsmiljö, trygghet, gemenskap och delaktighet. 

För att uppfylla detta ska vi:
•	Förebygga arbetsmiljörisker och identifiera faror.
•	Förhindra skador och ohälsa.
•	Bidra till en god hälsa genom t. ex en bra företagshälsovård.
•	Gemensamma aktiviteter.
•	Interna start och årsmöten.
•	Följa alla gällande arbetsmiljölagar och regler.
•	Inte trakassera, diskriminera eller kränka varandra.
•	Ha nolltolerans mot droganvändning.

Name: VMV
Description:
Depuis 1979, VMV intervient en Loire et en Haute-Loire au service des professionnels comme des particuliers. Fiers de notre territoire et de ses richesses, nous souhaitons maintenir cette relation privilégiée et participer, autant que faire se peut, à leur développement. C’est pour cela que nous concevons nous-mêmes nos menuiseries PVC et aluminium au sein de nos ateliers à Firminy et ce depuis le début de nos activités au sein de ces filières.
Le développement de l’économie locale permet de trouver des stratégies efficaces pour pérenniser un savoir-faire transmissible à l’échelle d’une région ou d’un pays. En encourageant les artisans et producteurs locaux, c’est tout un cercle vertueux qui s’installe durablement pour nos territoires. L’interaction entre les acteurs locaux permet à la fois de mieux partager les ressources mais aussi de redynamiser les villes et les villages qui accueillent nos entreprises.

Cela implique plus de richesses produites et dépensées au niveau local avec la possibilité de créer de l’emploi, comme nous le faisons dans notre département depuis 1979.

Ecologiquement, faire appel aux entreprises et aux artisans locaux permet de réduire l’empreinte carbone de nos trajets pour le transport des marchandises. Comme nous produisons nos menuiseries dans nos ateliers situés à Firminy, leur transport ne dépasse généralement pas le secteur régional.

Chez VMV, nous pensons qu’il est devenu urgent de favoriser – dans la mesure du possible – les circuits courts dans le secteur du bâtiment, et ce afin de réduire les distances d’approvisionnement des matériaux, de valoriser les ressources locales, de bâtir à des coûts plus justes et de créer des partenariats durables entre les collectivités territoriales et les PME.

Name: ComActivate Project
Description:
ComActivate responds to growing levels of energy poverty across the EU, especially in the Central and Eastern European (CEE) region, by addressing the poor energy efficiency of buildings as a major driver of energy poverty, and as a driver of climate change.

ComActivate will be implemented in three municipalities in three countries: Burgas in Bulgaria, Józsefváros in Hungary and Kaišiadorys in Lithuania. These countries are situated in different regions of Europe facing different climatic challenges, yet they have similar characteristics due to their shared Socialist history and the large privatisation of the housing stock in the 1990s.

Around 60% of people in CEE live in Multi-Family Apartment Buildings (MFABs) and the social, technical, legislative, and financial challenges to renovate such buildings are very complex, especially when it comes to renewable energies. ComActivate will develop, demonstrate and advocate solutions for MFABs that reduce energy poverty, enhance energy security, and bring building emissions in line with climate targets (near complete decarbonisation by 2050) through:

- Institutionalisation of Resource Centres (RCs) at the local level as a recognised mechanism to reach energy poor communities and facilitate agreement in Home Owner Associations (HOAs);
- Development of Neighbourhood Energy Sufficiency Roadmaps (NESRs) to address the complexities of renewable energies for MFABs and determine how energy needs can be secured in line with poverty alleviation and climate neutrality;
- Building the capacity of HOA managers for the implementation of renovations, and raising awareness of communities to dispel concerns about the benefits of renovations; and
- Public-private policy and investment dialogue at the national and EU level to enable the sustainability of RCs and the implementation of NESRs.
