Name: CxM Ltd
Description:
As a client, do you have a poor experience of building handover? Have your expectation been achieved?
Unfortunately the commissioning activities on many construction projects are often not given the correct level of attention.   Commissioning is typically rushed at the end of a job with varied results and ineffective handovers.  This leads to dissatisfied clients and inefficient, fragile buildings.  

Fully commissioning the building services is paramount in providing correctly operating, reliable and efficient buildings.  The commissioning periods available during the build period is often the only time when the building's systems can be 'tested to the max' to prove they perform and respond correctly to various simulated building conditions.  These tests, when successfully completed, provide the client and end users with greater confidence that the equipment and, in particular, critical services do operate and perform as expected.  

CxM Ltd is a commissioning management company.  We specialise in providing a comprehensive commissioning management service to the buildings' industry, often directly for client organisations. 

Commissioning management is a quality process and we use a structured approach in delivering our service.  Our specialists have the skill and experience to identify and document the commissioning activities and to track their progress through to completion, often personally witnessing the tests until satisfied.  

This results in systems being correctly commissioned, monitoring systems (e.g. BMS) reporting correctly and critical systems responding correctly.  In addition to the confidence this brings, the long term benefits include lower energy usage (and costs) through more efficient operation and greater life expectancy of equipment (provided it is correctly maintained).

Teleios Enviro Pvt. Ltd. is an ISO 9001:2015 certified engineering and manufacturing company specializing in Pre-Engineered Building (PEB) solutions through its flagship brand STEELInfra by Teleios.

Backed by a legacy in steel fabrication dating back to 1984 and established in 2019 by an IIT Delhi alumnus, Teleios Enviro delivers end-to-end PEB solutions encompassing engineering, fabrication, and project management. The company designs and executes high-quality pre-engineered buildings and steel structures for a wide range of applications including warehouses, industrial sheds, factories, mezzanine floors, showrooms, and infrastructure facilities.

With a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility in Haridwar equipped with CNC cutting, shot blasting, painting, and advanced fabrication capabilities, Teleios Enviro focuses on precision, quality, and on-time delivery. The company follows a customer-centric approach, continuous improvement in processes, and cost-effective engineering to create durable and efficient building solutions.

Teleios Enviro has served clients across industries such as logistics, manufacturing, infrastructure, power, and construction, and remains committed to delivering reliable, engineered steel solutions that meet evolving customer needs.

Time Efficiency: We cut construction time by over 50% without compromising on quality or design.

Sustainability & Innovation: Our methods ensure minimal on-site wastage, offering cost-effective, scalable, and adaptable building solutions.

Client-Centric Approach: Trusted by major industry leaders like Adani, L&T, TATA, Schneider, ITC, and Belectric, we focus on exceptional customer satisfaction and timely delivery.

At Satmax, we don’t just build structures; we build the future with smarter, faster, and more sustainable construction solutions. Let’s innovate, build, and grow together!

Name: Belgrade Arbor
Description:
In a city that keeps growing, where few buildings truly stand out, Belgrade Arbor emerges as a new urban landmark — defined by design, function, and harmony with nature. Its façade, inspired by tree canopies, reflects growth, stability, and connection. More than a residence, it’s a lifestyle that redefines daily living in New Belgrade.

Thoughtfully designed to balance privacy and urban energy, Belgrade Arbor offers comfort, light, air, and space. From the panoramic rooftop garden to dual-orientation apartments, every detail conveys quality, freedom, and security.

The project is developed by Perose Property Group, a renowned investor known for its consistency in quality and aesthetics. Following successful developments such as AD Residence and Harmony Homes, Belgrade Arbor represents their most ambitious address to date.

U gradu koji neprestano raste, gde se zgrade nižu ali retko ostavljaju trag, Belgrade Arbor izranja kao nova urbana ikona — samostalna, prepoznatljiva, oblikovana dizajnom, funkcijom i skladom sa prirodom.

Njena fasada, inspirisana krošnjama drveća, simbolizuje rast, stabilnost i povezanost. Ovo nije samo prostor za život — već način života koji redefiniše
ritam svakodnevice u srcu Novog Beograda.

Udobnost, svetlost, vazduh i prostor. Belgrade Arbor je pažljivo oblikovan kako bi spojio mirnu privatnost sa urbanom dinamikom. Od krovne bašte s panoramskim pogledom do pažljivo dizajniranih stanova, među kojima su i oni sa dvostrukom orijentacijom — svaki detalj je osmišljen da pruži više od kvadrature: osećaj kvaliteta, slobode i sigurnosti.

Projekat realizuje Perose Property Group, renomirani investitor poznat po doslednosti u kvalitetu i estetici. Posle uspešnih realizacija kao što su AD Residence i Harmony Homes, Belgrade Arbor predstavlja njihovu najambiciozniju adresu do sada.

Comprehensive Services

UNC offers a full spectrum of services to ensure exceptional acoustic performance:
	•	Supply: Premium acoustic materials sourced globally to meet the highest standards.
	•	Manufacture: State-of-the-art production of PET panels, ensuring eco-friendly, high-quality solutions.
	•	Design: Tailored acoustic designs that balance aesthetics with functionality, led by experienced consultants and engineers.
	•	Installation: Professional execution by a skilled team, delivering seamless results every time.

Our Expertise

With a team of seasoned acoustic consultants, designers, engineers, and technicians, UNC delivers precision and innovation at every stage. From small-scale projects to large commercial installations, our expertise ensures flawless results.

Trademarked Products

UNC’s product portfolio includes innovative, trademarked solutions like:
	•	M-System Linear: Versatile acoustic panels designed for modern spaces, offering superior sound absorption and aesthetic appeal.
	•	Polysound: Eco-friendly PET solutions that provide excellent noise reduction while enhancing the visual appeal of any space.

Global Reach

UNC operates globally, transforming spaces in corporate offices, educational institutions, healthcare facilities, and beyond. Wherever you are in the world, UNC ensures top-tier service and results.

Sustainability at Our Core

Sustainability drives everything we do. From sourcing PET fibers in Europe to reducing waste through innovative recycling methods, UNC is committed to minimizing environmental impact while maximizing quality.

In 2016 the management of MBC started their construction story in the fencing and decking industry. This shortly expanded into including garages and landscaping.

In 2020 MBC began gaining experience and moving into the Residential and Commercial Renovation sector, completing full home renovations and Tenancy Improvements of buildings up to and around 10’000 sqft. Description:
Projex Group provides premium quality products to the Australian market and offer an unrivalled technical support and customer service. 

The company offer 4 distinctive services:
1- Waterproofing Solutions with Wolfin and Cosmofin PVC Sheet Membranes
2- Rail Noise & Vibration Attenuation Solutions with Projex Sub-Ballast Mat
3- Pipe Penetration Seals Solutions with Link-Seal System
4- Protective Matting with Shockmat

The Waterproofing division of the company work closely with Architect who specifies waterproofing membranes as well as with professionals such as Builders, Waterproofing Contractors, Building Owners, Strata Managers, etc. Projex Supplies Wolfin & Cosmofin Waterproofing Systems, the 2 very best German manufactured membranes available in Australia.

The Rail services/products offered by Projex Group provide a solution to considerably reduce noise & vibrations around railways. Projex Group has over 25 years experience in servicing the domestic railway industry working closely with many public and privately owned railway networks. During this time we have liased with operators, engineers, project managers & contractors Australia wide. 

The Pipe Penetration Seals Solutions supplied by Projex help to efficiently & permanently seal the core hole space between the pipes & the wall, floor or ceiling that it passes through. For more than 15 years Projex Group have been supplying Link-Seals, Century-Line Sleeves, Cell-Cast Discs and other products into small & major infrastructure projects. These include Gas Plants, Oil Refineries, Hospitals, Water & Waste Treatment Plants where the sealing of these penetrations is extremely critical & of the highest importance.

Name: Synexys Building Concepts
Description:
Met Synexys zet ik mij in voor een leefbare en klimaatbestendige gebouwde omgeving. Dit doe ik door een positieve bijdrage te leveren aan gezonde, comfortabele en energiezuinige gebouwen in een klimaatbestendige context, altijd met de gebruiker centraal. Vanaf de eerste ontwerpschetsen zoek ik naar synergieën die de leefbaarheid in en rondom het gebouw verbeteren: klimaatadaptief, natuurinclusief en waardevol voor zowel het gebouw als de omgeving.

Mijn aanpak omvat:
- Leefbare gebouwde omgeving: Een comfortabel en gezond gebouw begint bij een leefbaar gebied. Ik onderzoek de gebiedswaarde op klimaatadaptatie (hittestress, waterrobuustheid en windklimaat), daglicht, uitzicht en natuurwaarde, en vergroot deze om het gebied en het gebouw leefbaarder te maken.
- Optimaal binnenklimaat: Elk gebouw en elke activiteit vraagt een andere ontwerpbenadering. Ik werk samen met de architect en geef bijzondere aandacht aan de gebouworiëntatie, de open-dichtverhouding van de gevels en de scheiding tussen binnen en buiten. Dit zorgt voor een aangenaam comfort in de zomer en winter, zonder tocht of koude afstraling, met een goede luchtvochtigheid.
- Biobased materialen: Deze ademende, vochtregulerende materialen zorgen voor natuurlijk comfort, verhogen de leefbaarheid door biophilische waarde en zijn veel minder milieubelastend, wat bijdraagt aan de klimaatdoelen.
- Installatie-arme ontwerpen: Met de Passiefhuisprincipes en de near Zero Energy Building (nZEB)-tool beperk ik de energievraag voor verwarming en koeling. Dit zorgt voor energiezuinige gebouwen met lage energielasten, kostenbesparend en met minimale milieu-impact.

Synexys creëert synergieën in energie- en materiaalgebruik: comfortabel, energiezuinig en circulair. Ik werk samen met opdrachtgevers om de toekomstwaarde van gebouwen te onderzoeken, circulaire oplossingen te integreren en het energieverbruik te minimaliseren, wat leidt tot duurzame, kostenefficiënte gebouwen met een lagere milieubelasting over de levensduur.

Confier les travaux de construction de son bien est une mission délicate, c’est pourquoi notre équipe d’experts vous accompagne à chaque étape du projet.

Des travaux de terrassement à la pose de la dernière couche de peinture, la construction d’un bâtiment comporte une succession d’étapes importantes, et le gros œuvre fermé fait partie d’entre elles.

Le gros œuvre fermé est une prestation bien connue dans le métier de la construction car il détermine la solidité et la stabilité d’un bâtiment.

Ce type de construction comprend la réalisation de l’ossature principale de votre future maison et nécessite l’intervention d’une équipe de professionnels. Le choix de matériaux de qualité ainsi que de l’équipe de professionnels est donc primordial pour la concrétisation du projet.

Name: Earth Building Association of Australia
Description:
The Earth Building Association of Australia (EBAA) is an organisation formed to promote the use of Unfired Earth as a building medium throughout Australia.

EBAA is a broad based organisation which has members that include builders, specialist contractors, tradespeople and ownerbuilders, specialist manufacturers and suppliers, architects and designers, consultants, educators and students, with a common interest in the use of Unfired Earth.

The formation of EBAA commenced in 1990 at a gathering held in Maldon, Victoria. A subsequent meeting took place in Mildura, Victoria in 1991 which elected the first Committee of EBAA. Since then the primary focus of the Association has been communicating constructively with all levels of Government concerned with the regulation of Building practice in Australia as well as educating and informing our membership and the public.

Our association has a strong national focus and is the peak body for Earth Building practitioners, both private & commercial, in Australia. Membership is open to all with an interest in earth building.

Aims & Objectives

To represent the interests of members in the advancement of unfired earth technology within Australia and internationally.
To promote the informed use of unfired earth as a building material within Australia.
To establish an information and referral network for those wishing to use earth within the building industry.
To uphold the interests of earth building in public or private forums.
To act as an information source in any process to establish rules, regulations or code of practice which effect the use of unfired earth as a construction material.
To promote earth building technologies which are environmentally benign.
To liaise with other groups or individuals, both in Australia and internationally, who have interests in promoting earth building.

Name: Lean Construction Institute - Austin Community of Practice
Description:
Lean Construction Institute - Austin Community of Practice is a local network for Owners, Designers, and Construction professionals committed to advancing their careers, improving project outcomes, and fostering a culture of Lean thinking. We bring together individuals passionate about innovation and collaboration.

As a member of our CoP, you’ll gain access to: a vibrant community of Lean practitioners to expand your network; opportunities to share and learn best practices to enhance individual, team, and organizational success; and a variety of events and activities, including:

– Gemba Walks: Experience Lean in action
– Educational Sessions: Build your skills and knowledge
– Networking Events: Connect over coffee, golf, or project presentations

OUR MISSION:
Empower Lean thinkers and adopters in our local area by providing the tools, resources, and connections needed to:

– Advance their careers by learning Lean techniques and applying them effectively
– Create impact through workshops, success stories, and Lean training sessions
– Build a stronger community that drives innovation and eliminates waste across the construction lifecycle

HOW WE’RE TRANSFORMING THE INDUSTRY:
– Promoting Collaboration: Bridging the gaps between Owners, Designers, and Builders
– Enhancing Satisfaction: Lean project delivery ensures every stakeholder sees value
– Encouraging Continuous Learning: Inspiring growth and Lean adoption through our events

JOIN LCI TO FURTHER ADVANCE YOUR LEAN JOURNEY:
While CoP participants are not individual members of LCI, your company can become a member to unlock even more benefits! LCI membership includes:

– Exclusive access to Lean training and tools 
– Discounts on workshops, webinars, and the annual LCI Congress – the premier event for Lean learning and networking 
– Access to dedicated LCI professional staff

STAY CONNECTED: 
Follow this page for updates on upcoming events, webinars and trainings, or visit www.leanconstruction.org.

Name: Starken AAC Sdn Bhd
Description:
Starken AAC Sdn Bhd is the leading AAC (Autoclaved Aerated Concrete) manufacturer in Malaysia that aims to deliver quality, strong, versatile and high performance building products to its customers.

As Malaysia’s  largest manufacturer of AAC (Autoclaved Aerated Concrete),  Starken AAC invested in the state of art machineries and technology supplied by Wehrhanh of Germany,  you can be assured you are getting a high quality product with the technical expertise to back it up. 

Situated at Serendah, Selangor and Kota Tinggi, Johor.  These 2 state –of-the-art factories manufacturer AAC blocks efficiently and engineered AAC panels cost-effectively with an annual capacity of 1,000,000 cubic meters.  It covers wide range of AAC products with various compressive strengths to cater for specific architectural and design requirements of various types of buildings.  Starken’s  main products include AAC blocks, AAC wall and floor panels (contain anti-corrosion steel reinforcement for added strength and are available in a range of lengths) and AAC lintels with density of 450 kg/m3 – 700 kg/m3.

With its storage capacity of more than 20,000 m2, the supply of AAC products will always be sufficient to meet the demand of on-going projects.  Starken’s reputation has stood the test of time, and today we continue to lead the way in fast, economic and sustainable building solutions.

Name: PX3 Engenharia e Empreiteira ltda
Description:
Nossa história
A PX3 foi fundada em 2021, inicialmente sob o nome de Perito X Engenharia, com o foco em perícias judiciais e extrajudiciais. Com o aumento da demanda por laudos técnicos de excelência, surgiu a oportunidade de expandir para o segmento de mão de obra, atuando na recuperação de edifícios e na pintura interna para construtoras.

À medida que nos desenvolvemos no mercado de execução, decidimos o reposicionamento de marca para PX3 Engenharia e Empreiteira, com o objetivo de oferecer soluções inovadoras e eficientes na área de engenharia e construção civil. Nossa equipe é altamente qualificada e treinada, destacando-se pelo compromisso com a qualidade, transparência e ética.

Cada projeto é tratado com dedicação e atenção aos detalhes, garantindo que superamos as expectativas dos nossos clientes. Hoje, atuamos em diversas cidades, prestando serviços a condomínios e construtoras, sempre com o mesmo empenho e profissionalismo que nos caracterizam desde o início.

O que somos e o que fazemos
Na PX3, somos especialistas em engenharia e execução, com forte atuação nas áreas de patologia das construções, recuperação predial e obra civil.

Oferecemos serviços em três segmentos principais: inspeções e laudos técnicos, onde realizamos diagnósticos precisos para identificar e solucionar problemas prediais e estruturais; recuperação predial, atuando em fachadas e reparos estruturais para garantir a integridade e a estética dos edifícios; e construção civil, com mão de obra qualificada em pintura de alto padrão, assentamento de pisos e porcelanatos, além de execução de drywall e gesso acartonado.

Oferecemos soluções personalizadas para condomínios e construtoras, utilizando as melhores tecnologias e materiais do mercado. Nosso compromisso com qualidade, segurança, transparência e ética assegura que superamos as expectativas dos nossos clientes em cada projeto.

MES DOMAINES D'INTERVENTION :

 Estimation & Conseil en amont :

Estimation budgétaire dès les premières phases (esquisse/APS).

Propositions de variantes économiques et assistance financière.

 Métrés 3D & BIM (ATTIC+) :

Réalisation de métrés précis via la maquette numérique.

Rédaction des pièces écrites (CCTP, DPGF).

 Analyse d'Offres & Marchés :

Gestion de la consultation des entreprises.

Analyse comparative, négociations et rédaction des marchés de travaux.

 FORMATION ATTIC+ INDÉPENDANTE : Organisme de formation déclaré, je vous forme sur le logiciel ATTIC+ en tant qu'indépendant, de l'initiation au perfectionnement sur les modules complexes. (Aucun lien avec l'éditeur du logiciel).

Pédagogie issue de la pratique quotidienne.

Programmes sur-mesure (Métrés, CCTP, Modules 3D...).

 POURQUOI ÉCOROC ? Une approche flexible, une expertise technique avec des méthodes établies et une indépendance totale vis-à-vis des éditeurs de logiciels.

Using technology and innovation, Evolve Stone delivers a high-performing, beautiful stone veneer that is simply installed with a finish nailer.  Evolve Stone is the only mortar-less, colour-throughout stone veneer that installs up to 10X faster and is a fraction of the weight compared to the competition. It looks and feels like real stone and is incredibly easy to install without the need to specialist skilled labour. 

No mortar. No hardware. Nothing like you’ve ever seen before. Evolve Stone is the future of mortar-less stone veneer.

Evolve Stone is lightweight, seamless, bold, and beautiful.

Innovation Building Products UK are the official UK distributor of Evolve Stone.

Bienvenue chez BKH DEVELOPMENT, une entreprise dédiée à la réalisation de vos projets immobiliers les plus ambitieux. Nous nous engageons à offrir des services complets de construction de bâtiments, villas, maisons, bureaux et appartements, ainsi que des services de rénovation et d'aménagement.

Notre équipe d'experts est composée d'architectes talentueux, d'ingénieurs chevronnés et de professionnels qualifiés qui travaillent de concert pour donner vie à vos idées. Que vous envisagiez de construire une nouvelle résidence, d'étendre votre espace existant ou de moderniser vos installations, nous sommes là pour transformer vos aspirations en réalité.

Nos services de construction comprennent la conception et la réalisation de bâtiments résidentiels et commerciaux, mettant l'accent sur la qualité, l'esthétique et l'efficacité énergétique. Que ce soit une villa de luxe, une maison familiale, un bureau moderne ou un appartement élégant, nous adaptons nos compétences pour répondre à vos besoins spécifiques.

La rénovation est une partie intégrante de notre expertise. Nous rénovons avec soin et précision, en mettant en valeur le caractère unique de chaque espace. Nos services d'aménagement intérieur et extérieur visent à créer des environnements fonctionnels et esthétiques qui reflètent votre style de vie et répondent à vos exigences.

Chez BKH DEVELOPMENT, nous sommes guidés par l'engagement envers l'excellence, l'innovation et la satisfaction client. Chaque projet est une collaboration étroite avec nos clients, garantissant une compréhension approfondie de leurs besoins et une livraison conforme à leurs attentes.

Nous sommes fiers de contribuer à la création d'espaces qui transcendent l'ordinaire et qui, en plus de répondre à des normes élevées, racontent une histoire unique. Faites confiance à BKH DEVELOPMENT pour donner vie à vos rêves immobiliers et pour être votre partenaire privilégié dans l'édification et la transformation.

Quality & Hard Work

Our services include:

 Commercial Building Control – supporting inspection and compliance for complex developments in healthcare, education, industry and hospitality

 Residential Building Control – from individual homes to larger housing schemes, we help to ensure compliance

Why clients choose us:

 Experienced Registered Building Inspectors (RBIs) qualified across Classes 2 and 3

Name: Modular Brands
Description:
Modular Brands designs and delivers panelized composite structural insulated panel (CSIP) systems that help construction teams build faster, reduce labor dependency, and gain predictability in cost and timelines.

Our systems are engineered for projects where speed, performance, and reliability matter—without the inefficiencies of traditional stick-built construction.

Modular Brands’ composite panel solutions are used across:
• Residential and multi-family housing
• ADUs and workforce housing
• Commercial and light industrial buildings
• Specialty structures requiring rapid deployment

By shifting critical construction work off-site and into engineered, panelized systems, our approach helps teams:
• Reduce on-site labor requirements
• Shorten construction schedules
• Improve energy efficiency and building performance
• Increase consistency and quality across builds
• Better manage risk, cost, and timelines

Our flagship panel systems are designed to integrate seamlessly into modern construction workflows, supporting both traditional and modular delivery models.

Modular Brands works with builders, developers, architects, and municipalities seeking practical solutions to today’s labor shortages, cost volatility, and schedule pressures—without sacrificing structural integrity or code compliance.

We believe smarter construction starts with better systems.

Name: Cloverleaf Plumbing, Heating & Renewables
Description:
Cloverleaf Plumbing heating and renewables was established in 1995 with the sole purpose of combining high quality customer service alongside a one stop shop for all things plumbing and heating around the home or at work, which in those days was actually quite rare.
This core value has not changed. We still have a fantastic office team to process and manage incoming enquiries and progress jobs to a very high standard.
In the last five years Cloverleaf has evolved with the times into a business with energy saving and environmental principles at its core.
Although we still offer customers a variety of plumbing and heating services, becoming MCS accredited has helped us move the business towards renewables technology and with 14 % of all green house gases in this country coming from domestic boilers we felt this was the natural step forward.
Everyday whist on the road visiting customers properties and business owners premises we are looking for opportunities to help reduce their carbon emissions and lower their fuel bills.
This can be achieved in many ways, depending on the client’s environmental perspective and budget. From a simple smart thermostat upgrade to a fully blown conversion away from fossil fuels to an air source heat pump and everything in between.
We pride ourselves on providing the correct energy saving solution tailored to the individual customers requirements.

Name: CRJ Esquadrias

Projetos exigentes não aceitam soluções comuns.

Fundada em 28 de julho de 2010 por José Henrique Alves - engenheiro por formação e empreendedor nato por escolha - a CRJ Esquadrias nasceu com um propósito claro: elevar o padrão do mercado de esquadrias e transformá-lo em sinônimo de excelência.

Name: DECOTECH aluminium
Description:
Créer en 1970 par Albert Caillot, l'entreprise, initialement dédiée à la vente de bois, a évolué vers la menuiserie aluminium en 1982, s'orientant vers des projets de neuf et de rénovation pour les particuliers. En intégrant le Réseau des Aluminiers agréés Technal en 1985, DECOTECH a rapidement pris de l'ampleur, passant de 5 à 10 employés d'ici 1989.

En 1992, sous la direction de pierre comble l’entreprise réalise des chantiers emblématiques sur lyon et s’installe dans des locaux modernes à Rillieux la Pape. 

En 2009, un nouveau bâtiment de 2550 m² est construit pour regrouper les activités et optimiser l’organisation. 
En janvier 2015, la société est rachetée par TBD Services, dirigée par Erik Peretti, et compte alors 44 salariés.

L'année 2024 marque un tournant majeur avec le rachat par le groupe KALIA, dirigé par Karim Allali et Ivan Arsovski. 

Ce partenariat stratégique, pesant 20 millions d'euros de chiffre d'affaires, renforce la dynamique de croissance de DECOTECH et ouvre de nouvelles perspectives dans le secteur des menuiseries aluminium. 

Grâce à cette synergie, DECOTECH est désormais bien positionnée pour réaliser des chantiers allant de 50 à 3 500 K€, alliant créativité, innovation et qualité.

We partner closely with architects to:
- Maintain design authorship and involvement throughout construction
- Execute complex details with care, dialogue, and rigor
- Avoid contractor-driven redesign or substitutions
- Deliver open-book, cost-plus projects with real transparency

Our work is typically high-end residential construction in the $1M–$3M range (selectively higher), primarily in Marin, Sonoma, Napa, and Tahoe.

For select clients and projects, SpireBuilt also offers architect-led design-build services.

If you’re an architect or homeowner looking for a builder who thinks in drawings, details, and intent — we should talk.

Name: L&D Construções
Description:
A L&D Construções atua em duas vertentes de negócio. A primeira são as obras a preço de custo. Neste sistema a obra é custeada pelos próprios adquirentes, através de um fluxo de desembolso, fixado pela construtora/administradora e compatível ao desenvolvimento das diversas etapas da obra. Essa modalidade se distingue da construção a preço fechado, que é aquela em que o adquirente compra o imóvel por um preço certo, fixado previamente com a construtora.
O segundo modelo é a construção a preço fechado, onde construímos com recursos próprios, fazendo a venda das unidades com preço de tabela previamente estabelecido.
Em ambos os modelos, a segurança oferecida ao adquirente e os cuidados com os detalhes são sempre premissas para o nosso dia a dia.

Name: Hertfordshire Building Futures
Description:
Building Futures is a partnership of nine Hertfordshire local authorities, led by Hertfordshire County Council, with stakeholder input and engagement.

It provides the following resources to help promote, facilitate and recognise high quality sustainable development across the County:

Promote - A Sustainable Design Toolkit
Facilitate - The Hertfordshire Design Review Panel
Recognise - The Building Futures Awards

A Sustainable Design Toolkit has been developed to help those who prepare and assess development proposals in Hertfordshire. It helps to better understand the principles of sustainable design and construction and to consider how best these principles can be applied to specific schemes and sites. Interactive PDF versions of the Toolkit are available and can be used to create a Sustainable Design Statement to submit alongside a planning application or pre-application submission. Technical PDF modules are also available alongside the Toolkit.

The Hertfordshire Design Review Panel provides expert, independent and impartial design advice on the quality and sustainability of development proposals coming forward within Hertfordshire. For more information on the Panel, please email hertsdesignreview@hertfordshire.gov.uk.

The Building Futures Awards are an opportunity for the best of Hertfordshire’s recent development schemes to get the recognition they deserve.

Name: Exploit4InnoMat
Description:
Exploit4InnoMat is an ambitious 4-year project, launched on January 1st, 2023,
and funded by the European Commission under the Horizon Europe Program.
This project seeks to drive sustainable innovation across Europe in the design,
upscaling, and validation of innovative material concepts, focusing on the
creation of an open innovation test bed (OITB) network for building envelopes.
The primary goal is to support the European Commission's target for nearly Zero Energy Buildings (nZEB), offering scalable and practical solutions for the future of sustainable construction.
With a consortium of 27 partners from 11 European countries, Turkey,
Switzerland, and the United Kingdom, Exploit4InnoMat is developing state-ofthe-art sustainable materials and products. These include nano-enabled
cement, non-cement premixes, ceramics, advanced coatings, and glazing
solutions enhanced with aerogels, fibers, phase change materials (PCMs), and
other advanced nanomaterials. 
These materials are engineered to deliver multifunctional properties, such as:
• Enhanced insulation performance
• Reduction of thermal bridges
• Energy harvesting and storage
• Lower embodied energy
• Creation of healthier, more comfortable indoor environments
Through this collaborative effort, Exploit4InnoMat aims to provide sustainable,
high-performance materials that will contribute to the construction of energyefficient, eco-friendly buildings across Europe, helping to shape the future of the built environment.

Name: abaiq al yamamah
Description:
Title: Comprehensive Description of Waterproofing, Spray PU, Polyurea, and Civil Construction Activities
Introduction: Waterproofing is a crucial aspect of any construction project, ensuring the longevity and durability of structures. In addition to waterproofing, spray polyurethane (PU) and polyurea coatings have gained significant popularity due to their exceptional protective properties. This comprehensive description aims to provide a detailed overview of building waterproofing, spray PU, polyurea work, and other civil construction activities.
Section 1: Building Waterproofing Building waterproofing involves the application of various materials and techniques to prevent water infiltration into structures. The primary purpose of waterproofing is to protect buildings from moisture damage, such as leaks, dampness, mold growth, and structural deterioration. Waterproofing solutions are typically applied to basements, roofs, terraces, balconies, bathrooms, and other vulnerable areas.
1.1 Types of Waterproofing Systems:

Bituminous Membrane Waterproofing: This traditional method involves the application of bitumen-based membranes that provide excellent resistance to water penetration.

Liquid Waterproofing: This system employs liquid coatings or membranes that form a seamless barrier when applied on surfaces.

Cementitious Waterproofing: It involves the application of cement-based coatings or additives to enhance the waterproofing properties of concrete.

Polyurethane (PU) Waterproofing: PU-based waterproofing systems are flexible, durable, and resistant to water, chemicals, and UV radiation.

1.2 Application Techniques:

Brush or Roller Application: Suitable for liquid coatings or cementitious waterproofing systems.

Spraying: Ideal for large surface areas and can be used for both liquid and PU waterproofing.

Injection: Used for repairing cracks and voids in concrete structures, injecting specialized waterproofing resins.

Description:
História
	A Carmeliana Ferro e Aço é uma empresa familiar, fundada em 1993 para atender as demandas locais de ferragens, iniciando suas primeiras e pequenas vendas que foram fortalecidas nos anos seguintes.

	Seu fundador participava de todas as funções da empresa realizava desde a compra, o descarregamento, a venda, as entregas e até as cobranças. E foi dessa maneira que se embasou para gerir a equipe nos anos seguintes, ele alega: “... que para cobrar deve-se saber fazer.” 

	A empresa conquistou seu espaço no mercado de Monte Carmelo, foi aí que se mudou para sede própria, onde expandiu para o mercado de Corte e Dobra de chapas. Outro marco na trajetória da empresa foi quando a jovialidade e renovação do novo gestor assumiu a empresa trazendo mudanças e adequações antenadas com o mercado atual.

	A Ferragista Carmelitana ao longo da sua história conquistou sólida reputação, inspirando confiança e tornando-se referência em produção e gestão. Hoje atuamos em três estados diferentes com uma logística baseada nos mesmos princípios repassados por seu fundador: agilidade, pontualidade e honestidade.

Os valores familiares são sólidos dentro da empresa. Aqui temos como parte da equipe pessoas que fizeram sua história dentro da trajetória da Ferragista Carmelitana e trabalham na empresa há mais de 15 anos.	

O respeito pelas pessoas é a grande marca da empresa. Pensando nisso, a Carmelitana busca tratar a diversidade cultural e étnica de maneira igualitária, colaborando assim para a construção de uma sociedade mais justa e responsável.

Minssieux maîtrise notamment les renforcements par matériaux composites (carbone, PBO), la reprise en sous-œuvre, le vérinage de structures, le traitement des fissures structurelles et la réparation des bétons dégradés.

Nous intervenons en coordination avec les bureaux d’études, maîtres d’œuvre, bureaux de contrôle et collectivités, ou en appui technique ciblé, sur l’ensemble du territoire.

Notre objectif, depuis 1805 : sécuriser, adapter et pérenniser les structures existantes, avec méthode, rigueur et sens des responsabilités.

Name: SC Barker Construction Company
Description:
After his graduation from Valdosta High School, Sirois Barker studied Business Administration at the University of Tampa on a football scholarship, later transferring to Valdosta State University. Sirois left Valdosta to serve in Vietnam in the Navy Sea Bees as a member of the Construction Battalion. Following his father and grandfather’s footsteps, Sirois returned to Valdosta in 1965 to start his own construction business, S.C. Barker Construction Company, Inc. In 1996, the legacy continued when Sirois’ son, Kevin, joined the company after studying Building Science at Southern Polytechnic University in Marietta, Georgia. In order to further grow the business, S.C. Barker Construction brought on Nayan Patel in 2004. Nayan brought a wealth of knowledge and expertise in architectural design to the business and galvanized the company as a leader in the design‐build delivery method in South Georgia. S.C. Barker Construction Company sells holds fast to traditional values; honesty, hard work and quality construction built at a competitive price. Our focus has always been on quality and special attention to detail while ensuring our clients’ vision for the project is met.

Name: FAUBOURG70
Description:
Maitre œuvre implanté à Chambray-lès-Tours et rayonnant sur le département de l’Indre-et-Loire, FAUBOURG 70 vous propose des constructions sur mesure. 

Rénover sa maison est un projet qui demande beaucoup de temps, de préparation et d’argent. Il est important de planifier les travaux, savoir par où commencer ou encore quel artisan faire intervenir en premier, par exemple. Si vous habitez le logement que vous souhaitez rénover, il faut dans un premier temps vous organiser car, selon l’ampleur de la rénovation, il faut prévoir d’éventuelles coupures d’eau ou d’électricité.
La planification de votre rénovation vous permet de gérer la durée de chaque étape. 

Rénovation Énergétique avec Faubour70 : Un Pas vers un Avenir Durable ! 
Saviez-vous que la rénovation énergétique de votre maison peut non seulement réduire votre empreinte carbone, mais aussi vous faire économiser de l'argent ? 
En collaboration avec Faubour70, votre interlocuteur unique en matière de rénovation énergétique, nous vous aidons à accéder à de nombreuses aides et subventions en France pour rendre votre maison plus écoénergétique, confortable et respectueuse de l'environnement. 
De MaPrimeRénov' à l'éco-prêt à taux zéro, Faubour70 vous guide à chaque étape de votre projet, de la planification à la réalisation, pour créer un environnement intérieur plus sain.

FAUBOURG 70 se définit comme une « Maison de création ». Ses fondements remontent pourtant à 1989 avec la marque Demeures de Loire". Elle bénéficie des 25 années de savoir-faire de ses fondateurs : à leur actif, la réalisation de nombreuses maisons individuelles personnalisées de grande qualité.

Cette « Maison de création » est avant tout une entreprise à taille humaine, qui met au service de ses clients son réseau éprouvé des meilleurs artisans locaux RGE pour ses réalisations.

FAUBOURG 70 vous accompagne dans votre projet de vie, un projet ajusté « à votre taille » pour construire votre projet idéale, qui vous correspond en tout point.

Name: Bricklayers and Allied Craftworkers Local 1 New York
Description:
A city is defined to a large degree by the character and quality of its people and its built environment. Union masonry in New York City provides a perfect convergence of these two elements, shaping the cityscape and providing manpower and resources of the highest caliber to get the job done, and get it done right – on time and within budget.

With unparalleled training, skill and pride in their work, members of the BAC Local 1 NY have built and restored some of the most iconic buildings in New York City and Long Island including the Empire State Building, the Cathedral of St. John the Divine, the Chrysler Building, the Metropolitan Museum of Art, Grand Central Terminal, Yankee Stadium, Citi Field and the World Trade Center Memorial. We continue to build as our predecessors did – laying block and brick, setting stone, plastering, pointing, caulking and cleaning – with individual units of material, piece by piece to created a tight, masterful and lasting structure.

BAC Local 1 NY has a comprehensive apprenticeship training program and a pool of highly motivated, skilled craftworkers to keep any project – no matter how complex – on track. Contractors know that with union workers, safety always comes first and all BAC workers have met extensive background checks.

Name: Stitching Bridges
Description:
Stitching Bridges (Private) Limited was founded to address the widespread issues of transparency and accountability in construction project management. Many clients, especially those in the diaspora, face the challenge of funds being mismanaged or not properly accounted for when sent for construction projects back home. Locally, clients also struggle with delayed projects, budget overruns, and compromised quality due to poor oversight.
Our company provides a solution that guarantees every aspect of the construction process is managed with integrity, from financial accountability to rigorous quality control, ensuring projects are completed on time, within budget, and to the highest standards.

The Problem
Clients often experience:
•	Financial Mismanagement: Funds sent for construction are often misused or unaccounted for.
•	Lack of Transparency: Difficulty in tracking project progress and costs.
•	Accountability Issues: Challenges in holding contractors responsible for delays or substandard work.
•	Project Delays: Inefficiencies that lead to costly delays and frustrations.

The Solution
Stitching Bridges provides:
•	Comprehensive Project Management: Overseeing every phase from planning to completion, ensuring timely delivery and quality.
•	Financial Accountability: Funds are held in trust by a reputable accounting firm and released only upon verified completion of each project stage.
•	Advanced Tracking Systems: Real-time tracking of materials, costs, and progress, ensuring full transparency.
•	Quality Assurance: Strict quality control measures to meet industry standards.

Notre société bénéficie de plus de 30 ans d'expérience dans la construction d’ouvrages de travaux publics et de bâtiments ainsi que d'une expertise dans les études architecturales et techniques à travers notre filiale CINEXCO... 

À propos du fondateur



Diplômé de l'École Polytechnique de Yaoundé (Cameroun), Georges Yamdjeu Tiabo débute sa carrière en 1988 en tant que Chef de Projet dans le secteur privé. Il rejoint ensuite la Communauté Urbaine de Douala (CUD) en 1990 et est en charge de plusieurs projets d'aménagement urbain. Durant cette période, il occupe divers fonctions dont Chef de Bureau, Chef de Service Voirie-Assainissement, Chef de Département Génie Urbain puis Chef de la Cellule de Veille technique auprès du cabinet du Délégué du Gouvernement. 

 

En 2007, il quitte la CUD pour se consacrer entièrement au groupe CREBAT. Son experience s’étend au-delà du Cameroun à travers la gestion de projets d'entretien urbain et d'exploitation à l'international y compris en Côte d'Ivoire, Kenya, France, Etats-Unis et Espagne.

 

Georges reçoit en 2006 la médaille du Chevalier de l'Ordre de la Valeur.

Name: Strata International Group Inc
Description:
The SABS BUILDING SYSTEM
The SABS Building  System cuts construction cost and timelines by reducing the components needed to build. At the core of the system is a EPS foam which acts as the skeleton and frame of the structure which includes all exterior walls, all interior walls, mid floors, and roof. The EPS foam is than created in a 8' x 4' grid panels which is used to create the form for the structure. The EPS foam also provides the insulation and all utilities are then channeled in directly into the EPS foam walls. Once the EPS foam skeleton completed then it is fully coated with Strata's proprietary patented mix called Sabscete. Strata's patented cementitious coating Sabscrete is mixed and applied using conventional methods. The SABS coating thickness is determined by the FEA engineering report. then the finished SABS structure can have conventional interior and exterior finishes such as stucco, drywall mud, sheet rock, facia, etc.

Le Grand Cube est une entreprise innovante spécialisée dans l'aménagement sur mesure de conteneurs maritimes. Basée à Plouédern, en Bretagne, notre équipe passionnée et créative transforme des conteneurs en espaces de vie et de travail uniques, alliant fonctionnalité, esthétique et durabilité.

→ Aménagement sur mesure : Nous créons des solutions personnalisées adaptées aux besoins de chaque client, qu'il s'agisse de particuliers, de professionnels ou d'institutions publiques.

→ Écoresponsabilité : Engagés dans une démarche durable, nous utilisons des matériaux recyclés et mettons en œuvre des pratiques respectueuses de l'environnement.

→  Polyvalence : De la création de studios de jardin, bureaux, salles de fitness aux espaces événementiels, nos conteneurs offrent une multitude de possibilités d'aménagement.

→ Qualité de vie au travail : Nous valorisons le bien-être de notre équipe et veillons à créer un environnement de travail stimulant et positif.

Envie d'en savoir plus ? N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour discuter de votre projet et découvrir comment nous pouvons transformer vos idées en réalité. Bénéficiez de notre expertise pour créer des espaces qui vous ressemblent.

Name: SIMEC ingénierie
Description:
SIMEC ingénierie vous accompagne lors de la construction de vos bâtiments et aménagements.

Ingénierie générale du bâtiment et études techniques spécialisées
Maîtrise d'œuvre tous corps d'état (MOE TCE)
Conception et suivi de la réalisation

SIMEC ingénierie assure le pilotage et le management de vos projets de construction de bâtiments tertiaires ou industriels, neufs, en extension ou en réaménagement, depuis les études de faisabilité jusqu'à la réception des travaux, en respectant vos objectifs financiers à la livraison et en limitant vos coûts d'exploitation. Du fait de notre structure, nous intégrons la technique au cœur du projet dès la conception.
Nous maîtrisons toutes les phases de la conception : Avant-projet, estimation des coûts, Projet et DCE, consultation et choix concerté des entreprises, suivi de la réalisation, réception des ouvrages, suivi de la garantie de parfait achèvement.
Nous sommes aussi spécialistes des ERP et de la conduite de chantier en sites occupés.

SIMEC ingénierie vous guide dans vos projets.

Audits et diagnostics

Name: Cadimarte S.A.
Description:
A CADIMARTE S.A., com sua sede em Cadima, concelho de Cantanhede, presente no panorama empresarial há já mais de três décadas, está direcionada para a construção civil, quer no âmbito das empreitadas para o sector público e privado, quer no do imobiliário. 
A sua visão, assente numa estratégia de ligação às origens e de crescimento sustentado, objetiva uma adaptação atenta e dinâmica à inovação e às mudanças que a evolução do meio onde desenvolve a sua atividade aconselham e ou impõem.
A CADIMARTE, S.A. norteia-se pela estrita observância da Ética Empresarial e sob o primado dos Clientes, Parceiros e Colaboradores, sendo para tal determinante a construção de uma Identidade e Cultura fortes orientadas para os seguintes Valores e Princípios: 
- Integridade
- Criação de mais-valia
- Proteção do meio ambiente
- Diálogo com as partes interessadas
- Gestão do capital humano
- Espírito de Grupo
Fiel a estas orientações a CADIMARTE tem vivido um constante e sólido desenvolvimento, assinalável na última década, que a habilitam com uma capacidade empresarial reconhecida e certificadamente forte e um retorno muito gratificante enquanto pólo de formação e de realização, pessoal e coletiva.  
Continuaremos a consolidar as raízes do futuro reforçando a postura de modernidade e de ambição responsável, orgulhosos de um passado que nos fortalece a determinação e confiança/certeza na superação das exigências e desafios que nos esperam.

Para mais informações, visite o nosso site: https://www.cadimarte.pt/

Name: The Surface Stones
Description:
The Surface Stones brings you the finest Marble, Granite, Quartz and Handicrafts from around the world.

For over a decade, we have been the go-to source for architects, designers and builders in need of only the highest quality natural stone. Our network of trusted suppliers provides access to the newest additions and exclusive varieties— all personally inspected by our stone experts to ensure perfection.

Beyond simply procuring and distributing beautiful stone, we offer full pre-fabrication services tailored to your project needs. Simply tell us the size, quality, and design details you require, and we will create the finished product—perfectly sliced, polished, and eased—ready to install on arrival.

Whether your project calls for luxurious marble countertops, elegant tile flooring, opulent exterior cladding, or intricate stone sculptures, we have the expertise to deliver a result that enhances and elevates.

Operating from a modern facility in India, we offer rapid turnaround, competitive pricing and unparalleled customer service. Our procurement, fabrication and installation teams work together seamlessly to ensure every project is completed to the highest standards—on time and on budget.

At The Surface Stones, we believe natural stone should not only look beautiful, but also feel beautiful to the touch. It is our passion and privilege to craft these timeless materials into forms that will stand the test of time and bring joy for generations to come.

Name: MIRANTE INCORPORAÇÕES
Description:
Construindo mais que empreendimentos

A Mirante nasceu do desejo de transformar espaços urbanos em histórias de vida. 

Desde 2003, quando lançou o Mirante das Águas em Águas Claras, estabeleceu um novo padrão de qualidade, inovação e compromisso. 

Vieram os condomínios-clube, os empreendimentos de alto luxo,os mixed-use e cada projeto reafirmou a busca por entregar mais do que o esperado.

Nossa trajetória é alicerçada em credibilidade, ética e respeito às pessoas. Valorizamos parcerias duradouras, a palavra empenhada e a excelência em cada detalhe. 

Com  urbanismo integradoengenharia criteriosa, arquitetura autoral e engenharia criteriosae urbanismo integrado, criamos empreendimentos que unem beleza, funcionalidade e durabilidade.

Mais que construir, buscamos dialogar com a cidade e gerar pertencimento. 

Por isso, a gentileza urbana está no nosso DNA: praças revitalizadas, ruas mais humanas, paisagismo que valoriza a natureza e promove convivência.

É assim que seguimos transformando espaços em oportunidades, encontros e significado.

30+ patents driving cutting-edge modular technology

Gros-oeuvre : L’ossature d’un ouvrage. Structure porteuse, murs, planchers, du clos et du couvert d’un bâtiment.

Rénovation : Nous redonnons vie à vos bâtiments tout en préservant leur charme d’origine.

Travail de la pierre : Un savoir-faire traditionnel qui sublime les projets de construction et de rénovation.
 
Maisons individuelles : Des habitations sur-mesure qui allient esthétique, confort, respect des normes en vigueur et des règles de l’art.
 
Construction de piscines : Des réalisations personnalisées, alliant design et technologies modernes.

Notre entreprise s'engage à offrir des solutions personnalisées, durables et de qualité, tout en restant à l’écoute de ses clients pour les accompagner tout au long de leurs projets. Name: BW PLANT HIRE SERVICES
Description:
Welcome to BW PLANT HIRE, where we bring innovation and reliability to the world of heavy machinery services. I am Ponatshego Dziro, the founder of this venture, and I am excited to introduce our specialized offerings to companies embarking on new projects in the industry.

About Us:

At BW PLANT HIRE, we understand that the success of any project hinges on the efficiency and reliability of the machinery used. With a commitment to excellence, we have entered the industry to provide cutting-edge heavy machinery solutions tailored for your unique project requirements.

Our Expertise:

While we may be new to the industry, our team boasts a wealth of experience and expertise in the field of heavy machinery. We specialize in offering a diverse fleet of state-of-the-art equipment designed to meet the demands of modern construction and industrial projects.

What Sets Us Apart:

Innovation: We stay ahead of the curve by incorporating the latest technological advancements in our machinery, ensuring that your projects benefit from efficiency and precision.

Customer-Centric Approach: Our dedication to customer satisfaction is unparalleled. We work closely with each client to understand their specific needs and provide tailored solutions that guarantee success.

Reliability: We recognize the critical role machinery plays in the success of any project. Therefore, we provide well-maintained, top-quality equipment to enhance reliability and minimize downtime.

Our Vision:

At BW PLANT HIRE, our vision is to become the go-to partner for companies venturing into new projects. We aspire to redefine industry standards by offering not just machinery but comprehensive solutions that contribute to the success of every endeavor.

Connect with Us:

Whether you are planning a groundbreaking project or looking to upgrade your machinery fleet, we are here to support you. Reach out to us via email bwplanthireservices@gmail.com , and let's discuss how BW PLANT HIRE can be a valuable asset.

Ponctualité :

Réactivité et Diligence :

Chez Modul-K, nous sommes spécialisés dans la conception, la fabrication et la pose de menuiseries PVC et de volets roulants sur mesure, avec un engagement total envers la qualité et l’innovation.

 Nos atouts :

•	Une expertise reconnue dans les menuiseries PVC et les systèmes de fermtures.

Name: PCH CONSTRUTORA - RIO DE JANEIRO RJ
Description:
Nossa razão de existir é o que nos move.  A engenharia do futuro com pilares fortes do passado.  Estamos em obras e sempre estaremos. 

Na coragem para mudar o jogo, é necessário mudar o ângulo.   

Nosso conceito e obrigação é realizar obras bem feitas, independente do tamanho. Começamos como uma pequena empreiteira familiar.  Sabemos que o início é na terra, na fundação. 

Quem não valoriza seu passado não chega bem no futuro.  Quem mantém suas raízes, prospera.  Mas a ousadia se faz necessária em momentos de mudança.

Somos uma  ferramenta de execução de projetos, ideias e sonhos. Somos movidos por isso.

Gostamos da co-criação e nosso alicerce é a confiança.  Nossa empresa é de quem faz ela conosco: parceiros, equipes e clientes.  Através de nossa experiência conseguimos chegar até aqui.  São quarenta anos e queremos mais, sempre com os pés no chão. 

Nosso acervo técnico nos dá a certeza de que estamos prontos para encarar novos desafios. Pés no chão mirando o céu.

Name: معماريو الشرق للمقاولات العامة
Description:
من نحن
تأسست شركة معماريو الشرق للمقاولات العامة والبناء والتطوير العمراني برؤية واضحة تتمثل في المساهمة الفاعلة في تطوير البنية التحتية وتحقيق طموحات العملاء في مجالات التشييد والعمران. نحن شركة عراقية الهوية والجذور، نعمل على تنفيذ مشاريع سكنية وتجارية وخدمية بأعلى معايير الجودة، ونلتزم بأحدث الأساليب الفنية والتقنيات الحديثة في البناء.

نقدم حلولاً متكاملة تشمل التصميم، والإشراف، والتنفيذ، وذلك ضمن منظومة احترافية تسعى للتميز والابتكار في كل مشروع نقوم به.

رؤيتنا
أن نكون من بين الشركات الرائدة في قطاع المقاولات في العراق والمنطقة، من خلال تقديم مشاريع هندسية ذات جودة عالية، وبنهج يعتمد على الابتكار والاستدامة، والالتزام المطلق بثقة عملائنا.

رسالتنا
نطمح لتقديم خدمات بناء وتشييد تفوق توقعات عملائنا، بالاعتماد على كادر هندسي متخصص، ومهندسين وفنيين ذوي خبرة عالية، نحرص من خلالهم على تنفيذ المشاريع في الوقت المحدد، ووفق أعلى معايير الأمان والدقة والجودة.

مجالات العمل
المقاولات العامة: تنفيذ مشاريع سكنية وتجارية متنوعة الأحجام والوظائف.

الإنشاءات السكنية: بناء الفلل والمنازل والمجمعات السكنية.

البناء التجاري: تنفيذ المراكز التجارية والمكاتب والمرافق الخدمية.

التصاميم المعمارية: تصميم مشاريع مبتكرة وفق الطراز العصري أو التراثي.

الاستشارات الهندسية: تقديم حلول ودراسات فنية وهندسية متكاملة.

ما الذي يميزنا؟
نُسلّم كل مشروع بملف تفصيلي (كتالوج) يحتوي على كافة تفاصيل المواد المستخدمة في البناء، مع توثيق بالصور، حفاظاً على الشفافية وتعزيزاً لثقة العميل.

نهتم بجودة التنفيذ مثلما نهتم بجمال التصميم.

نواكب أحدث تقنيات البناء الذكي والمستدام.

لدينا القدرة على التعامل مع مشاريع كبيرة وصغيرة بنفس المستوى من الاحترافية والاهتمام.

Name: SubTerra Group Ltd
Description:
At Subterra, we embarked on a mission eight years ago to revolutionize foundation design. It all began in Dubai, during the One Zaabeel Project, where our founders saw the potential to reshape construction by aligning it with the global shift toward carbon-neutral, sustainable practices. Our challenge? To make construction faster, more efficient, and cost-effective, while reducing environmental impact.

Name: Leadax Americas - Sustainable | Circular Waterproofing
Description:
Leadax, a product-focused company at the forefront of sustainability and innovation in the roofing and waste management industries. Our team of industry experts has a deep understanding of these fields, as well as a proven track record of success.

At Leadax, we are dedicated to transforming discarded plastic material into valuable, engineered building products through our waste-to-product business model. Among our offerings is Leadax Roov, a commercial roofing membrane made from plastic diverted from disposal. This solution represents a major breakthrough in the circular economy, as it has the potential to significantly reduce global waste and greenhouse gas emissions on a scalable level, all without relying on government incentives or market subsidies.

We are proud to offer a product that not only performs at the highest level, but also has a positive impact on the environment. Leadax Roov brand roofing membranes are a leader in waste diversion and circular economy solutions, transforming discarded plastic streams into valuable engineered roofing products that outperform the competition.

Since 1979, our holding company Bitufa's Flexobit membranes have established itself as a worldwide leader in roofing and waterproofing, known for its performance, innovation, and resiliency. With Leadax Roov, we are building on this legacy to create high-performance membranes that are also among the greenest in the world.

At Leadax, our mission is to make the Leadax Roov brand synonymous with performance in the commercial roofing industry. We have customers who, after 40 years of installing Flexobit, still won't install anything else. With Leadax Roov, we hope to surpass even this level of excellence and become the longest-lasting, most resilient roofing and waterproofing membrane on the market.

Established in 1992 as an independent, non profit association, WFAANZ sets the performance guidelines for its members, which includes a strict code of conduct and compliance with all relevant Australian and New Zealand regulations and standards. Through a series of communication channels, training programs and industry engagement activity, WFAANZ seeks to educate property owners, facility managers, energy assessors, architects and engineers on the many benefits and applications of window film and how it can enhance the energy efficiency and reduce the carbon emissions of the built environment.

Name: Public Sector Infrastructure Delivery Management Programme
Description:
The Public Sector Infrastructure Delivery Management Programme (PIDM) focuses on the training of public sector construction, facilities & infrastructure managers to provide insight into and enhance the effective use of the Infrastructure Delivery Management System (IDMS) towards standardized work methods and improved workflow. The programme specifically aims to provide you with a comprehensive introduction and overview to infrastructure planning and budget alignment with infrastructure delivery, covering the IDMS, best-practice methodologies, processes, procedures, and guidelines available. In addition, the training is designed to assist officials to understand and comply with the legislation governing management of infrastructure assets.

This programme has been approved as a University of Cape Town short course 2023, according to University policy. The participants who attend the course will receive a University of Cape Town attendance certificate. 

The programme is also accredited with ECSA, SACPCMP and  ASSOCIATION OF SOUTH AFRICAN QUANTITY SURVEYORS.

Name: TerraFix Adaptors Inc.
Description:
The TERRADAPTOR is a patented ground anchoring solution, optimized
for SOLAR and BESS ground mount installation and the adaptation of pipe and H-beam. 
Engineered for speed, strength, and reuse, it is the only technology of its kind on the market. 
Our bolt-on adaptors deliver sustainable and cost effective solutions when faced with load bearing capacity issues on time and cost critical projects.
By efficiently transferring loads to deeper soil layers, the TERRADAPTOR eliminates the need for deep driving, reduces labor and equipment costs, and significantly streamlines the ground anchoring installation process.
With adaptable design for driven H-beams and Push-Piers, installers and developers can ensure faster project completion, minimize environmental impact, and achieve a durable, reusable ground mount layout
... without the need for a deep drive.

Easily and quickly adapt pipe with our bolt or weld on adapters. 
We stock most common sizes with short lead times and full support.
We also offer engineered solutions for bigger projects with full design support.

Reach out to us or visit our website for more information.
Proudly American Made in Texas, we are at your service.

Name: TimberBLDR Romania
Description:
TimberBLDR este un integrator internațional de mass timber care oferă soluții complete de proiectare, furnizare și instalare pentru clădiri comerciale, industriale și mixte. Cu rădăcini în Statele Unite și proiecte de referință pentru branduri globale, TimberBLDR își stabilește acum centrul operațional european în România, construind un ecosistem de parteneriate care reflectă filozofia noastră: Înfrățire – Building Together.

Ne specializăm în sisteme avansate din lemn stratificat (CLT, glulam, MPP) și soluții hibride, oferind un proces integrat care acoperă ingineria, optimizarea structurală, value engineering, logistica, instalarea și controlul calității pe șantier. Pentru noi, proiectele nu sunt doar structuri — sunt colaborări, alianțe și investiții reciproce în viitorul construcțiilor durabile.

România este casa noastră europeană. Investim aici cu o abordare Romania First, lucrând în strânsă înfrățire cu producători, antreprenori generali, arhitecți, ingineri și comunități pentru a aduce construcțiile din lemn masiv la un nou standard în Europa de Est.

Ce facem:
	•	Integrare completă mass timber și soluții hibride
	•	Design-assist și consultanță tehnică
	•	Optimizare structurală și value engineering
	•	Supply chain internațional + parteneriate regionale
	•	Instalare specializată și management de proiect
	•	Suport pentru dezvoltarea proiectelor în România și Europa de Est

Misiune: accelerăm adoptarea construcțiilor sustenabile în România și în regiune prin colaborare autentică, excelență tehnică și o cultură a dezvoltării comune.

TimberBLDR – Înfrățire. Building Together. Creștem din România pentru toată Europa.

Name: MMF
Description: Nous réalisons des projets de construction neuve et de rénovation. Notre équipe offre son savoir-faire et son expertise à nos clients, notamment dans les projets de façade complexes et les procédés d'étanchéité très techniques. I. Les Façades architecturales : Jouent également un rôle important dans l'esthétique d'un bâtiment. Leurs formes et leurs matériaux sont très divers. C'est encore plus vrai pour les façades architecturales qui reflètent l'image de l'entreprise et véhiculent le message de l'architecte, la vision du projet, la liberté et l'adaptation à l'environnement. Les façades architecturales d'aujourd'hui sont de plus en plus innovantes, tant par les matériaux utilisés que par leurs formes. II. Etanchéité toiture terrasse : En effet, une mauvaise étanchéité du toit peut causer des dommages importants à l'intérieur et à l'extérieur du bâtiment (entrées d'eau, d'humidité, de moisissures, de fissures dans les murs, etc.). Quel que soit le type de bâtiment (commercial, tertiaire, logistique, résidentiel, etc.) ou le type de toiture (plate ou en pente), ces perturbations peuvent gravement endommager l'isolation et la structure, entraînant à terme l'effondrement de la toiture. Notre équipe peut vous aider à rendre votre toit plat complètement étanche. Parallèlement, nos experts proposent des solutions qui améliorent l'efficacité énergétique des bâtiments. Maîtrisant toutes les techniques d'étanchéité, notre équipe intervient sur tous types de bâtiments, quelle que soit la finition, pour vous apporter une solution d'étanchéité adaptée à vos besoins et à votre budget. III. Végétalisation de la terrasse : Un toit vert est un refuge pour la biodiversité et un habitat naturel pour les insectes et les oiseaux. Ces toitures permettent également de réduire le chauffage en milieu urbain tout en offrant un système efficace de rétention des eaux pluviales.

Description:
We collaborate with visionary companies in the building construction sector, focused on precision manufacturing, to establish a strategy where 90% of our mixed-use residential buildings are factory-produced. 
The innovative production leadership in the mass timber industry influenced the formation of our strategy - We are now working with a breadth of specialized manufacturers (structure, envelope, M&E, water, interiors, etc.) to separately manufacture and ship components of large mixed-use, multi-story buildings to our project sites for orchestrated assembly by our construction teams. This model is unique in the Canadian market, differing from traditional prefabricated or modular home designs you might be familiar with where complete single-family home packages are built in a centralized, large factory.
Thanks to the support and collaboration of the National Research Council of Canada, and the partnership interests of a number of property developers across Canada, we are now ready to launch a new strategy called the “Prefab Buildings Initiative” to apply our combined expertise for the rapid construction of multi-unit housing projects across Canada - and you are invited to participate!
Projects built through the Prefab Buildings Initiative will benefit from faster construction timelines, reduced costs, and enhanced quality control, resulting in quicker project delivery. We also have a newly-formed Real Estate Investment Trust so that investors and our developer partners can deploy funds to projects with a secure, transparent return on investment.

La qualité est un point essentiel chez TERESSI. SAVOIR, SAVOIR-FAIRE et SAVOIR-ETRE sont symboles de la qualité !

Name: Valleys Resin
Description:
Valleys Resin - Your Resin Bound Specialist

At Valleys Resin, we are dedicated to transforming both outdoor and indoor spaces with our high-quality resin bound solutions. Specializing in resin driveways and indoor resin epoxy flooring, we combine innovative techniques with superior materials to deliver stunning, durable, and low-maintenance surfaces that enhance the beauty and functionality of your property.

Why Choose Valleys Resin?

Expertise and Experience: Our team of skilled professionals brings years of experience in the resin bound and epoxy flooring industries, ensuring meticulous attention to detail and exceptional craftsmanship in every project.

Premium Quality: We use only the finest resin and aggregates for our driveways and the highest quality epoxy for our indoor flooring, providing you with long-lasting and resilient surfaces that can withstand various conditions and heavy usage.

Custom Solutions: We understand that every project is unique. That’s why we offer bespoke solutions tailored to your specific requirements and aesthetic preferences, ensuring a perfect fit for your space.

Customer Satisfaction: Your satisfaction is our top priority. From the initial consultation to project completion, we are committed to providing excellent customer service and support, making your experience with us seamless and enjoyable.
Eco-Friendly: Our resin bound and epoxy surfaces are environmentally friendly and sustainable, contributing to better drainage for outdoor applications and providing easy-to-clean, low-VOC solutions for indoor flooring.

Our Services:

Resin Driveways: Durable, attractive, and low-maintenance driveways that enhance your home's curb appeal.

Indoor Resin Epoxy Flooring: Sleek, seamless, and highly durable flooring solutions perfect for residential and commercial spaces.

Discover the Valleys Resin difference and let us help you create beautiful, durable, and functional spaces both inside and out.

Name: GIRIH X
Description:
Welcome to GIRIH X, where innovation meets excellence in the design, manufacturing, and construction industry. With over 30 years of collective experience, we specialize in providing cutting-edge digital engineering solutions tailored to the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) sectors. Our expertise spans Building Information Modelling & Management (BIM), Construction Coordination, Computational Design and Automation, Digital Transformation, and Bespoke Tools Development.

At GIRIH X, we are committed to revolutionizing the construction landscape through advanced technologies and innovative methodologies. Our services include:

Digital Engineering: We enhance project efficiency and collaboration with comprehensive BIM management, digital coordination, 3D modeling, and clash detection.

Computational Design: Our team leverages advanced digital fabrication, modeling, and scripting to create optimized design solutions, pushing the boundaries of creativity and precision.

BIM Content Generation: We specialise in high-end BIM-ready content modelling, including parametric families, product specifications, metadata, and accurate graphical representations, optimized for design integration, project coordination, collaboration, and visualisation.

Digital Transformation: We guide companies through their digital journeys, implementing strategies and systems to improve decision-making and operational efficiency.

Product Development: We develop bespoke software solutions, including desktop applications and cloud-based platforms, to streamline project workflows and enhance productivity.

Our mission is to empower AECO organisations by mitigating potential disruptions to project timelines, costs, quality, sustainability, and safety. We strive to deliver seamless and successful project outcomes through our innovative solutions and dedicated support.

Reach out to us to connect or discuss your project requirement: info@girihx.com

Name: STATIKON
Description:
STATIKON, stiftet i 2023, leverer skræddersyet ingeniørrådgivning med fokus på kvalitet, sikkerhed og solid praktisk erfaring. Vi udfører statiske beregninger, konsulentarbejde, bygherrerådgivning, tilsyn mm. – altid med åbenhed, direkte dialog og et tæt samarbejde som fundament. Vi dækker alle typiske materialer og konstruktionstyper, og bringer både rådgiver- og entreprenørbaggrund i spil for at sikre dit projekt succes – til tiden og med klare resultater.

Dit projekt bliver gennemført med grundig planlægning og udførelse med et godt overblik og sans for detaljen.

Om Mikael – ingeniøren bag STATIKON
STATIKON er stiftet af civilingeniør Mikael Mathiasen, som har mere end 14 års erfaring med bærende konstruktioner. Baggrunden spænder både over rådgivende ingeniørfirmaer og entreprenørbranchen, hvilket giver en unik kombination af teknisk indsigt og praktisk forståelse for byggeriets udførelse.

Mikael ved, at et succesfuldt projekt kræver både høj kvalitet og rettidig levering – og det er præcis det, STATIKON leverer.

Klar til at realisere dit projekt med en stærk samarbejdspartner? Kontakt STATIKON, og lad os skabe de gode løsninger sammen.

Name: Advanced Aquarium Technologies USA
Description:
Advanced Aquarium Technologies designs, builds, operates, and services iconic public aquariums all over the world.

Our international projects include the National Aquarium of Denmark, Den Blå Planet, the Aquarium of Oman, the Cube Oceanarium in China, the acrylic windows, tunnels and other transparent structures within the Sea Shell Aquarium, Vietnam, and many more.

We also manufacture ACRYLITE - an acrylic product characterized by its outstanding strength and optical quality - used in the construction of aquariums. ACRYLITE is produced by AAT under license from Röhm GmbH, a leading methacrylate specialist headquartered Darmstadt, Germany.

AAT’s headquarters is in Australia. 

Here in America, in our near 20,000 square feet building, we use advanced thermoforming and bonding techniques to fabricate customized, premium-grade, crystal clear acrylic windows used in the construction of iconic public aquariums.

Our US customer service and fabrication centre works hand in hand with our global resources to provide a wide range of services include new aquarium design; aquarium renovation design; Life Support System equipment; on-site construction; FRP tanks and platforms; water-proofing; exhibit lighting; animal sourcing and transportation services; commissioning, training and handover services; audit and inspection services and repair and maintenance services. 

We’re proud to be an Australian company with a major American presence. So, next time you’re in Houston, come and say g’day. Or if you can’t want, let’s catch up by video con.

Name: Cuore bv
Description:
Cuore was founded in 2021 from years of experience in installing cast floors, and from the conviction that there is room for improvement in the sustainability of cast floor products.
Primers, scratch coats, cast floor compounds and top coats were developed with the greatest precision with the aim of delivering a high-quality product.
Balanced and sustainable floor systems for various applications are now part of the Cuore range.

Because Cuore considers the environment and sustainability of paramount importance, renewable or recycled raw materials are used as much as possible in the production of the materials. The belief in the “cradle to cradle” principle is very strongly integrated in the corporate culture. After all, certain Cuore floors can be completely recycled after breaking out into new, unique cast floors.

Cuore not only wants to distinguish itself in terms of sustainability, but also in terms of technical and commercial support to customers. Due to years of practical experience in installing synthetic resin systems, Cuore is ideally placed to advise and assist customers and partners, also on the construction sites!
Sustainability is in our heart, quality materials and a thorough service are our core. This is Cure.

Name: BIM Monitoring and Evaluation Services
Description:
BIM Monitoring and Evaluation Services aims to deliver construction projects with BIM and also to support students and construction professionals in understanding BIM and implementing it in projects.

The construction industry's failures to deliver projects on time, on budget and to meet the demands of owners have led to the digital transformation of construction practices around the world through the adoption of digital building information modelling (BIM) technologies. In recent years, the emergence of Building Information Modelling (BIM) is playing a critical role in the success of construction projects. BIM facilitates collaboration and coordination between construction professionals. BIM also improves productivity, sharing, communication and management of project information among construction teams. Given the emerging nature of BIM, lack of understanding of its potential is a major barrier to its adoption by professionals.
