Name: Western Sydney Sustainable House Project
Description:
Sustainable House Project is a student-led multidisciplinary initiative at Western Sydney University. The project is dedicated to fostering a restorative and healthy coexistence with nature. The project emphasizes positive health, well-being, and sustainability through innovative design, renewable energy technologies, smart systems, and native landscaping. Currently, we are focusing on use of digital twin and IOT technology to build a digital replica of the house where various sustainability index could be measured.

We are a not-for-profit organization consisting of students across various disciplines collaborating to advance the project. After successful development of a physical model of the house at Kingswood Campus, our vision is to integrate digital twin and IOT technologies to foster innovative sustainable solutions. Each year, a new team is formed to achieve goals leading towards the defined long-term vision. The 2025 team spans across students from engineering and project management disciplines alongside academics from diverse fields, including Engineering, Industrial Design, IT, Built Environment, Architecture, and Media. This project offers a platform for innovation, hands-on experience, and real-world industry exposure with engagement in self-directed learning and real-life industry alike diverse team environment.

The project team is open to anyone who is passionate about sustainability, digital twins, construction. and is looking forward to connect or collaborate. We are open to external research groups and industry partners both in Australia and internationally.

Name: JRQS
Description:
Are you looking for quality BOQ with a fast turnaround? Look no further than JRQS. A quality team of Quantity Surveyors who pride themselves on delivering accurate and usable BOQs. We aim to provide the best BOQs to the best builders in Sydney, Newcastle, Brisbane, Gold Coast, Canberra and Melbourne. 
 
 
What We Do 
We deliver accurate and usable BOQs which allow builders and subcontractors to price both competitively and confidently. We measure most building types including, but not limited to: Highrise residential towers, commercial offices, refurbishments, health, education and sports precincts. 
 
Our Customers 
We have worked with and are trusted by some of Australia’s leading builders for a number of iconic Australian projects, with a varied portfolio up to $300M.  We have experience measuring across all states in Australia and are capable of measuring both metro and rural locations. 
 
Our Product 
We understand how critical time is in a BOQ turnaround, especially with tender timeframes tighter than ever. We've improved our workflow so estimators can spend more time chasing down competitive prices from subcontractors. 
 
Our People 
JRQS is an international practice with office locations in Australia and the Philippines. This allows for the best international talent with a passion for measuring to be attracted and retained.  
 
Our Director, Josh Ryan, works extensively with the team, with significant online and face to face time throughout each project. 
 
We also employ leading Senior Estimator (BOQ Manager) within our structure to ensure our clients get Builders BOQs that they know their estimators can rely on and communicate with like-minded professionals here in Australia. 
 
Contact Us 
For more information on partnering with JRQS, contact us on:  
Email: josh@joshryanqs.com 
Phone: +61 404 244 462 
Web: www.joshryanqs.com

In addition, ARTEKA TECHNIKI O.E. is a member of the Athens Chamber of Commerce and Industry (Ε.Β.Ε.Α., ID 251281) and the Association of Greek Contracting Companies (Σ.Α.Τ.Ε., ID 1654), as well as holding ISO certification for the construction, operation, and maintenance of private and public works (ΕΛΟΤ ISO 9001:2015, 14001:2015 and 45001:2018).

The company was founded in 2007 by civil engineer Antonis Roussos, who started his professional activity in the mid-1970s serving in his field of training at the Hellenic Air Force for about twenty years, then moving to work as a Senior Operations Manager at ΔΙΕΚΑΤ SA, a construction company with major scale activities in Greece and abroad.

Accompagnatrice de l’essor industriel textile de la région dans les années 1920, l’entreprise s’oriente vers le marché du bâtiment dans les années 1960. En 1980, Pierre PISTRE devient la S.A. PISTRE ET FILS, devenant experte en menuiseries bois intérieures & extérieures.  

La S.A.S. PISTRE ET FILS, dirigée aujourd’hui par Jean-Luc PISTRE, représente plus de 175 ans de savoir-faire (en lien avec les Compagnons du Devoir) et compte près de 20 collaborateurs engagés autour d’une même passion : le travail du bois, entre tradition et innovation. 

La Menuiserie PISTRE est un acteur majeur de la Menuiserie bois en Occitanie, réalisant des ouvrages sur mesure alliant tradition artisanale, outils numériques et savoir-faire durable pour des projets publics d’envergure (universités, lycées, musées, médiathèques…).

Name: FIRES, s.r.o.
Description:
We are Notified Body (NB 1396) and Authorised Body (SK01) to provide certification and testing services of building construction products, with an emphasis on fire safety. We are also Authorised Body (TP01) for technical assessment and Notified Technical Assessment Body (TAB), EOTA member, approved to issue national and European Technical Assessments (ETA) for particular building construction products (especially fire stopping, fire sealing, fire protective and fire retardant products).

We are and accredited Laboratory (to ISO/IEC 17025) for testing of fire resistance, reaction to fire, physical and mechanical characteristics of different construction products. As an accredited Product Certification Body (to ISO/IEC 17065) we carry out certifications of different construction products to Regulation (EU) No. 305/2011 (CPR) or Slovak Act No. 133/2013 Coll. We also provide inspections of factory production control (FPC) systems. As a testing and certification institute, we are authorized by UAE Civil Defense as well as by Qatar Civil Defense.

Voluntarily or legally we are a member of the following associations:
- EGOLF (European Group of Fire Testing Laboratories)
- FSG (also known as GNB SH02) Group of Notified Bodies – horizontal group for fire issues
- CEN/TC127 Technical Committee focused on preparing EN standards concerning fire safety of buildings (including a membership in its working groups such as WG1, WG2, WG3 etc.)
- ÚNMS SR TK17 Fire safety of buildings (Technical Committee for Slovak standards, founded by ÚNMS SR, i.e. Slovak Institute for Standardisation, Metrology and Testing)
- ÚNMS SR TK119 Testing of fire performance of construction products (Technical Committee for Slovak standards, founded by ÚNMS SR)
- ÚNMS TK 96 Doors, windows, shutters, building hardware and curtain walling (Technical Commitee for Slovak standards, founded by ÚNMS SR)

See also the page of our civic organization @Grow by FIRES

Name: DigiAEC for Engineering Consulting
Description:

Présent en Afrique du Nord, dans la région MENA, ainsi qu’en France et en Suisse, le groupe s’appuie sur une expertise pointue pour offrir des solutions numériques de nouvelle génération.
Notre ambition est claire : connecter les actifs physiques au monde digital afin d’améliorer leur conception, leur exploitation et leur performance. À travers une approche basée sur le BIM (Building Information Modeling), l’IoT (Internet des Objets), l’intelligence artificielle (IA) et la réalité étendue (XR), nous développons des outils interopérables, intelligents et évolutifs pour répondre aux enjeux techniques et environnementaux d’aujourd’hui et de demain.

Que vous soyez un particulier, un professionnel ou une entreprise, notre équipe dédiée est là pour concrétiser vos idées et répondre à vos besoins spécifiques. Chaque projet est une opportunité pour nous de démontrer notre savoir-faire, notre détermination et notre souci du détail.

This takes a keen eye, foresight and technical ability that is crucial to your project.
We can provide a site report detailing quantities, surface contour heat mapping and scopes required as well as onsite representation for your company and or act as a neutral 3rd party, to provide an impartial unbiased representation for all parties and to help avoid potential legal problems from failure. We follow all recommended TTMAC and manufacturers guidelines and can provide separate and equal billing for each party. 
We can provide proper testing as per ASTM Standards for moisture in substrates and Bond Strength Tests to satisfy all recommendations set by manufacturers. We are familiar with all levelers and proper bonding requirements for primers, levelers, etc.
Our team can save you thousands of dollars in material and labour overages and improper flooring installations right from the start. We can provide management of your levelling team and oversee your substrate site preparation if required to ensure its success.

Name: BECKO VVS A/S
Description:
BECKO VVS A/S har siden 1983 leveret VVS-entrepriser på nogle af de største bygge- og anlægsprojekter i København og Nordsjælland. 

Fra vores adresse Uvelse er vi hver dag med til at levere tekniske løsninger til fremtidens boliger, institutioner og bydele. At føre et tæt, ærligt og åbent samarbejde med byggeledelse og hovedentreprenører har foruden teknisk professionalisme altid udgjort kernen af BECKO VVS A/S. Det har fået vores kunde- og sagsportefølje til at vokse i takt med vores erfaring, så vi i dag er med på de største byggeprojekter i Københavnsområdet.

 Vores 40-50 medarbejdere har ekspertise inden for alle områder af VVS-programmet, og vi følger med udviklingen, så vi kan levere de nyeste ydelser inden for VVS, ventilation, tag og facade.

VVS - Vi har gennem årerne udført VVS-entrepriser og -renoveringer i boliger, institutioner og erhverv. Vores seneste projekter tæller Renovering af Hyldespjældet, Markedspladsen i Hillerød, Ungdomsboliger på Sydhavnsgade, Kysthusene Hellerup og flere store boligprojekter i Nordhavn, som The Silo og Sandkaj.

Ventilation - De stigende krav til indeklima og miljøet har haft stor betydning for udviklingen af denne del af vores forretningsområde. Vi kan håndtere alle former for ventilationsanlæg og har alle nødvendige værktøjer til montage og indregulering inhouse på Bøllemosevej.

Vi er en arbejdsplads, hvor vi løser opgaverne i fællesskab og gør os tilgængelige for hinanden. Vi sikrer udvikling og trivsel gennem kurser, vidensdeling og en uformel omgangstone. Med mange nye lærlinge og svende ansat inden for det seneste år er vi særligt stolte af, at vores medarbejdere i gennemsnit har været ansat i 12 år.

I 2019 overtog Maria Beck BECKO VVS A/S efter sine forældre og bringer med sig en ny ledelsesgeneration til virksomheden.

"Être femme et bâtir" est un projet porté par un collectif de coopératives d’activités et d’emploi (CAE) pour valoriser les parcours de femmes dans les métiers du bâtiment et déconstruire les stéréotypes de genre.

 À travers des vidéos témoignages, un livret d’accompagnement et des outils de diffusion, nous faisons entendre des voix singulières, fortes et inspirantes.
Ces femmes parlent de leur métier, de leur chemin, de leurs doutes et de leurs réussites — avec authenticité.

 Nos outils sont conçus pour les professionnel·le·s de l’accompagnement, les structures de l’emploi, les formatrices·teurs et les CAE, afin de favoriser la mixité, encourager les vocations, et rendre visibles d’autres possibles.

 Ce projet s’inscrit dans une dynamique coopérative, inclusive et engagée, au service de l’égalité professionnelle.

 Suivez-nous pour découvrir les vidéos, les témoignages et les actualités du projet.
Ensemble, bâtissons un avenir plus égalitaire.

Name: A.C.S.O. (Atelier Construction du Sud Ouest)
Description:
Cibles : Nous pouvons gérer la mission complète d’un projet de construction, de la conception à livraison d’un bâtiment sans réserve. Nous nous sommes spécialisés cependant dans la maitrise d'œuvre d’exécution auprès des professionnel visant les Architectes et petits promoteurs soigneusement sélectionnés. Nous avons une réelle plus-value à apporter sur les chantiers qui ont un cout travaux prévisionnel d’au moins 600 000 euros. 

Notre mission : nos qualités de suivi d’assiduité sont désormais reconnues. 

Notre mission de suivi assure la liaison et la coordination entre le Maître d’Oeuvre, les entreprises, le Bureau de contrôle et, d’une manière générale, l’ensemble des intervenants à la réalisation de l’ouvrage. Il établit le calendrier exécution et coordonne l’avancement des travaux pour faire respecter le délai global prescrit dans le marché et de permettre la livraison des ouvrages conformes aux prescriptions. 

Direction de l’exécution des contrats de travaux : ACSO organise et dirige les réunions de chantier avec l'architecte et en rédige les comptes rendus, qu’il diffuse à tous les intéressés, vérifie l’avancement des travaux et leur conformité avec les pièces du marché. 

Coordination inter-entreprise : A.C.S.O assure la coordination inter-entreprises du chantier. 

Assistance aux opérations de réception : A.C.S.O organise une visite contradictoire des travaux en vue de leur réception, il rédige les procès-verbaux et établit la liste des réserves éventuellement formulées par le maître d’ouvrage au cours de la réception. Postérieurement à la réception, A.C.S.O suit le déroulement des reprises liées aux éventuelles réserves formulées à la réception et constate, à la date prévue, la levée des réserves en présence du maître d’ouvrage et de l’entrepreneur. 

Le champ d'action : Sud-Gironde, Bassin d'Arcachon, Landes (environ 1h à la ronde de Gujan Mestras).

Our systems are dialed in. Our culture is strong. And our team is made up of driven, customer-obsessed professionals who go above and beyond for the people we serve and the teammates we serve alongside.

Aesthetic Roofing is one of the fastest-growing roofing companies in the region — and it’s not by accident. It's by design.
